bcd66363.title: AI Operations Incident Commander (Offshore)-Senior Associate-AI Managed Services - Consult
bcd66363.description:
The Opportunity
   

  

 Join our Acceleration Center India and help shape the future of business for our diverse client portfolio across geographies and jurisdictions. You’ll work at the heart of global teams across Advisory, Assurance, Tax and Business Services—solving real client challenges through connected collaboration. We’ll help you grow your skills so you can go further. With hands\-on learning, cutting\-edge tools and an inclusive culture, this is your opportunity to do inspiring work that makes a difference—every day.
   

  

 As an AI Operations Incident Commander, you will play a pivotal role in managing and strategizing within our Managed Services. This position is client\-facing, where you will be responsible for overseeing the resolution of complex incidents, confirming seamless operations, and maintaining client satisfaction. As a Senior Associate, you will leverage your problem\-solving skills and critical thinking to build meaningful client connections and guide junior team members. You will be expected to navigate complex situations, anticipate client needs, and uphold professional standards.
   

  

 In this role at PwC Acceleration Center India, you will be part of our Technology Consulting network, specifically within our Data, Analytics \& AI Managed Services practice. You will have the opportunity to develop your personal brand and technical skills while contributing to the delivery of impactful AI\-driven solutions. This position offers a dynamic environment where you can grow by managing others, building relationships, and embracing the challenges of an ever\-evolving business landscape.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Leading incident management and resolution processes for AI operations to maintain service continuity
* Developing and implementing automation frameworks to enhance operational efficiency and reduce manual intervention
* Collaborating with cross\-functional teams to design and execute business process automation solutions
* Analyzing operational performance data to identify areas for process improvement and optimization
* Managing stakeholder engagement to align service delivery with client expectations and requirements
* Overseeing the planning and execution of deliverables to validate timely project completion
* Utilizing analytical thinking to troubleshoot performance issues and develop effective solutions
* Coordinating service level management activities to maintain operational excellence and meet service agreements
* Supporting business transformation initiatives through strategic planning and execution of AI managed services
* Engaging in continuous process improvement to drive operational performance and innovation


 What You Must Have
   

  

* Major incident coordination; technical triage; ITIL operations; incident communications; handoff discipline; ticket hygiene; stakeholder engagement.
* (Incident Manager) and has experience in ServiceNow/Jira
* At least a Bachelor's degree
* At least 4\.5 years of experience
* Oral and written proficiency in English required


 What Sets You Apart
   

  

* Demonstrating proficiency in Automation Framework Design and Development
* Excelling in Business Process Automation (BPA) and Improvement
* Utilizing Operational Performance Management (OPM) strategies effectively
* Implementing Workflow Automation for enhanced service delivery
* Engaging in Service Level Management to optimize client support
* Applying analytical thinking to troubleshoot performance issues
* Leading continuous process improvement initiatives in managed services

2a54f771.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, Alexa Connected Devices
2a54f771.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Are you passionate about building the infrastructure that powers the world's largest IoT installation and most capable AI assistant? Do you thrive on tackling complex technical challenges at the intersection of IoT and AI? Are you energized by driving cross\-functional programs that span distributed systems, LLMs, and critical infrastructure?
  

  

The Alexa Connected Devices team is seeking a dynamic Sr. Technical Program Manager to drive innovation in our core horizontal services. As part of the team that enables over 1 billion connected endpoints (Echo, FireTV, Smart Home, Mobile, and Metis), you'll lead complex initiatives that transform how Alexa connects, discovers, and manages devices at massive scale.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

You will be responsible for championing and successfully delivering large projects and programs across Alexa. You will:  

* Drive complex technical programs that power Alexa's core device connectivity, management, and interaction capabilities
* Lead cross\-functional initiatives to scale our infrastructure that processes billions of daily context updates and device commands
* Own end\-to\-end program execution: gather and analyze requirements, coordinate and participate in technical design, build and maintain project/program plans, track progress, mitigate risks, communicate with stakeholders and ensure successful delivery
* Manage dependencies across multiple teams to optimize delivery while maintaining quality SLAs
* Partner with engineering and QA teams to design, implement, and test solutions
* Develop and track program metrics focused on: Availability, Latency, Accuracy, Quality, Cost\-effectiveness, Operational excellence and progarm success
* Create and maintain program roadmaps, identifying risks and dependencies while driving mitigation strategies
* Lead operational excellence initiatives to improve developer productivity and system efficiency

  

A day in the life  

You'll collaborate across teams to define and deliver platform features through:  

  

Program \& Technical Leadership  

* Partner with product, engineering, QA, and stakeholders to define and refine platform features
* Guide end\-to\-end feature delivery across multiple teams and systems
* Deep dive into: requirements, technical specifications and engineering implementation plans
* Drive integration between edge devices, cloud services, and consumer\-facing features
* Communicate across levels informing status, blockers, and path forward

  

Cross\-functional Collaboration  

* Guide diverse teams including: Product managers, Engineering teams, other program managers, Science teams
* Facilitate technical discussions, drive consensus, and decision\-making
* Ensure alignment and forward progress across workstreams

  

Execution \& Delivery  

* Lead regular status updates and program reviews
* Identify and remove blocking issues
* Monitor progress against milestones
* Ensure quality standards are met throughout development
* Drive continuous improvement in delivery processes

  

About the team  

Alexa Connected Devices team's mission is to design, build, and operate core horizontal services that power Alexa—the world's largest IoT installation and most capable, efficient, and trusted AI assistant. We deliver core capabilities enabling Alexa to connect, discover, set up, manage, and interface with over 1 billion connected endpoints (Echo, FireTV, Smart Home, Mobile, and Apps).**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

a23c234d.title: Technical Program Manager (TPM)
a23c234d.description:
**About the Company** 





 Armada is the hyperscaler for the edge, delivering modular AI infrastructure from first deployment to AI factory with speed, scale and sovereignty. Named one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies and to the CNBC Disruptor 50, Armada’s solutions are deployed in over 60 countries globally for organizations ranging from energy to defense. 
 




 With nearly $500 million in funding to date, Armada is backed by leading investors including Founders Fund, Lux, BlackRock and Microsoft (M12\), alongside strategic partnerships with Microsoft, Dell, Palantir, NVIDIA, SpaceX, and Skydio. We are building the infrastructure layer for sovereign and edge AI \- rugged, deployable compute for customers that cannot rely on centralized cloud.
 




 Working at Armada means taking ownership, driving autonomy, and delivering impact. You’ll tackle challenges that haven’t been solved before and help build something transformative from the ground up. What you do here will not only define your career but help further Armada’s mission to bridge the digital divide for customers around the world.
 

  
 




  
 


  
 **About the role** 


 We are seeking a highly skilled 
 
**Technical Program Manager (TPM)**

  with experience in the IT industry—ideally working with or for major technology vendors and infrastructure providers. The ideal candidate brings strong knowledge of 
 
**hardware solutions**

  and a foundational understanding of 
 
**infrastructure data center build projects**

 , including how engineering, construction, operations, and IT come together to deliver complex systems.
 

  
 





 In this role, you will partner closely with cross\-functional teams across 
 
**engineering, construction, operations, IT, and commercial organizations**

  to drive clarity, alignment, and momentum across highly technical and interdependent workstreams. You will serve as the connective tissue between disciplines—building trust, ensuring all stakeholders understand their roles, and driving a unified vision for program success.
 

  
 





 This role requires a balance of 
 
**strategic thinking**

  and 
 
**hands\-on execution**

 . You will help implement scalable processes and systems while also being comfortable rolling up your sleeves to establish baseline workflows, often using short\-term manual approaches before automation or tooling is implemented.
 

  
 




  
 



**Location.** 
 This role is remote\-based. 
 



  
 



**What You'll Do (Key Responsibilities)** 
  
 


* **Lead complex, cross\-functional technical programs**

  spanning hardware, infrastructure, IT systems, and operational readiness.
* **Work closely with engineering, construction, operations, IT, and commercial teams**

  to ensure alignment on objectives, dependencies, timelines, and resource needs.
* **Bring clarity and structure to complex workstreams**

  by defining program plans, success criteria, and execution frameworks.
* **Create and maintain repeatable, scalable systems and processes**

 , balancing long\-term operational excellence with short\-term pragmatism.
* **Identify and manage risks**

 , drive mitigation plans, and ensure timely escalation of critical issues.
* **Build strong relationships with stakeholders at all levels**

  to foster trust, shared ownership, and transparent decision\-making.
* **Ensure all teams understand roles, responsibilities, and expectations**

 , creating shared clarity around deliverables and the program’s strategic direction.
* **Facilitate effective communication**

 , ensuring technical concepts are translated appropriately for diverse audiences.
* **Drive operational readiness**

 , coordinating with technical and non\-technical teams to ensure hardware, infrastructure, and IT systems are prepared for deployment.
* **Track and report on program progress**

 , using data and narrative to clearly communicate status, decisions, and risks to leadership.
* **Promote a culture of accountability**

  and continuous improvement across teams involved in program execution.



  
 



**Required Qualifications** 



* **8\+ years of Technical Program Management experience**

  in the IT or technology vendor industry.
* Hands\-on experience with 
 
**hardware solutions**

 , hardware lifecycle management, or hardware\-dependent infrastructure environments.
* Familiarity with 
 
**infrastructure build projects**

  (e.g., data centers, edge deployments, network installations, or similar).
* Strong track record of driving 
 
**cross\-functional alignment**

  across engineering and operational teams.
* Demonstrated ability to bring structure and clarity to ambiguous or fast\-moving technical programs.
* Experience establishing 
 
**scalable systems, workflows, and governance**

 , while being comfortable using manual or lightweight approaches to get started.
* Excellent communication, relationship\-building, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to think strategically while also 
 
**executing tactically**

 .
* Proven ability to manage risks, dependencies, and detailed plans across several teams.



  
 



**Preferred Experience and Skills** 



* Experience working with 
 
**data center operations, cloud infrastructure, networking hardware, or OEM hardware vendors**

 .
* Understanding of logistics and supply chain desirable.
* Certification or training in 
 
**program management methodologies**

  (e.g., PMP, Agile, Lean) is a plus but not required.
* Technical background or familiarity with IT infrastructure domains.



  
 



**About You**

  
 





 You are collaborative, structured, and proactive. You thrive in complex environments and enjoy bringing order to ambiguity. You can operate at both the 10,000\-foot and 10\-foot levels—strategizing across systems while rolling up your sleeves to drive execution. You build trust across diverse groups, create clarity where there is none, and unite teams around a shared goal.
 

  
 




  
 



  
 



**You're a Great Fit if You're** 



* A go\-getter with a growth mindset. You're intellectually curious, have strong business acumen, and actively seek opportunities to build relevant skills and knowledge
* A detail\-oriented problem\-solver. You can independently gather information, solve problems efficiently, and deliver results with a "get\-it\-done" attitude
* Thrive in a fast\-paced environment. You're energized by an entrepreneurial spirit, capable of working quickly, and excited to contribute to a growing company
* A collaborative team player. You focus on business success and are motivated by team accomplishment vs personal agenda
* Highly organized and results\-driven. Strong prioritization skills and a dedicated work ethic are essential for you



  
 



**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 At Armada, we are committed to fostering a work environment where everyone is given equal opportunities to thrive. As an equal opportunity employer, we strictly prohibit discrimination or harassment based on race, color, gender, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other characteristic protected by law. This policy applies to all employment decisions, including hiring, promotions, and compensation. Our hiring is guided by qualifications, merit, and the business needs at the time.
 



  
 



**Unsolicited Resumes and Candidates** 





 Armada does not accept unsolicited resumes or candidate submissions from external agencies or recruiters. All candidates must apply directly through our careers page. Any resumes submitted by agencies without a prior signed agreement will be considered unsolicited and Armada will not be obligated to pay any fees.

83d4e70f.title: DCOS / DCIM Delivery Manager
83d4e70f.description:
**Who are we?**
 Equinix is the world’s digital infrastructure company®, shortening the path to connectivity to enable the innovations that enrich our work, life and planet.
   

  

 A place where bold ideas are welcomed, human connection is valued, and everyone has the opportunity to shape their future.
   

  

 A career at Equinix means being at the center of shaping what comes next and amplifying customer value through innovation and impact. You’ll work across teams, influence key decisions, and help shape the path forward. You’ll find belonging, purpose, and a team that welcomes you—because when you feel valued, you’re empowered to do your best work.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 This is a global role requiring close collaboration across multiple regions and continents. The DCIM Delivery Manager coordinates multidisciplinary activities associated with the AVEVA and Honeywell Niagara Centers of Excellence, supporting pre‑commissioning and commissioning activities for Equinix critical infrastructure construction projects worldwide.
   

  

 The role is accountable for delivering DCIM and DCOS outcomes to operations at Ready for Service (RFS), ensuring solutions are implemented in line with Equinix global standards, with a strong focus on quality, consistency, and operational readiness.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 DCIM \& DCOS Delivery
   

  

* Lead DCIM and DCOS delivery for Equinix Global Data Center (GDC) projects
* Act as the primary point of contact for the Centers of Excellence on AVEVA and Honeywell Niagara platforms
* Partner with GOE to track product updates and ensure timely and appropriate adoption within GDC projects
* Design and implement new AVEVA and Honeywell Niagara solutions that improve business efficiency, data quality, and operational outcomes
* Provide advanced technical support and troubleshooting assistance to the global DCOS Delivery team


 DCIM Integration \& Onboarding
   

  

* Develop and approve Data Center SmartView electrical hierarchies for DCIM onboarding
* Coordinate with DCOS System Integrators to:
+ Perform initial DCOS\-to\-DCIM asset synchronisation and review outcomes
+ Enable and validate data collection within DCIM
+ Conduct structured data sanity checks to ensure accuracy and completeness


 Validation \& Assurance
   

  

* Validate DCIM alarms in collaboration with site teams, System Integrators, and PSAE/Onboarding teams
* Verify WWDCIM integration configurations, ensuring all points are correctly mapped, and that system\-level calculations (including resiliency, utility power, and PUE) are accurate
* Confirm that Battery Monitoring Systems and Branch Circuit Monitoring (BCM) systems are fully operational prior to DCIM onboarding


 Project \& Commissioning Support
   

  

* Provide clear and structured briefings to stakeholders on DCIM prerequisites, commissioning requirements, and go‑live checklists from project initiation through completion
* Actively participate in DCIM commissioning activities, ensuring alignment with Equinix Global Standards and commissioning best practices
* Collaborate with DCOS DCIM Managers, Global Managers, and Regional Managers to ensure commissioning documentation meets both industry standards and Equinix requirements


 Tracking, Reporting \& Governance
   

  

* Manage internal tools to track delivery progress against defined milestones
* Produce program‑level reporting, analytics, and performance metrics for stakeholders
* Maintain, continuously improve, and standardise DCIM commissioning procedures and standards
* Drive specification uplift initiatives related to General Commissioning where DCIM is in scope
* Track, report, and communicate DCIM delivery status across all assigned projects


**Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of experience in data centre controls and automation, construction, operations, or facilities maintenance
* Strong engineering background within mission‑critical environments such as data centres, power generation, or oil \& gas facilities
* Demonstrated ability to research, evaluate, and apply new technologies, designs, and construction methodologies for critical infrastructure
* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and familiarity with structured data tools such as databases and reporting platforms
* Solid understanding of electrical, mechanical, and monitoring systems supporting critical infrastructure
* Excellent analytical and problem‑solving skills with strong attention to detail
* Proven ability to operate effectively in a fast‑paced, global delivery environment
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with experience coordinating across cross‑functional and geographically distributed teams
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver high‑quality outcomes under tight timelines


 This role is critical to ensuring DCIM and DCOS solutions are delivered to operations with zero open defects at RFS, supporting Equinix’s commitment to operational excellence and global consistency.
   

  

 Equinix is committed to ensuring that our employment process is open to all individuals, including those with a disability. If you are a qualified candidate and need assistance or an accommodation, please let us know by completing this form.
   

  

 Equinix is an Equal Employment Opportunity and, in the U.S., an Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to unlawful consideration of race, color, religion, creed, national or ethnic origin, ancestry, place of birth, citizenship, sex, pregnancy / childbirth or related medical conditions, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital or domestic partnership status, age, veteran or military status, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, political / organizational affiliation, status as a victim or family member of a victim of crime or abuse, or any other status protected by applicable law.
   

  

**We use artificial intelligence in our hiring process. Learn more** 
**here** 
**.**
 This posting is a new position within our organization.

9048cbf5.title: Delivery Lead Manager
9048cbf5.description:
**Skill required:** 
 Trust \& Safety \- Content management
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Delivery Lead Manager
   

  

**Qualifications:** 
 Any Graduation
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 13 to 18 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 "Accenture is a trusted, innovative, comprehensive, and experienced partner to leading platform companies. The Trust and Safety offering within Accenture Operations helps keep the internet safe and helps platform companies accelerate, scale, and improve their businesses. You will be responsible for leading a team of Content Moderators whose role is analyzing and reviewing user profiles, audio, videos, and text\-based content and/or investigating, escalating and/or resolving issues that are reported by users or flagged by the system. Due to the nature of the role, the individual and you may be exposed to flashing lights or contrasting light and dark patterns. Content moderation is meaningful work that helps keep the internet safe. It may also be challenging, at times. In the context of this role, individuals may be directly or inadvertently exposed to potentially objectionable and sensitive content (e.g., graphic, violent, sexual, or egregious). Therefore, any role supporting content moderation needs strong resilience and coping skills. We care for the health and well\-being of our people and provide the support and resources needed to perform their role responsibilities. Active participation in Accenture’s well\-being support program, designed specifically for the Trust \& Safety community, provides valuable skills to promote individual and collective well\-being. "
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 """1\. Strong coping, emotional resilience, and stress\-management skills 2\. Ability to perform duties objectively, devoid of inherent biases or personal beliefs, in the best interest of client policies. 3\. Strong knowledge of content policies, community guidelines, and online safety practices 4\. Leadership and Management Skills: 5\. Strong leadership qualities to guide and motivate team members. 6\. Ability to delegate tasks effectively and manage workloads. 7\. Decision\-making skills to resolve conflicts and make tough choices. 8\. Time management and organizational skills to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines."" ""Communication Skills: 1\. Excellent verbal and written communication skills to convey information clearly and concisely. 2\. Active listening skills to understand team members concerns and provide effective feedback. 3\. Problem\-solving and Critical Thinking: 4\. Analytical skills to identify issues, assess situations, and find practical solutions. 5\. Ability to think critically and make informed decisions under pressure. Performance Management: 1\. Skill in setting performance goals and monitoring team members progress. 2\. Capacity to provide constructive feedback and coach team members for improvement. Client and Stakeholder Management: 1\. Strong interpersonal skills to interact with clients and stakeholders. 2\. Ability to understand client expectations and manage relationships effectively. Attention to Detail: 1\. Thoroughness in reviewing and validating work for accuracy and quality. 2\. Ability to identify process gaps and areas for improvement. Ethical and Professional Conduct: 1\. Adherence to ethical standards and professionalism in all interactions. 2\. Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and data security. """
   

  

**Roles and Responsibilities:** 
 "
   

  

* "" 1\. Conducting Huddles: Lead daily Pre\-Shift and Post\-Shift meetings to discuss Performance, Process updates, and Organizational initiatives. 2\. Task Management Guidance: Provide daily guidance to team members on how to efficiently manage their day\-to\-day tasks. 3\. SLA and KPI Achievement: Lead the team to meet Service Level Agreements (SLAs) and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)/ Critical Performance Indicators (CPIs) defined by the process and the client. 4\. Performance Reviews: Conduct regular performance reviews (Monthly, Quarterly, and Yearly) for the entire team and implement Corrective Action Plans or Performance Improvement Plans as needed. 5\. Training and Quality Coordination: Collaborate with the training team to identify Training Needs (TNI) and Assessments (TNA) and develop training plans for the team. 6\. Work with Quality Analysts to identify areas of improvement and process gaps, ensuring corrective actions are taken. 7\. SOPs and Documentation: Create/ Manage Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and process documentation for all client deliverables. Partake in the knowledge dissemination process. 8\. Individual Connects: Hold regular one\-on\-one meetings with team members to understand their performance, grievances, career aspirations, and interests, providing coaching and support accordingly.""", Any Graduation

c2ed30ed.title: Account Delivery Manager
c2ed30ed.description:
**Location: Bangalore** 




 Experience: 15\+ Years
 



 Role Type: Full Time
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an experienced Account Delivery Manager to lead end\-to\-end delivery execution across strategic client accounts. The role requires strong ownership of delivery outcomes, operational excellence, stakeholder alignment, and team leadership while ensuring consistent value realization for clients. The ideal candidate brings a strong IT execution background — having previously worked as a Developer, QA Engineer, Scrum Master, or similar delivery role — and has evolved into managing large\-scale delivery engagements.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 





 Delivery Leadership
 




 ● Own end\-to\-end delivery governance across one or multiple client accounts.
 



 ● Ensure successful execution of projects aligned with scope, timelines, quality, and budget.
 



 ● Drive predictable delivery through structured planning, risk management, and execution tracking.
 



 ● Establish delivery metrics, dashboards, and reporting mechanisms.
 



  






 Account \& Stakeholder Management
 




 ● Act as the primary delivery interface for client stakeholders.
 



 ● Build trusted relationships with engineering leaders, product owners, and business stakeholders.
 



 ● Manage expectations proactively and handle escalations effectively.
 



 ● Align delivery outcomes with client business objectives.
 



  






 Program \& Team Management
 




 ● Lead cross\-functional teams including Developers, QA, Scrum teams, and architects.
 



 ● Enable Agile delivery practices and continuous improvement culture.
 



 ● Mentor delivery leads and engineering managers.
 



 ● Drive accountability, collaboration, and performance excellence.
 



  






 Operational Excellence
 




 ● Identify delivery risks early and implement mitigation strategies.
 



 ● Improve delivery maturity through process optimization and governance frameworks.
 



 ● Ensure adherence to Agile/Scrum or hybrid delivery models.
 



  





**Required Qualifications \& Experience** 




 ● 15\+ years of experience in IT services/product engineering environments.
 



 ● Hands\-on technical background as Developer / QA / Scrum Master / Technical Lead (mandatory).
 



 ● Proven experience managing large delivery programs or accounts.
 



 ● Strong understanding of SDLC, Agile methodologies, and delivery governance.
 



 ● Experience managing distributed teams and multi\-stakeholder environments.
 



 ● Demonstrated stakeholder and escalation management skills.
 



  





**Preferred Skills** 




 ● Experience managing enterprise or global clients.
 



 ● Exposure to Agile transformation or scaling frameworks.
 



 ● Knowledge of delivery metrics, forecasting, and capacity planning.
 



 ● Experience in managing P\&L or account growth initiatives.
 



  





**Core Competencies** 




 ● Delivery ownership mindset
 



 ● Stakeholder influence \& negotiation
 



 ● Execution excellence
 



 ● Risk management
 



 ● Strategic thinking with operational depth
 



 ● Leadership and mentoring
 



  





**Success Indicators** 




 ● Predictable and high\-quality delivery outcomes
 



 ● Strong client confidence and retention
 



 ● High\-performing delivery teams
 



 ● Reduced delivery risks and escalations

a16ff61d.title: Delivery Leader
a16ff61d.description:
Our client, a leading global professional services organization is looking for a
 **Delivery Leader** 
 for its multi\-functional captive Shared Services Center (SSC) in Hyderabad, Telangana, India.
 



  





 Our client’s Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery. As client’s primary internal development team It delivers innovative digital solutions to its businesses and internal operations. The team develops and deploys cutting\-edge internal and go\-to\-market solutions.
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




 As a
 **Delivery Leader** 
 , you will own the delivery for multiple products across clients portfolio, ensuring a cohesive strategy and seamless execution across various segments. Your extensive experience in program management and project leadership will be pivotal in driving strategic alignment, inspiring cross\-functional teams, and delivering enterprise IT solutions that meet organizational goals. With a strong focus on operational excellence, customer\-centric problem\-solving, innovation and continuous improvement, you will guide teams to achieve peak performance and deliver high\-quality outcomes on time and within budget. The ideal candidate will be a visionary leader and mentor, committed to driving success for client’s businesses and internal operations and its customers.
 



  





**Location:** 
 Hyderabad, Telangana, India
 



  





**The Key Responsibilities will include** 



1. Lead large\-scale implementations, develop and articulate vision and objectives, and ensure alignment with business strategies. Demonstrating strategic vision evolution through continuous learning.
2. Inspire product engineering teams, advocate for discovery and delivery practices, and educate the organization on product engineering models. Promote continuous improvement and spread knowledge through community sessions.
3. Drive complex programs, define and measure product engineering maturity, and achieve Objectives/KPIs. Ensure tools and reports are available to track progress. Conduct quality audits and engage hands\-on with delivery and team growth. Learn and experiment with new techniques/tools like GenAI.
4. Coach delivery managers to develop strong capabilities. Advise on discovery and delivery methodologies, share learnings through evangelism, and provide examples of people development.
5. Drive process optimization, quality and risk management, capacity planning, and resource utilization and drive operational excellence.
6. Focus on addressing critical customer issues and aligning teams with business objectives. Engage cross\-functional teams to achieve peak outcomes through continuous learning and collaboration.
7. Identify inefficiencies, build problem\-solving capabilities, and enhance the product engineering model to be lean and adaptable. Guide the organization to embrace lean principles and foster innovation.
8. Influence decision\-making processes, ensure effective communication, and resolve conflicts. Foster close collaboration within the product community.
9. Establish risk management processes, identify and mitigate risks, and focus on early learning and fast feedback. Proactively solve problems and plan contingencies.



  





**Qualifications and Required Skills:** 



1. A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Enterprise experience is the most relevant factor
2. Over 17 years of experience in product management or project leadership, managing enterprise IT solutions across multiple teams, with demonstrated experience in strategic product management and leading multiple teams.
3. Strong skills in developing and implementing strategic plans to meet organizational goals.
4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to engage and manage stakeholders.
5. Extensive knowledge of project management methodologies and tools, with a track record of delivering projects on time and within budget.
6. Deep understanding of industry trends, market dynamics, and competitive landscape to drive business growth and innovation.
7. Strong leadership capabilities with Customer\-centric mindset.



  





**Interested? Please submit your resume and cover letter to rajesh@etaashconsultants.com for a discussion.**

dfca9a67.title: Device Support Delivery Manager
dfca9a67.description:
**Job Description**
**Job Title: Device Support Delivery Manager**
**Experience: 10\+ Years**
**Location: Bangalore**
**Department: IT Infrastructure / End User Computing**
**Role Overview**
 The Device Support Delivery Manager will be responsible for leading end\-user device operations, deployment, and lifecycle management for enterprise desktops, laptops, and mobile devices. The role requires strong technical expertise in device management technologies such as Microsoft Intune, Autopilot, Apple Business Manager (ABM), and JAMF, along with proven experience in managing large\-scale device deployment and support programs.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Manage end\-to\-end delivery of end\-user device support and deployment services.
* Oversee lifecycle management of desktops, laptops, and mobile devices, including provisioning, configuration, patching, and retirement.
* Lead technical operations for Windows Autopilot, Microsoft Intune, JAMF, and Apple Business Manager (ABM).
* Ensure timely resolution of incidents, requests, and escalations related to end\-user devices.
* Define and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs), SLAs, and compliance standards.
* Collaborate with OEMs and vendors for device procurement, warranty support, and issue resolution.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives in device support processes and automation.
* Prepare and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and documentation.
* Provide regular updates, reports, and presentations to management and stakeholders.
* Mentor and guide the device support team to ensure high\-quality service delivery.


**Technical Skills Required**
* Strong knowledge of Windows and macOS operating systems.
* Hands\-on experience with:
* Microsoft Autopilot – device provisioning and deployment.
* Microsoft Intune – MDM/MAM configuration, compliance, and policy management.
* Apple Business Manager (ABM) – integration and Apple device management.
* JAMF Pro – Mac device enrollment, policies, and application management.
* Familiarity with imaging, software deployment, and patch management tools.
* Understanding of the ITIL framework, incident, and change management processes.
* Knowledge of OEM products such as Dell, HP, Lenovo, and Apple hardware.


**Soft Skills \& Communication**
* Excellent English communication skills – both written and verbal.
* Strong stakeholder and vendor management capabilities.
* Ability to work cross\-functionally with global teams.
* Leadership and team management experience.
* Analytical thinking, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.


**Educational Qualification**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Relevant certifications preferred: Microsoft Certified: Endpoint Administrator, JAMF Certified Tech, ITIL Foundation, etc.


**Preferred Background**
* Experience working in large enterprises or global IT environments.
* Exposure to hybrid device management (on\-premises and cloud).
* Prior experience leading a device support or endpoint management team.


**Requirements**
**Job Requirements**
* Strong knowledge of Windows and macOS operating systems.
* Hands\-on experience with:
* Microsoft Autopilot – device provisioning and deployment.
* Microsoft Intune – MDM/MAM configuration, compliance, and policy management.
* Apple Business Manager (ABM) – integration and Apple device management.
* JAMF Pro – Mac device enrollment, policies, and application management.
* Familiarity with imaging, software deployment, and patch management tools.
* Understanding of the ITIL framework, incident, and change management processes.
* Knowledge of OEM products such as Dell, HP, Lenovo, and Apple hardware.

da649c11.title: Account Delivery Leader – Strategic Accounts
da649c11.description:
**Position:** 
 Account Delivery Leader – Strategic Accounts
 



**Location:** 
 Remote (Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai preferred)
 



**Employment:** 
 Full\-Time
 



**Reports To:** 
 Chief Delivery Officer
 



  





**ABOUT NARWAL** 




**Narwal** 
 is an AI\-powered, outcome\-focused solutions provider helping Fortune 500 enterprises accelerate AI, Data, and Quality Engineering transformation across five countries. Combining deep engineering expertise with proprietary AI\-led accelerators and reusable IP, Narwal drives faster, higher\-quality, lower\-risk delivery. Recognized on the
 **Inc. 5000** 
 and as a
 **Great Place to Work** 
 , Narwal is redefining delivery — moving beyond effort\-based models toward scalable, AI\-powered execution.
 



  





**ROLE OVERVIEW** 




 The Account Delivery Leader owns end\-to\-end delivery, operational governance, customer success, talent scaling, and delivery\-led growth for a strategic enterprise account. This role serves as the primary delivery owner and executive escalation point, ensuring high\-quality execution, predictable delivery, and strong alignment between customer expectations and Narwal's delivery organization. This is an ideal opportunity for a leader who combines enterprise delivery expertise with customer engagement capability, operational rigor, commercial acumen, and the drive to thrive in a high\-growth, transformation\-focused environment. Just as important, this is a delivery\-led\-growth role: account mining, renewals, and expansion are earned through delivery excellence, trust, and customer satisfaction. Technically conversant across AI, Data, and Quality Engineering, the Account Delivery Leader leads customer conversations with credibility and partners closely with Narwal's Solutions organization — knowing what to bring, what to ask, and how to draw the right IP, accelerators, and solution architecture into the account.
 



  





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 




**Account Delivery Ownership** 



* Own end\-to\-end delivery across programs, projects, and managed services; ensure predictability, SLA adherence, quality, and customer satisfaction.
* Establish delivery governance through structured reviews, operational dashboards, risk tracking, and escalation management; drive accountability across Delivery Managers, Leads, Architects, and teams.
* Ensure SOW readiness, transition planning, and operational preparedness — including onboarding, access provisioning, and dependency management — for seamless execution of new engagements.
* Make AI\-native delivery the default operating model in the account — drive AI\-assisted and agentic engineering across the lifecycle (requirements to release) for materially faster, higher\-quality, lower\-cost delivery, with people and AI agents working together and AI autonomy expanded progressively as results earn it.



**Client \& Executive Stakeholder Management** 



* Build and maintain strong relationships with customer leadership, business stakeholders, and executive sponsors; act as the primary accountability point for delivery and operational alignment.
* Lead governance reviews, steering committee discussions, and executive engagements; manage escalations proactively while driving trust, transparency, and long\-term partnership.
* Drive customer satisfaction, relationship maturity, and delivery\-led account growth through executive sponsorship and strategic alignment on business outcomes.



**Financial \& Operational Management** 



* Own account\-level financial governance: utilization, delivery margins, revenue realization, forecasting, and capacity planning; support revenue growth through delivery excellence and customer confidence.
* Drive operational efficiency through optimized delivery models, automation adoption, resource utilization, and governance improvements; partner with Finance on margin optimization and performance improvement.



**Delivery Governance, Risk \& Compliance** 



* Establish scalable governance frameworks, KPI\-driven reporting (RAG status, operational dashboards), and audit readiness; ensure compliance with contractual obligations and internal governance standards.
* Proactively identify and mitigate delivery risks, staffing gaps, scope changes, and execution challenges; drive delivery quality assurance mechanisms.
* Govern AI in delivery responsibly — put the guardrails, quality gates, code review, and security and compliance controls in place so AI accelerates delivery without adding technical debt, vulnerabilities, or risk, backed by the structured inputs and engineering standards that keep AI output reliable and trustworthy.



**Talent, Fulfillment \& Capability Management** 



* Build and lead high\-performing teams; partner with Talent Acquisition for timely fulfillment of volume and niche skill demands; drive pipeline readiness, interview conversion, and onboarding effectiveness.
* Lead capability development, succession planning, cross\-skilling, employee engagement, and leadership growth initiatives aligned to account growth plans and long\-term customer needs.



**Delivery\-Led Growth \& Continuous Improvement** 



* Partner with Growth, Solutions, HR, and Finance to support account mining, renewals, expansions, and strategic growth; validate delivery feasibility and resource readiness for new opportunities.
* Contribute to AI adoption, modernization, and transformation discussions; drive automation, reusable frameworks, and AI\-powered operational improvements to enhance delivery productivity and customer outcomes.
* Serve as the liaison between the customer and Narwal's Solutions organization — bringing the right IP, accelerators, and architecture into the account, and drawing out the best\-fit solution while Solutions' experts engage directly on the technical depth.
* Help customers put AI to work — champion AI adoption, AI\-assisted development, and AI\-first solutions in the account, bringing the internal Solutions organization's ideas, IP, and accelerators to the customer, and contributing to a culture of AI\-first, modern engineering across both teams.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS** 




**Required Experience** 



* 15\+ years in Delivery Management, Program Management, or Global Delivery leadership within IT/Technology Services organizations.
* Proven experience managing large strategic enterprise accounts in global delivery models across multiple programs, projects, and managed services engagements.
* Strong experience with North American enterprise customers, globally distributed delivery teams, and customer escalation / delivery health management.
* Prior experience as Account Delivery Leader / Delivery Head / Strategic Account Delivery Leader strongly preferred.
* Technically conversant across AI, Data, and/or Quality Engineering — credible in technical conversations with customer leaders, able to grasp what is being solved and partner with the Solutions organization to land the right outcome (deep architecture and build expertise lives within Solutions).



  





**Core \& Leadership Competencies** 



* Enterprise Delivery \& Program Management
* Strategic Account Governance \& P\&L Management
* Customer Stakeholder Management
* Financial Governance \& Margin Awareness
* Talent \& Fulfillment Management
* Delivery Risk \& Escalation Management
* Global Delivery Model Management
* KPI\-Driven Operational Governance
* Resource Planning \& Capacity Management
* Cross\-Functional Leadership \& Collaboration
* Executive presence \& ownership mindset
* Operational rigor, analytical \& problem\-solving capability
* Technical Fluency — AI, Data \& Quality Engineering
* Solutioning Partnership \& Customer Technical Engagement



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience in AI, Data, Quality Engineering, Digital Engineering, or enterprise modernization ecosystems; exposure to AI\-powered operational models and delivery automation.
* Account\-level P\&L management and profitability improvement in high\-growth IT services organizations; high\-volume fulfillment and niche skill demand management experience.



  





**Preferred Certifications:** 
 PMP \| ITIL\| SAFe Agile \|Scrum \| Cloud (AWS / Azure / GCP) \|Delivery Governance / Program Management
 



  





**SUCCESS METRICS** 



* Delivery predictability \& SLA adherence
* Customer satisfaction \& executive stakeholder feedback
* Revenue realization \& delivery margins
* Fulfillment effectiveness \& onboarding efficiency
* Reduction in delivery escalations \& operational risks
* Delivery\-led account expansion, renewals \& retention
* Team engagement, capability maturity \& talent stability
* AI\-assisted delivery adoption \& measurable productivity and quality impact



  





*Narwal is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.* 
 narwal.ai

05fa1c85.title: Business Technology Solutions Manager
05fa1c85.description:
**ZS** 
 is a place where passion changes lives. As a management consulting and technology firm focused on improving life and how we live it, we transform ideas into impact by
 **bringing together data, science, technology** 
 and
 **human ingenuity** 
 to deliver better outcomes for all. Here you’ll work side\-by\-side with a powerful collective of thinkers and experts shaping life\-changing solutions for patients, caregivers and consumers, worldwide. ZSers drive impact by bringing a
 **client\-first mentality** 
 to each and every engagement. We partner collaboratively with our clients to develop custom solutions and technology products that create value and deliver company results across critical areas of their business. Bring your curiosity for learning, bold ideas, courage and passion to drive life\-changing impact to ZS.
   

  

 As a
 **Business Technology Solutions Manager** 
 at ZS, you will be leading large\-scale client delivery engagements, managing and expanding existing client relationships, and developing new business opportunities. The candidate must deeply understand ZS’s service offerings and proactively identify and propose new solutions to address client needs. The role also requires strengthening capabilities within the Tech group by leveraging technology and industry expertise to drive growth.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Building and managing client relationships: Actively assess and present ways to serve clients by developing solutions and offerings relevant to that client
* Generating new business engagements: Drive new business opportunities by identifying and pursuing new leads, creating proposals , facilitate client discussions and presentations to drive new business and client relationships
* Work with onshore and offshore teams to develop price estimate, plan capacity, coordinate delivery of the end\-to\-end technology capability (BI Reporting, Analytics, AI, Digital, Big Data, Cloud, MDM) solution, report project status and act as escalation path for clients
* Ensure technical design is robust and scalable solutions consistent with ZS and industry practices; take advantage of the existing assets and maintaining a balance between architecture requirements and specific client needs.
* Provide project leadership and direction on one or more projects while maintaining a high\-quality level of service;
* Identify latest technology trends and domain trends to develop ZS POV and drive innovative solutions for our clients.
* Serve as the single point of contact and advisor for clients to facilitate their business needs and program demands through solutions and services
* Bridge business and technical teams by being fluent in the language of consulting (business drivers, process), design and technology (systems architecture, data warehousing, report creation)


**What You’ll Bring**
* Bachelor's/Master's degree with specialization in Computer Science, MIS, IT or another computer related discipline.
* 10\+ years of relevant of hands on IT services or consulting industry experience leading medium\-large scale technology solution delivery engagements;
* Minimum 2 years of experience leading large delivery teams;
* Extensive experience in data engineering and cloud technologies
* 4\+ years’ experience within a professional service firm is preferred.
* Ability to own and drive end\-to\-end project delivery: define the problem, design research, deliver on results
* Ability to work with cross functional teams, but US and India
* Ability to own and drive end\-to\-end project delivery: define the problem, design research, deliver on results
* Ability to work with cross functional teams, but US and India
* Fluency in English is required
* Client\-first mentality
* Intense work ethic
* Collaborative spirit and problem\-solving approach


**How you’ll grow:**
* Cross\-functional skills development \& custom learning pathways
* Milestone training programs aligned to career progression opportunities
* Internal mobility paths that empower growth via s\-curves, individual contribution and role expansions


**Perks \& Benefits:**
 At ZS, your growth matters. We offer a comprehensive total rewards package that supports your health and well‑being, financial future, time away, and professional development. With robust skills‑building programs, multiple career progression paths, internal mobility, and a deeply collaborative culture, you’ll have the opportunity to do meaningful work, expand your capabilities, and thrive as part of a global community. For details on total rewards in India, visit ZS India office locations \| Where we work \| ZS.
   

  

**Hybrid working model:**
 We are committed to giving our employees a flexible and connected way of working. A flexible and connected ZS allows us to combine work from home and on\-site presence at clients/ZS offices for the majority of our week. The magic of ZS culture and innovation thrives in both planned and spontaneous face\-to\-face connections.
   

  

**Travel:**
 Travel is a requirement at ZS for client facing ZSers; business needs of your project and client are the priority. While some projects may be local, all client\-facing ZSers should be prepared to travel as needed. Travel provides opportunities to strengthen client relationships, gain diverse experiences, and enhance professional growth by working in different environments and cultures.
   

  

**Considering applying?**
 At ZS, we honor the visible and invisible elements of our identities, personal experiences, and belief systems—the ones that comprise us as individuals, shape who we are, and make us unique. We believe your personal interests, identities, and desire to learn are integral to your success here. We are committed to building a team that reflects a broad variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. Learn more about our inclusion and belonging efforts and the networks ZS supports to assist our ZSers in cultivating community spaces and obtaining the resources they need to thrive.
   

  

 If you’re eager to grow, contribute, and bring your unique self to our work, we encourage you to apply.
   

  

 ZS is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to providing equal employment and advancement opportunities without regard to any class protected by applicable law.
   

  

 To complete your application:
   

  

 Candidates must possess or be able to obtain work authorization for their intended country of employment. An on\-line application, including a full set of transcripts (official or unofficial), is required to be considered.
   

  

 NO AGENCY CALLS, PLEASE.
   

  

 Find Out More At:
   

  

 www.zs.com

97c1a8d4.title: Technical Program Manager, Network Capacity Planning
97c1a8d4.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.
* 5 years of experience designing, constructing, or managing infrastructure projects.
* Experience creating infrastructure designs (e.g., telecom, electrical, mechanical), drawing sets for builds, and remodels of data center networking spaces.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience partnering with Data Science teams or directly leveraging machine learning and AI\-driven methodologies to scale forecasting models, automate anomaly detection, and simulate capacity scenarios.
* Experience in network capacity planning, demand forecasting, inventory optimization, or supply\-demand matching.
* Proficiency in data modeling, trend analysis, statistics, and data tools (e.g., SQL, spreadsheet software) to synthesize complex capacity metrics and performance loops.
* Strong foundational knowledge of network infrastructure concepts, including network routing, peering, cache infrastructure (CDN), or capacity placement.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


As a Network Capacity Planner, you will ensure Google Cloud’s growth by guaranteeing network capacity is delivered efficiently and on time to support products and customers. Operating across critical planning and execution horizons, you will blend a deep understanding of network fundamentals with machine learning and AI\-driven methodologies to scale forecasting, automate anomaly detection, and simulate complex capacity scenarios.  

  

Acting as a key technical collaborator alongside Technical Account Managers, Customer Engineers, and Product Managers, you will navigate customer requirements, mitigate supply stockouts, and manage inventory buffers. Your work will directly balance resource efficiency with high availability, safeguarding infrastructure performance and driving strategic demand attainment across the global network fleet.


Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Leverage deep knowledge of network fundamentals to understand critical paths, skillfully navigate complex customer requirements, and co\-develop tailored solutions alongside Technical Account Managers, Customer Engineers, and Product Managers.
* Own the execution window, capturing large agreement requirements and navigating network lead times.
* Build forecasting models leveraging machine learning and AI to improve predictive accuracy, automate anomaly detection, and simulate capacity scenarios.
* Mitigate supplies shortages, maintain optimal inventory levels, manage policy\-based buffers, and plan for major peak traffic events.
* Collaborate to build AI\-assisted automation for ordering and resource fulfillment while designing metrics to track fleet efficiency and demand attainment.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

9381f180.title: DCOS / DCIM Delivery Manager
9381f180.description:
### **DCOS / DCIM Delivery Manager**


* JR\-158866
* Hybrid
* Mumbai
* Operations Engineering
* Full time

**Who are we?**



Equinix is the world’s digital infrastructure company®, shortening the path to connectivity to enable the innovations that enrich our work, life and planet.

  


A place where bold ideas are welcomed, human connection is valued, and everyone has the opportunity to shape their future.



A career at Equinix means being at the center of shaping what comes next and amplifying customer value through innovation and impact. You’ll work across teams, influence key decisions, and help shape the path forward. You’ll find belonging, purpose, and a team that welcomes you—because when you feel valued, you’re empowered to do your best work.**Job Summary**


This is a global role requiring close collaboration across multiple regions and continents. The DCIM Delivery Manager coordinates multidisciplinary activities associated with the AVEVA and Honeywell Niagara Centers of Excellence, supporting pre‑commissioning and commissioning activities for Equinix critical infrastructure construction projects worldwide.


The role is accountable for delivering DCIM and DCOS outcomes to operations at Ready for Service (RFS), ensuring solutions are implemented in line with Equinix global standards, with a strong focus on quality, consistency, and operational readiness.

**Responsibilities**


DCIM \& DCOS Delivery

* Lead DCIM and DCOS delivery for Equinix Global Data Center (GDC) projects
* Act as the primary point of contact for the Centers of Excellence on AVEVA and Honeywell Niagara platforms
* Partner with GOE to track product updates and ensure timely and appropriate adoption within GDC projects
* Design and implement new AVEVA and Honeywell Niagara solutions that improve business efficiency, data quality, and operational outcomes
* Provide advanced technical support and troubleshooting assistance to the global DCOS Delivery team


DCIM Integration \& Onboarding

* Develop and approve Data Center SmartView electrical hierarchies for DCIM onboarding
* Coordinate with DCOS System Integrators to:


	+ Perform initial DCOS\-to\-DCIM asset synchronisation and review outcomes
	+ Enable and validate data collection within DCIM
	+ Conduct structured data sanity checks to ensure accuracy and completeness

Validation \& Assurance

* Validate DCIM alarms in collaboration with site teams, System Integrators, and PSAE/Onboarding teams
* Verify WWDCIM integration configurations, ensuring all points are correctly mapped, and that system\-level calculations (including resiliency, utility power, and PUE) are accurate
* Confirm that Battery Monitoring Systems and Branch Circuit Monitoring (BCM) systems are fully operational prior to DCIM onboarding


Project \& Commissioning Support

* Provide clear and structured briefings to stakeholders on DCIM prerequisites, commissioning requirements, and go‑live checklists from project initiation through completion
* Actively participate in DCIM commissioning activities, ensuring alignment with Equinix Global Standards and commissioning best practices
* Collaborate with DCOS DCIM Managers, Global Managers, and Regional Managers to ensure commissioning documentation meets both industry standards and Equinix requirements


Tracking, Reporting \& Governance

* Manage internal tools to track delivery progress against defined milestones
* Produce program‑level reporting, analytics, and performance metrics for stakeholders
* Maintain, continuously improve, and standardise DCIM commissioning procedures and standards
* Drive specification uplift initiatives related to General Commissioning where DCIM is in scope
* Track, report, and communicate DCIM delivery status across all assigned projects

**Qualifications**

* 5\+ years of experience in data centre controls and automation, construction, operations, or facilities maintenance
* Strong engineering background within mission‑critical environments such as data centres, power generation, or oil \& gas facilities
* Demonstrated ability to research, evaluate, and apply new technologies, designs, and construction methodologies for critical infrastructure
* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and familiarity with structured data tools such as databases and reporting platforms
* Solid understanding of electrical, mechanical, and monitoring systems supporting critical infrastructure
* Excellent analytical and problem‑solving skills with strong attention to detail
* Proven ability to operate effectively in a fast‑paced, global delivery environment
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with experience coordinating across cross‑functional and geographically distributed teams
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver high‑quality outcomes under tight timelines


This role is critical to ensuring DCIM and DCOS solutions are delivered to operations with zero open defects at RFS, supporting Equinix’s commitment to operational excellence and global consistency.


Equinix is committed to ensuring that our employment process is open to all individuals, including those with a disability. If you are a qualified candidate and need assistance or an accommodation, please let us know by completing form.


Equinix is an Equal Employment Opportunity and, in the U.S., an Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to unlawful consideration of race, color, religion, creed, national or ethnic origin, ancestry, place of birth, citizenship, sex, pregnancy / childbirth or related medical conditions, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital or domestic partnership status, age, veteran or military status, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, political / organizational affiliation, status as a victim or family member of a victim of crime or abuse, or any other status protected by applicable law.

**We use artificial intelligence in our hiring process. Learn more** **here****.**


This posting is a new position within our organization.

f884c6a2.title: Technical Program Manager, Data Cloud
f884c6a2.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics tools.
* Experience using SQL for data queries, dashboarding etc.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


Data Cloud \- consisting of products across Data Analytics, Database and Business Intelligence is one of the fastest growing areas in Google Cloud, with an extensive portfolio of leading products in databases, data analytics, data transformation and visualization. Our area is building infrastructure and products for customers to drive insights and intelligence from their data. We are on a path to unleash numerous Data \& AI related products including Agentic applications. Join us at this pivotal juncture to build the future of Data \& AI in Google Cloud Platform.


You will be joining the Data Cloud Technical Program Management Team, with responsibilities to drive the planning, execution and growth of Data Cloud products and infrastructure.
  

  

In this role, you will have the opportunity to work on multiple Data Cloud products/features. You will closely partner with senior engineering leaders and a collaborative team building features across various data stack elements. You will help shape the roadmap of products/features that you work on helping drive customer adoption and growth.
Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Set the direction for a program by outlining goals and objectives, evaluating and running multiple projects, organizing cross\-project work within the program, and defining program controls/governance/standards.
* Drive consistency between Cloud processes and central processes. Bring visibility and strengthen communication across the teams.
* Enable execution across multiple teams and drive delivery across the complete portfolio of Cloud products and solutions.
* Engage with engineering directors, product leaders and other Technical Program Manager (TPM) groups, to streamline processes, simplify execution, manage objectives and key results, release on time, bring tooling for efficiencies and help the teams you are engaged with in execution.
* Contribute to various initiatives in Data Cloud and Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Technical Program Manager community.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. c5e2f3d4.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.
* Experience in architecture, design, verification, implementation, or validation across 7 chip development cycles.
* Experience with managing technical cross\-functional projects.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master's degree or PhD in Engineering, or a related field.
* 8 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience as an engineer or manager in developing hardware or software systems around the chips.
* Experience with two or more chip cycles in a project management role with execution within resource and schedule constraints.
* Knowledge of data centers and cloud markets, technological and business trends, requirements, and ecosystem partners.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


The AI and Infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. We empower Google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering AI and Infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. Our customers include Googlers, Google Cloud customers, and billions of Google users worldwide.


We're the driving force behind Google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our cutting\-edge AI models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. From software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world\-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our TPUs, Vertex AI for Google Cloud, Google Global Networking, Data Center operations, systems research, and much more.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Lead the creation of data\-motivated schedules and milestones, track the progress, identify potential future tests, and identify mitigations with the multiple team leaders.

d4b5d6da.title: Program Manager – Operations and Planning
d4b5d6da.description:
**Who We Are**
 Applied Materials is a global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world. We design, build and service cutting\-edge equipment that helps our customers manufacture display and semiconductor chips – the brains of devices we use every day. As the foundation of the global electronics industry, Applied enables the exciting technologies that literally connect our world – like AI and IoT. If you want to push the boundaries of materials science and engineering to create next generation technology, join us to deliver material innovation that changes the world.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 Location:
   

  

 Bangalore,IND
   

  

 You’ll benefit from a supportive work culture that encourages you to learn, develop, and grow your career as you take on challenges and drive innovative solutions for our customers. We empower our team to push the boundaries of what is possible—while learning every day in a supportive leading global company. Visit our Careers website to learn more.
   

  

 At Applied Materials, we care about the health and wellbeing of our employees. We’re committed to providing programs and support that encourage personal and professional growth and care for you at work, at home, or wherever you may go. Learn more about our benefits.
   

  

**Strategic Planning:**
* Support overall planning by coordinating inputs gathering, timelines development, and deliverables alignment.
* Develop high\-level business objectives into actionable plans, priorities with roadmaps.
* Drive alignment across teams to ensure shared understanding of goals, scope, and success criteria.
* Support leadership through defining program structure, milestones, dependencies and trade\-offs.
* Proactively manage interdependencies across workstreams and teams to drive seamless execution.


**Governance:**
* Establish and maintain program governance mechanisms such as reviews, checkpoints, and decision forums
* Ensure decisions, actions, and commitments are clearly documented and tracked to closure
* Escalate project risks, issues, in a timely and structured manner with recommendation for contingency plans.


**Stakeholder Management \& Communication:**
* Partner closely with cross\-functional teams to align on expectations
* Drive cross\-functional meeting as a central point of coordination across multiple stakeholders and priorities
* Proactively communicate with stakeholders ensuring alignment on deliverables.


**Process Improvement:**
* Identify opportunities to improve planning, execution, and governance processes.
* Capture lessons learned to drive continuous improvement across programs.
* Support adoption of best practices for execution discipline and operational rigor.


**Preferred Qualification:**
* 6–10 years of experience in program management, strategy, finance or operations within the semiconductor, electronics, deep‑tech or associated industry
* Proven ability to manage cross‑functional, multi‑geography programs involving engineering, policy, finance, and operations teams
