7500be2d.title: Software Architect
7500be2d.description:
### **General Information**

Req \#
WD00101468
Career area:
Artificial Intelligence
Country/Region:
India
State:
Haryana
City:
Gurgaon
Date:
Friday, July 10, 2026
Working time:
Full\-time
**Additional Locations**:
* India \- Haryāna \- Gurgaon
* India \- Haryāna \- Gurgaon
### **Why Work at Lenovo**

We are Lenovo. We do what we say. We own what we do. We WOW our customers.  

Lenovo is a US$83 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked \#196 in the Fortune Global 500, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world’s largest PC company with a full\-stack portfolio of AI\-enabled, AI\-ready, and AI\-optimized devices (PCs, workstations, smartphones, tablets), infrastructure (server, storage, edge, high performance computing and software defined infrastructure), software, solutions, and services. Lenovo’s continued investment in world\-changing innovation is building a more equitable, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. Lenovo is listed on the Hong Kong stock exchange under Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992\) (ADR: LNVGY).  

  

This transformation together with Lenovo’s world\-changing innovation is building a more inclusive, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. To find out more visit www.lenovo.com, and read about the latest news via our StoryHub.
### **Description and Requirements**

An experienced ServiceNow Architect with all round technical expertise in engaging with customers to build solutions, engage with development teams to develop the solutions and work with customer technical teams for deployment and ongoing product enhancement. Hands\-on experience in the past with end\-to\-end development, from ideation to deployment is essential. He/she will be responsible in guiding product t teams developing **Minimum Viable Products (MVPs)** for a range of AI\-driven ServiceNow digital workplace solutions focused on productivity, user experience, process/workflow efficiency and automation. He/she shall act as a partner for presales teams and offer technical expertise to face customers in consultative capacity to understand the challenges and pain points to propose appropriate solution. He/she will then liaison with development teams to develop MVPs and further scale them into full\-featured products. He/she must collaborate with the CTO and other members of the CTO organization to design the architecture of new products and features. Ensure that solutions/products are developed either as scoped application or marketplace application or custom development for Lenovo customers as required and must be well\-structured, maintainable, and aligned with long\-term technical strategy of Lenovo.  

  

**Job Responsibilities**


Below listed are the key responsibilities the suitable expert is expected to deliver.

 **MVP Development**

* Architect, develop, and deploy robust and scalable applications/solutions on ServiceNow platform for orchestration, integration and automation.
* Collaborate with product managers, UX/UI designers, and other teams to translate high\-level product requirements into detailed technical specifications.
* Break down technical specifications into features and capabilities for the target state and document them for the project teams to understand and deliver.
* Work with security \& privacy compliance team to ensure the applications are secure by design and comply with privacy laws across the globe
* Select most appropriate technologies and frameworks for each project to ensure efficiency and performance.
* Build the core functionality of the product, including frontend user interfaces, backend logic, and database systems leveraging frontend frameworks and backend APIs as necessary.

**AI and Machine Learning Integration**

* Design and implement AI and machine learning models to enable predictive and proactive capabilities for the products being developed.
* Perform synthetic data simulation, data preparation, model training, and integration of AI services into the product effectively.
* Leverage appropriate tools and APIs to drive intelligent decision\-making capabilities based on data analytics to create automated, and efficient workflows within the product.

**Technical Leadership \& Liaison**

* Be the technical evangelist for Lenovo customers and sales/presales teams. Also, act as technical consultant for technology internal/external development teams.
* Liaise with partners (e.g., ServiceNow, Lakeside) and ISVs (e.g., Yellow.AI) to integrate their capabilities into the products being developed.
* Drive best coding and documentation practices for the development teams to ensure maintainable, and well\-documented code across the entire stack, perform code reviews for standards and compliance along with relevant teams.
* Actively be involved in all phases of the product lifecycle, beyond initial concept and design to deployment, maintenance, and ongoing iteration.
* Provide technical guidance when required to ensure successful completion of product development on time.
* Articulate any complex technical concepts and product prerequisites to implementation/transformation teams.

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**  

**Programming/Development Expertise**

* Expert level of proficiency in ServiceNow as a platform and all commonly used modules of ServiceNow including Now Assist
* Expertise in multiple programming languages (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Java, .NET, Go) and a deep understanding of their associated frameworks (e.g., React, Vue.js) and ecosystems.

**AI/ML Expertise**

* Experience in working with AI libraries and various modules of ServiceNow
* Practical experience of integrating various platforms with ServiceNow

**Full\-Stack Capabilities**

* A strong track record demonstrating successful implementation of ServiceNow as a platform and custom applications on ServiceNow.

**Communication Skills**

* Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to lead and mentor remote teams and present complex technical information in a clear and concise manner.

**Problem\-Solving Ability**

* A creative and pragmatic problem\-solver that can quickly build functional prototypes and is comfortable working in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.

**Qualifications Required**

* A technical bachelor’s or master’s degree preferably in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field.
* ServiceNow expert level certification would be preferrable
* A strong portfolio or public code repository (e.g., GitHub)
* Familiarity with DevOps best practices and tools.
* Prior experience in a start\-up environment or a similar role focused on rapid prototyping and iterative development.
* 12\+ years of relevant experience with bachelor's degree

**Preferred Qualities**

* Experience of working directly working under executive leadership
* Prior experience developing products for the digital workplace or enterprise SaaS market
* Hands\-on experience with generative AI, large language models (LLMs), or other cutting\-edge AI technologies including and beyond Now LLM


**Additional Locations**:
* India \- Haryāna \- Gurgaon
* India \- Haryāna \- Gurgaon
* India
* India \- Haryāna
\* India \- Haryāna \- Gurgaon , \* India \- Haryāna \- Gurgaon  

  

**NOTICE FOR PUBLIC**  

At Lenovo, we follow strict policies and legal compliance for our recruitment process, which includes role alignment, employment terms discussion, final selection and offer approval, and recording transactions in our internal system. Interviews may be conducted via audio, video, or in\-person depending on the role, and you will always meet with an official Lenovo representative.

Please beware of fraudulent recruiters posing as Lenovo representatives. They may request cash deposits or personal information. Always apply through official Lenovo channels and never share sensitive information. Lenovo does not solicit money or sensitive information from applicants and will not request payments for training or equipment.

Kindly verify job offers through the official Lenovo careers page or contact IndiaTA@lenovo.com. Stay informed and cautious to protect yourself from recruitment fraud. Report any suspicious activity to local authorities.

863a76ca.title: Advisory Solution Consultant
863a76ca.description:
**Company Description**  

It all started when engineer Fred Luddy wrote code that automated a tedious task for his coworker, Phyllis. She cried tears of joy. That moment inspired Fred to build a company that could do that for everyone—freeing people from busywork so they could focus on meaningful work. Today, ServiceNow is the AI control tower for business reinvention. Our ServiceNow AI platform brings together any AI, any data, and any workflow— helping 85% of the Fortune 500® work smarter, faster, and better. We're building an AI\-native culture where technology and talent are unstoppable together. And we're just getting started.


Join us to put AI to work for people.

 **Job Description**  

As a member of our core Solution Consulting team, you will play a critical role in driving our future success by being the champion of recommending AI\-first business transformation to some of the most important customers in India and help them create a vision to execute plan.


You will partner closely with Sales, Product Management, Professional Services, Partners, and the executive team to shape customer strategy, position differentiated solutions, and demonstrate measurable business value.


This is a hands\-on presales role for an experienced Solution Consultant who can combine technical depth, industry understanding, and executive\-level communication. The successful candidate will be able to translate complex business challenges into compelling solution narratives, articulate the value of AI to CXO audiences, and connect ServiceNow capabilities to the industry processes that matter most to customers.

**What you get to do in this role:**


The Solution Consultant is a senior technical and business advisor with the ability to develop, position, and demonstrate differentiated solutions throughout the sales cycle while contributing to quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.

* Act as the technical, solution, and industry expert within a client\-facing sales team.
* Partner with Sales to shape account strategy, qualify opportunities, and develop compelling solution approaches.
* Lead discovery and solution workshops to understand customer priorities, industry processes, operational challenges, and desired business outcomes.
* Build and deliver differentiated solution demonstrations that clearly connect ServiceNow capabilities to customer needs and measurable value.
* Develop and communicate a compelling AI narrative for CXO audiences, explaining how AI can improve productivity, decision\-making, customer and employee experiences, operational efficiency, and business performance.
* Translate AI capabilities into practical industry use cases, clearly articulating the business value, adoption considerations, governance requirements, and expected outcomes.
* Demonstrate a strong understanding of relevant industry processes and identify opportunities to simplify, automate, and transform work across the enterprise.
* Engage confidently with business and technology executives, including CIOs, CTOs, CHROs, COOs, CISOs, and other senior stakeholders.
* Answer product, architecture, integration, security, AI, and technical questions from customers, partners, and ServiceNow colleagues.
* Provide feedback to Product Management on customer requirements, industry needs, competitive gaps, and potential product enhancements.
* Develop, share, and reuse best practices, industry narratives, demonstrations, and solution assets to improve the effectiveness of the wider Solution Consulting team.
* Stay current on AI developments, industry trends, competitive offerings, emerging technologies, and ServiceNow’s market differentiation.
* Support executive briefings, customer workshops, conferences, user groups, trade shows, and other strategic marketing activities.

  

**Qualifications** **To be successful in this role you have:**

* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* A minimum of 7 years of direct presales Solution Consulting or Sales Engineering experience in enterprise software or cloud technology.
* Demonstrated experience supporting complex enterprise sales cycles, from discovery and solution design through executive presentations, demonstrations, technical validation, and deal closure.
* The ability to develop and deliver compelling AI narratives to CXO audiences, clearly connecting AI capabilities to business priorities, operational outcomes, and measurable value.
* A practical understanding of how AI can be embedded into enterprise workflows, decision\-making, automation, and business processes.
* The ability to explain AI concepts in clear business language, including value, adoption, trust, governance, risk, and organisational impact.
* Strong knowledge of relevant industry processes, operating models, business challenges, and transformation priorities.
* The ability to connect technology capabilities to industry\-specific use cases and quantify the potential business impact.
* Strong executive communication, storytelling, presentation, and facilitation skills.
* The ability to engage effectively with both business and technical stakeholders and adapt the narrative for different audiences.
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or strong technical expertise in enterprise cloud software, workflow platforms, SaaS solutions, integrations, data, and AI.
* Experience collaborating with Sales, Product Management, Product Marketing, Partners, Customer Success, and Professional Services.
* Strong territory and opportunity management skills, including pipeline development, deal qualification, account planning, and close partnership with Sales.
* The ability to manage multiple priorities and operate effectively in complex, fast\-moving enterprise sales environments.
* Willingness to travel as required.

  

FD21

 **Additional Information** **Work Personas**


We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

**Accommodations**


We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

**Export Control Regulations**


For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.


From Fortune. ©2026 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

23a81605.title: Solutions Engineer - South
23a81605.description:
TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk.
   

  

 At TrendAI™, we’re always seeking exceptional talent; people who want to collaborate with the best and push boundaries together. Here, your work goes beyond building a career. You will help protect what matters and play a vital role in shaping a safer, more trustworthy AI\-powered future.
   

  

 AI Fearlessly.
   

  

**Solutions Engineer, Bangalore**
**About Trendai™**
 TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk. Trusted by the largest enterprises and governments across 185 countries, TrendAI™ secures the entire organization, from identities to infrastructure to data. AI Fearlessly. Learn more: trendaisecurity.com
   

  

**Solutions Engineer \- South**
**Position Overview**
 As a Pre\-Sales Engineer for the Trend AI Volume \& SMB team, you will be the primary technical advisor to prospects and partners throughout the sales cycle. You will translate customer security requirements into tailored Trend Micro solutions, deliver compelling product demonstrations and proofs of concept, and act as the technical bridge between sales, channel partners, and product teams to accelerate deal velocity across a high\-volume SMB pipeline.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Partner with account executives and channel partners to support the technical sales cycle for SMB and volume accounts, from discovery through close.
* Deliver product demonstrations, technical presentations, and proofs of concept (PoCs) showcasing Trend AI and the broader Trend Micro security portfolio.
* Conduct customer needs assessments and map security requirements to the right Trend Micro solution architecture and licensing model.
* Respond to RFPs/RFIs and prepare technical proposals, solution architectures, and sizing documents.
* Manage a high\-volume, fast\-paced pipeline of SMB opportunities, prioritizing effectively across multiple concurrent deals.
* Enable and train channel partners and resellers on Trend Micro solutions to improve their ability to sell and support independently.
* Serve as the voice of the customer to product and marketing teams, relaying feedback on product gaps, competitive positioning, and market trends.
* Stay current on the evolving cybersecurity threat landscape, competitive products, and Trend Micro's AI\-driven product roadmap.
* Support post\-sales handoff to ensure smooth onboarding and technical continuity for new customers.


**Required Qualifications**
* 5–6 years of overall experience in cybersecurity, with at least 2–3 years in a pre\-sales, sales engineering, or technical consulting role.
* Solid working knowledge of core security domains: endpoint security, network security, cloud security, email security, or XDR/SIEM.
* Hands\-on experience delivering product demos, PoCs, and technical presentations to technical and business stakeholders.
* Strong understanding of SMB and volume/channel sales motions, including working with resellers, distributors, and MSPs.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non\-technical audiences.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
* Willingness to travel within the Bangalore region for customer and partner meetings as needed.


**Secondry responsiblity**
* Prior experience with Trend Micro, or competing vendors (e.g., CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, Fortinet, Sophos, Microsoft Defender).
* Industry certifications such as CompTIA Security\+, CEH, CISSP, or vendor\-specific technical certifications.
* Familiarity with AI/ML\-driven security tooling and how AI is applied to threat detection and response.
* Experience working in a channel\-led or partner\-driven sales environment.
* Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and hybrid IT environments common among SMB customers.


**What We Offer**
* Opportunity to work at the intersection of AI and cybersecurity with a market\-leading global platform.
* A collaborative, fast\-paced team culture with strong career growth and enablement opportunities.
* Competitive compensation, benefits, and performance\-based incentives.


 TrendAI™ strives to build an environment of equity and inclusion, which reflects diverse points of view. We welcome, value, promote, and celebrate diversity – the very experiences and attributes that make us who we are, including but not limited to race, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identification, sexual orientation, level of ability, age, religion, veteran status, socio\-economic status, and political philosophy.
   

  

 We embrace change, empower people, and encourage innovation. Join Trend Micro and Thrive with us.

e8f43f5b.title: Pre-Sales Solution Architect – Networks
e8f43f5b.description:
**Role Description**
**Ideal candidate must have design experience with the following \-**
* Knowledge of different industry verticals, architectures and compliance requirements
* Routing and switching infrastructure deployment models (physical and VNF)
* Wireless (wifi 5, wifi6\) and private network IoT/5G deployment architectures
* Mandatory design experience required in at least two of the following SDN technologies:
+ SD\-WAN (Fortinet, Versa, Cisco, Palo Alto, Cato, Viptela, Silverpeak, VeloCloud)
+ SASE (Fortinet, Versa, Palo Alto, HPE, Cisco, Juniper)
+ SD\-ACCESS (Cisco, Juniper, Zscaler)
+ ACI (Cisco ACI)
+ NSX, WAN Optimizer, Load Balancers architecture and design

* Work with Sales/Account managers to engage in pre\-sales activity and propose creative ideas and solutions to customer needs
* High speed, Low latency network architecture
* Network Automation (AI/ML based auto\-ticket resolution) and Monitoring Tools, \- NPM, APM, IPAM, DDI
* Virtualization and Automation \- Understanding of Software Defined Network, Network Function Virtualization and intelligent WAN technologies
* SD\-WAN\-as\-a\-service model offerings. Good understanding of market leaders in SASE and Secure SD\-WAN service providers
* IT Service Management – Understanding of ITIL best practices,
* Identity and Access Management – Design and implementation of Cisco ACS, Cisco ISE, BYoD, Network Admission control, SDP
* Intent Based Self\-Healing Networks
* Azure, GCP, AWS Network architecture
* IP communications protocols, Enterprise Architectures, Video architectures
* Vertical industry experience in helping customers understand how technology and Architecture can solve their relevant business problems.


**The Responsibilities Includes \-**
* Work with customers and understand their setup, and analyze their deployments and come up with areas of weakness, enhancements
* Helps customers think through and define their IT strategy and resulting requirements as related to the industry challenges.
* Create use cases and solution architecture design for customer configuration/needs
* Can create conceptual and logical architectures for the solution. The solution might include infrastructure\-code, AI enabled network solutions and services
* Leads an effort whose goals are to craft and deliver business value justification, business requirements to technology architecture mapping, solution architecture \& integration, and organizational change management recommendations.
* Individual builds plans and coordinates implementations of the solution across cross\-technology (SDDC, SDN/DC/Collab) virtual delivery teams.
* Able to articulate this vision across Executives and senior Enterprise/Solution Architects.
* Create repeatable service offerings for specific domains such as SDN / Network Function Virtualization, security and applications
* Work with Sales/Account managers to engage in pre\-sales activity and propose creative ideas and solutions to customer needs
* Solution sizing, pricing, writing proposal documents, creating transition pans, leading defense presentations and optimizing proposals for BAFO
* Deliver technical and services workshop for Network offerings
* Work with other solution teams to create validated designs and other reference architectures
* Create technical and solution content


**Candidate Profile, Skills And Qualifications \-**
* 10\-15 years of solution architect experience in Architecture, Design, Build, Operate and Optimize
* Preferably a BS, MS degree in EE, computer science
* CCIE is a plus
* Ability to work closely with customers
* Strong verbal, written and presentation skills.
* Open and engaging collaboration style
* Ability to take initiative in virtual team efforts and influence technical and architectural directions
* Demonstrated technical ability when working with complex component(s) or whole product/platform
* Ability to work independently with very little supervision


**Skills**
 cloud infrastructure,client engagement,solution design,technical documentation,

* Answer product, architecture, integration, security, AI, and technical questions from customers, partners, and ServiceNow colleagues.
* Provide feedback to Product Management on customer requirements, industry needs, competitive gaps, and potential product enhancements.
* Develop, share, and reuse best practices, industry narratives, demonstrations, and solution assets to improve the effectiveness of the wider Solution Consulting team.
* Stay current on AI developments, industry trends, competitive offerings, emerging technologies, and ServiceNow’s market differentiation.
* Support executive briefings, customer workshops, conferences, user groups, trade shows, and other strategic marketing activities.


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* A minimum of 7 years of direct presales Solution Consulting or Sales Engineering experience in enterprise software or cloud technology.
* Demonstrated experience supporting complex enterprise sales cycles, from discovery and solution design through executive presentations, demonstrations, technical validation, and deal closure.
* The ability to develop and deliver compelling AI narratives to CXO audiences, clearly connecting AI capabilities to business priorities, operational outcomes, and measurable value.
* A practical understanding of how AI can be embedded into enterprise workflows, decision\-making, automation, and business processes.
* The ability to explain AI concepts in clear business language, including value, adoption, trust, governance, risk, and organisational impact.
* Strong knowledge of relevant industry processes, operating models, business challenges, and transformation priorities.
* The ability to connect technology capabilities to industry\-specific use cases and quantify the potential business impact.
* Strong executive communication, storytelling, presentation, and facilitation skills.
* The ability to engage effectively with both business and technical stakeholders and adapt the narrative for different audiences.
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or strong technical expertise in enterprise cloud software, workflow platforms, SaaS solutions, integrations, data, and AI.
* Experience collaborating with Sales, Product Management, Product Marketing, Partners, Customer Success, and Professional Services.
* Strong territory and opportunity management skills, including pipeline development, deal qualification, account planning, and close partnership with Sales.
* The ability to manage multiple priorities and operate effectively in complex, fast\-moving enterprise sales environments.
* Willingness to travel as required.


 FD21
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.

12ca1ad3.title: Technical Pre-Sales / GTM Solutions Engineer - Gen AI & Voice AI (Bengaluru)
12ca1ad3.description:
**Job Description: Technical Pre\-Sales / GTM Solutions**
 Engineer \- Voice AI
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru
   

  

 Team: Blue Machines
   

  

 Role Type: Full\-time
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for Voice AI Solutions / Pre\-Sales Engineer(s) to partner with our enterprise sales team in driving complex customer engagements. This role will act as the technical counterpart to account executives, supporting customer conversations, delivering customized demos, and addressing deep technical queries. The ideal candidate can bridge business and technical discussions, and translate enterprise requirements into Voice AI use cases, demo flows, and solution architectures.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Support enterprise sales teams in customer meetings, discovery sessions, and technical discussions
* Handle L2/L3 technical conversations with customer's business and engineering stakeholders
* Deliver customized demos aligned to customer workflows and industry use cases
* Design demo scenarios using prompting and conversation configuration
* Translate business requirements into Voice AI solution approaches and architectures
* Explain system architecture, integrations, data flows, and deployment models
* Support POCs and technical evaluations during enterprise sales cycles
* Enable sales teams with better technical positioning and product understanding


**What We're Looking For**
* Typically 3\-8 years of experience in client\-facing, consulting, customer success, product, implementation, account management, pre\-sales, or other solution\-oriented roles
* Strong communication skills and the ability to present ideas clearly and credibly to customers
* Comfort in understanding and explaining technical concepts such as workflows, integrations, APIs, system behavior, and solution architecture
* Hands\-on curiosity with AI tools, agents, prompting, bot building, or workflow platforms
* Ability to connect business requirements with practical solution thinking
* Collaborative mindset and willingness to work across teams to help move deals forward
* Interest in working with large enterprises and navigating complex stakeholder environments


**What May Help**
* Experience working with enterprise customers, especially in traditional or regulated industries such as BFSI
* Exposure to pre\-sales, consulting, implementation, or solutioning roles
* Familiarity with Voice AI, conversational AI, automation platforms, or enterprise software environments
* Engineering x business educational background


**Why Join Blue Machines**
* Work on cutting\-edge GenAI agents with real clients and impact
* Be part of a small, high\-ownership team shaping delivery from scratch
* High visibility and autonomy — your work directly impacts success
* Space to grow: shape rituals, tooling, and delivery culture from the ground up


**📬 How To Apply**
 Email careers@bluemachines.ai with your resume. You may include a short (\<1 min) video articulating why you're a good fit for this role.

3d9ca269.title: Senior Portfolio Solution Consultant
3d9ca269.description:
At NiCE, we don’t limit our challenges. We challenge our limits. Always. We’re ambitious. We’re game changers. And we play to win. We set the highest standards and execute beyond them. And if you’re like us, we can offer you the ultimate career opportunity that will light a fire within you.
   

  

**So, what’s the role all about?**
 NICE, the market leader in cloud\-based contact center technology, is looking for an experienced Solution Consultant to excite potential customers about its extensive portfolio and aid them in ultimately becoming a NICE customer. A successful Solution Consultant will work consultatively with prospects to identify their goals and business drivers, and creatively design a solution that will meet the ever\-growing demands of their contact center needs. This position will provide dedicated sales support to the Enterprise, BPO and SMB sales teams by exceeding the below expectations.
   

  

**How will you make an impact?** 
  

  

* Proactively identifying and addressing our customer's technical needs and objections to drive new sales, and existing account expansion.
* Actively learning and mastering the NICE software portfolio at an intermediate level, in order to creatively apply our technology to help our customers achieve their business goals.
* Critically evaluating the technical sustainability of each new sales opportunity or Request for Proposal, ensuring that our contractual obligations to each new customer are accurate, and can be delivered in a timely manner.
* Helping facilitate a smooth transition from pre\-sales to implementation by providing adequate knowledge transfer regarding the scope and requirements of the project, ensuring a seamless onboarding experience.
* Protecting NICE from projects where technical challenges outweigh the value of a technically problematic opportunity, and long\-term partnership.
* Assisting our Sales team through preparation and delivery of business discussions, technical presentations, and product demonstrations, by carefully mapping customer business requirements to effective value driven technical solutions leveraging the NICE software portfolio.
* Proactively identifying customer needs through a technical benefits assessment, carefully building the business value of the solution, in order to assist with overcoming potential objections to proposed technical solutions.
* Meeting with our prospective customers as a trusted technical advisor, developing a deep understanding of their current environment, key business challenges and goals, and helping prospective customers envision the benefits that can be realized through an advanced contact center deployment with NICE.
* Gathering valuable field data and product feedback from each customer engagement and working directly with Product Management to facilitate ideas for the long\-term technical direction and development of NICE’s software portfolio.
* Providing an open and continuous knowledge transfer to the overall Sales Team and newly hired SEs, highlighting the technical aspects and benefits of our solution, and how to competitively position each product.
* Delivering partner enablement activities, ranging from ad\-hoc updates to extended knowledge transfer sessions.
* Building and maintaining demo environments both for internal NICE usage and for our partners.
* Assisting in the preparation and response to customer RFP requests, carefully qualifying the prospective deal for technical feasibility.
* Scoping and building proofs of concept for prospective customers that require a hands\-on experience of NICE products, to confirm the required performance of the solution within their environment.
* Developing detailed solution design documentation for each new customer, which will serve as the foundation of our technical engagement, and act as a bridge to seamlessly engage our Professional Services Organization, to provide the most effective onboarding experience.
* Continuously building and maintaining relationships with key stakeholders in each sales cycle, including executive, financial, technical decision makers and influencers within each of our prospects.


**Have you got what it takes?** 
  

  

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT/Business Information Systems, Communications or related field or equivalent work experience required.
* Strong background \& experience in AI /GenAI\-powered Virtual Agent, Agent Assist, Agentic AI, Knowledge Management
* Good knowledge of CCaaS\- Omni\-channel/digital, Proactive, ACD/Dialer, IVR, CRM capabilities \& use\-cases
* Good Knowledge of contact center operations \& applications\- Workforce Engagement Management (Recording, Quality \& Performance Management, Workforce Management), Interaction Analytics \& Automation (RPA), Voice of the Customer (VoC)
* Basic knowledge of IP telephony, SIP trunk, WebRTC
* Basic knowledge of cloud security
* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills
* Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to effectively listen to quickly assess the situation and then convey thoughts and ideas in a clear and concise manner.
* Strong presentation skills – must possess the ability to sell and effectively build credibility in front of all levels of management, including an executive audience.
* Analytical and quantitative abilities required – Must be able to interpret and explain financial and statistical information.
* Min 12\+ years of Pre\- sales experience
* Ability to manage multiple competing priorities and work effectively under the pressure of time constraints in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment
* Experience with programming or scripting languages such as Java script or Python, and including use of REST APIs.
* Detail\-oriented, but able to digest the critical elements of a situation to withstand being hyper\-focused on the minutia.
* Ability to multi\-task in a challenging environment while maintaining a high level of ownership and responsiveness.


**What’s in it for you?** 
  

  

* Join an ever\-growing, market disrupting, global company where the teams – comprised of the best of the best – work in a fast\-paced, collaborative, and creative environment! As the market leader, every day at NiCE is a chance to learn and grow, and there are endless internal career opportunities across multiple roles, disciplines, domains, and locations. If you are passionate, innovative, and excited to constantly raise the bar, you may just be our next NiCEr!


**Enjoy NiCE\-FLEX!** 
  

  

 At NiCE, we work according to the NiCE\-FLEX hybrid model, which enables maximum flexibility: 2 days working from the office and 3 days of remote work, each week. Naturally, office days focus on face\-to\-face meetings, where teamwork and collaborative thinking generate innovation, new ideas, and a vibrant, interactive atmosphere.
   

  

**Requisition ID:** 
 10493
   

  

**Reporting into:** 
 Director, Portfolio Solution Engineering
   

  

**Role Type:** 
 Individual Contributor
   

  

**About NiCE**
*NICE Ltd. (NASDAQ: NICE) software products are used by 25,000\+ global businesses, including 85 of the Fortune 100 corporations, to deliver extraordinary customer experiences, fight financial crime and ensure public safety. Every day, NiCE software manages more than 120 million customer interactions and monitors 3\+ billion financial transactions.*
*Known as an innovation powerhouse that excels in AI, cloud and digital, NiCE is consistently recognized as the market leader in its domains, with over 8,500 employees across 30\+ countries.*
*NiCE is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, marital status, ancestry, neurotype, physical or mental disability, veteran status, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other category protected by law.*

70a74037.title: Pre Sales - IT techno-commercial Pre-Sales professional
70a74037.description:
**Purpose of the Role** 




 The Pre\-Sales Consultant acts as a strategic bridge between sales, delivery, and solution teams, translating customer business needs into tailored solutions and driving technology evaluations and serve as the key technical advisor and advocate for Impiger’s services and solutions.
 



 As the technical face of the sales team, the Pre\-Sales Consultant should be articulate, quick\-thinking, and adept at engaging with C\-level executives and decision\-makers. They must possess a deep understanding of technology landscapes, competitive differentiators, and enterprise solutioning while effectively leading a pre\-sales team to ensure successful business outcomes.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Solutioning \& Customer Engagement** 




 • Lead and drive solution discovery, scoping, and proposal creation for large\-scale enterprise opportunities.
 



 • Understand customer business requirements, identify pain points, and propose tailored solutions that
 



 align with their strategic vision.
 



 • Provide technical leadership in the pre\-sales process, ensuring the best\-fit solution architecture is
 



 proposed.
 



 • Develop and present compelling solution demonstrations, Proof\-of\-Concepts (PoCs), and business cases
 



 that showcase Impiger’s competitive edge.
 



 • Act as a trusted advisor to customers, guiding them through the technical decision\-making process.
 



  





**Team Leadership \& Coaching** 




 • Manage, mentor, and coach a team of pre\-sales consultants, fostering professional development and
 



 technical expertise.
 



 • Define pre\-sales best practices, ensuring consistency in solution presentations and technical assessments.
 



 • Drive knowledge\-sharing sessions, including market trends, competitor analysis, and evolving
 



 technology stacks.
 



  





**Collaboration \& Cross\-Functional Engagement** 




 • Work closely with the sales team, delivery teams, and product management to design and refine solutions
 



 based on evolving customer needs.
 



 • Engage with partners, system integrators, and third\-party vendors to enhance Impiger’s solution
 



 offerings.
 



 • Own and Lead to strategic RFP and tender responses, ensuring winning proposals through clear value
 



 articulation.
 



  





**Market Intelligence \& Industry Trends** 




 • Stay ahead of emerging technologies, industry trends, and competitor movements to position Impiger’s
 



 offerings effectively.
 



 • Participate in industry conferences, trade shows, and customer forums to strengthen Impiger’s market
 



 presence.
 



  





**Operational Excellence \& Reporting** 




 • Ensure pre\-sales KPIs are met, including deal win rates, proposal quality, and response time.
 



 • Maintain detailed documentation on client interactions, solution architectures, and lessons learned.
 



 • Standardize pre\-sales processes to optimize efficiency and alignment with sales and delivery teams.
 



**Skills \& Requirements** 




 • 7 to 10 years of experience in pre\-sales, solution architecture, or technical consulting in the IT industry.
 



 • Proven experience leading and managing a pre\-sales team, including coaching and performance
 



 management.
 



 • Strong expertise in Web, Mobile, and Cloud solutions, with experience in large enterprise solutioning.
 



 • Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels.
 



 • Experience in handling large\-scale RFPs, tender processes, and high\-value sales cycles.
 



 • Deep understanding of B2B and enterprise sales methodologies, particularly in BFSI, Manufacturing, or
 



 Education sectors.
 



 • Self\-motivated leader with a strategic mindset and a passion for technology\-driven solutions.
 



 • Experience in the BFSI and Healthcare domains is good to have.
 



**Preferred (Not Essential)** 




 • Prior experience working in large enterprises or consulting organizations.
 



 • Familiarity with AI/ML, IoT, or emerging technologies in enterprise solutions.

b65828df.title: Presales Specialist
b65828df.description:
**Company Description** 
 Rajneethi is a political and governance consulting firm that has been operating since 2012, serving clients across democracies from India to Africa and Australia. The firm is known for its ability to accurately measure public opinion using advanced qualitative research, AI\-based sampling, quantitative analysis, and focused group discussions. Rajneethi also leverages flash polls, robust technology infrastructure, and extensive data repositories to model scenarios and understand voter sentiment in detail. These capabilities enable Rajneethi to deliver critical insights that support leaders, candidates, and parties in making informed decisions at every stage of their campaigns and governance initiatives.
 



**Role Description** 
 The Presales Specialist role at Rajneethi is a full\-time, on\-site position based in Bengaluru. The Presales Specialist will work closely with consulting and sales teams to understand client requirements, analyze political and governance contexts, and prepare tailored proposals and presentations. Daily responsibilities include supporting solution design, demonstrating Rajneethi’s research and analytics capabilities, responding to RFIs and RFPs, and collaborating with internal teams to translate client needs into actionable offerings. The role also involves engaging with prospective clients, addressing queries, providing product and service information, and maintaining accurate presales documentation and reports to support business development activities.
 



**Qualifications** 



* Candidates should possess strong Analytical Skills to interpret data, assess client needs, and support scenario modeling and solution design.
* Candidates should possess excellent Communication skills to present complex insights clearly, engage with clients, and collaborate with internal stakeholders.
* Candidates should possess Consulting and Presales skills to understand client challenges, craft value propositions, and contribute to proposal and pitch development.
* Candidates should possess Customer Service skills to respond to client inquiries, manage expectations, and build long\-term professional relationships.
* Relevant qualifications such as a bachelor’s or master’s degree in business, political science, public policy, data analytics, or a related field are beneficial.
* Experience in presales, business development, or consulting, preferably in research, analytics, governance, or political consulting domains, is an advantage.
* Proficiency with presentation tools, CRM or sales enablement platforms, and comfort working with data and research outputs will be valuable.
* Experience in Government liaisoning and B2B or B2C Services.

daedd1ac.title: Tender Pre-sales
daedd1ac.description:
**About the Company** 




  





 Unthinkable Solutions is seeking a sharp, commercially aware Business Consultant to anchor our Government Pre\-Sales practice. This role sits at the intersection of bid strategy, solution consulting, and client engagement— responsible for converting government tender opportunities into qualified, compliant, and compelling submissions that win. You will be the engine behind our end\-to\-end bid cycle, from opportunity discovery on GeM and CPPP portals to post\-submission clarification and reverse auction support. The ideal profile combines the rigour of a Business Analyst with the persuasive craft of a Proposal Writer and the strategic instinct of a Solutions Consultant. You will work directly with delivery leads, architects, legal, and finance teams to orchestrate responses that are technically credible, commercially sound, and fully compliant with government procurement norms — including CERT\-In, NIC, and DPDP\-aligned requirements.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 Business Consultant – Pre\-Sales Government Tenders \& Enterprise Bid Management
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Tender Discovery \& Bid Strategy
* Help Business Development team to identify relevant opportunities from GeM, CPPP, eProcure, state portals, and tender aggregators across IT services, software, and digital transformation verticals.
* Conduct structured bid/no\-bid analysis — evaluating eligibility criteria, competitive landscape, margin potential, delivery risk, and strategic fit before committing resources.
* Build and maintain a live tender pipeline tracker with status, timelines, evaluation weights, and internal ownership.
* Coordinate pre\-EMD and document verification with legal and finance for time\-bound portal submissions.
* RFP / RFI / RFQ Interpretation \& Requirement Breakdown
* Perform deep\-dive analysis of tender documents — dissecting scope of work, technical specifications, eligibility criteria, SLAs, evaluation matrices (technical \+ financial), and commercial terms.
* Translate complex government procurement language into structured internal briefs for solutioning, architecture, and delivery teams.
* Flag ambiguities, contradictions, and compliance risks early.
* Prepare pre\-bid clarification queries for portal submission.
* Attend or coordinate pre\-bid meetings, client walkthroughs, and technical clarification sessions.
* Proposal Creation — Technical, Functional \& Compliance
* Own end\-to\-end proposal development: executive summary, technical approach, solution architecture narrative, team credentials, CVs, past performance, and compliance checklists.
* Prepare compliance/deviation matrices, BOQ/BOM, SLA response sheets, and annexures with precision and zero ambiguity.
* Structure technical write\-ups in alignment with Government of India standards (GIGW, WCAG etc).
* Collaborate with solution architects and SMEs to build response content that is technically defensible and client\-facing in quality.
* Solutioning Support
* Participate actively in solutioning workshops — contributing to functional and technical solution design for RFP\-specific requirements.
* Understanding of solution architecture elements (cloud, API integrations, AI/ML components, infra) in business\-friendly language within proposals.
* Support effort estimation and resource planning in partnership with delivery leads and architects.
* Develop client\-ready presentation decks and demo scripts for pre\-bid presentations or client visits.
* Stakeholder Coordination \& Governance
* Drive internal bid governance — bid kick\-off, review gates, sign\-off workflows, and final submission coordination across teams.
* Align commercial and delivery stakeholders on scope boundaries, assumptions, and exclusions before submission.
* Maintain a RACI\-driven bid calendar ensuring zero missed deadlines across pre\-bid queries, EMD submission, and proposal upload.
* Post\-Submission Support
* Manage post\-submission queries, clarification requests from government clients, and negotiation support.
* Support reverse auction preparation — pricing floors, competitive intelligence, and real\-time strategy inputs.
* Capture bid outcomes, win/loss learnings, and incorporate insights into content library and future strategy.
* Content \& Knowledge Management
* Build and maintain a reusable proposal content library — boilerplate responses, credential write\-ups, architecture diagrams, compliance templates, and case studies.
* Standardise proposal templates across government and enterprise bid types for consistency and turnaround speed.
* Contribute to account intelligence — identify upsell/cross\-sell triggers in existing government accounts.



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field.
* MBA / PGDM in Strategy, Marketing, or Business Analytics is a plus.



  





**Required Skills** 




  




* Core Consulting \& Analytics
* Technical Fluency
* Tools \& Portals
* RFP / RFI / EOI interpretation
* Familiar with Web and Mobile Technologies
* GeM Portal (Buyer \& Seller journeys)
* Bid/No\-bid analysis \& risk flagging
* API / integration concepts
* CPPP (Central Public Procurement Portal)
* Structured proposal writing
* AI / ML solution articulation
* State eProcurement Portals
* Commercial awareness \& pricing logic
* SaaS, PaaS, custom dev models
* Tender aggregators (MSTC, e\-Procurement)
* Stakeholder management \& coordination (advanced)
* Requirement elicitation (BRD, FRD)
* CRM tools
* Proposal tools \& content libraries
* Competitor \& market research
* SDLC \& project delivery fundamentals
* AI Tools (Claude, Lovable etc)

e3746fa6.title: Solutions Architect
e3746fa6.description:
**Job Description** 




  





**Solution Architect — Agentic AI, India \& APAC** 




  





*Company: Intellect Design Arena \| Platform: Purple Fabric (Agentic AI) \|Region: India \& APAC \| Reports into the GTM organization, paired with the GTM Lead* 




  





**About the Role** 




  





 This role is the technical build engine behind every Purple Fabric engagement in India \& APAC. Where the GTM Lead owns the relationship, the narrative, and the deal, this person owns the proof — the architecture, the working demo, the PoC that actually runs. They pair with the GTM Lead on every priority account: in the room for the CXO story, then straight into the technical session to design the solution live, answer architecture questions with authority, and build what was just promised.
 



 The scope spans the full engagement, not just one slice of it:
 **platform conversations** 
 — what Purple Fabric is, how it's architected, its roadmap and capabilities — and
 **use\-case conversations** 
 — how it solves this specific client's business problem. This is a full agentic AI engagement owner, not a narrow demo\-builder.
 



**The bar is hands\-on:** 
 comfortable configuring agents, wiring integrations, standing up a working PoC environment, and running a full\-day technical bootcamp with a client's engineering team. This isn't a solo\-operator role — they'll have a technical team around them on each engagement — but they need to be able to step in and build hands\-on themselves, set the technical direction, and unblock the team rather than only design on paper and delegate.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Bootcamp \& Workshop Delivery** 



* **Design \& Run Bootcamps:** 
 Own end\-to\-end design and delivery of technical discovery bootcamps, use\-case identification workshops, and hands\-on hackathons with client technical teams — not just facilitate, but build live in the room.
* **Value Mapping:** 
 Translate a client's operational pain points into a concrete, technically grounded use\-case backlog during discovery, with enough architectural detail that it's buildable, not aspirational.
* **Client Technical Onboarding:** 
 Lead technical orientation sessions for client and partner engineering teams post\-sign\-off, ensuring a clean handover into delivery.



  





**Solution Architecture \& Hands\-On Build** 




  




* **PoC \& Demo Build:** 
 Personally build and configure working PoCs and demo use cases on Purple Fabric — agent orchestration, integrations, data connections — tailored to each account's real use case rather than a generic script.
* **Platform Conversations:** 
 Represent Purple Fabric directly to client technical stakeholders — architecture, roadmap, capabilities, and how it compares to alternative approaches — with full authority, not a scripted overview.
* **Use\-Case Conversations:** 
 Lead deep\-dive conversations that map a client's specific business processes to a concrete Purple Fabric solution design, working the problem live with their teams rather than presenting a pre\-built answer.
* **Architecture Ownership:** 
 Design solution architectures (as\-is and to\-be), integration patterns, and data flows, and defend them directly with client architects and security teams.
* **Technical Objection Handling:** 
 Own the technical Q\&A in evaluations — model behavior, guardrails, evaluation frameworks, data privacy, integration effort — without routing to a separate SME.
* **Team Direction:** 
 Direct the engineers assigned to each engagement — splitting up build work, unblocking them technically, and staying hands\-on personally where it matters — while retaining ownership of architecture decisions and client\-facing accountability.



  





**Partnership with the GTM Lead** 




  




* **Joint Account Ownership:** 
 Work in close partnership with the GTM Lead across every priority engagement in the region — present together, plan together, and jointly own the outcome of the deal.
* **Deal Support On Demand:** 
 Be deployable across accounts as engagements require, prioritising by deal stage and strategic importance in coordination with the GTM Lead.
* **Feedback Into Product:** 
 Channel recurring technical objections, gaps, and client asks back into the Purple Fabric product and solutions teams.



  





**Pre\-Sales Asset \& Accelerator Development** 




  




* **Reusable Accelerators:** 
 Build and maintain a library of demo use cases, reference architectures, and technical accelerators that cut down PoC turnaround time across the region.
* **Technical Documentation:** 
 Maintain architecture diagrams, integration guides, and technical FAQs as part of the regional Sales Kit.
* **Partner Technical Enablement:** 
 Train partner technical teams to deploy and configure Purple Fabric independently, raising the ceiling on partner\-led delivery.
* **RFP Support:** 
 Own the technical sections of RFP/RFQ submissions — architecture responses, solution fit, and technical Q\&A — working alongside the GTM Lead to keep submissions accurate and credible.



  





**Technical Governance \& Quality** 




  




* **Consistency Across Engagements:** 
 Ensure architecture and solutioning quality stays consistent across accounts and, as the function grows, across other solution architects in the region.
* **Best Practice \& Reuse:** 
 Push the region toward reusable, proven patterns over one\-off custom builds for every deal.
* **Mentorship:** 
 Coach junior technical resources on hands\-on build skills and client\-facing technical delivery.



  





**Ideal Candidate Profile** 




  





**Must\-Have** 



* **8\+ years** 
 in a hands\-on solution architecture, pre\-sales engineering, or technical consulting role — with real, personal build experience, not just design authority delegated to a delivery team.
* **Hands\-on agentic AI build experience is mandatory:** 
 direct, personal experience building with multi\-agent frameworks or autonomous workflow orchestration — not only traditional ML or analytics tooling. Candidates without real agentic build experience will not meet the bar for this role.
* **Demonstrated hands\-on build ability:** 
 can personally configure, integrate, and demo a working system rather than only whiteboard one.
* **Comfortable directing a small technical pod:** 
 experience leading or coordinating a small team of engineers on a fast\-moving build, splitting work and staying hands\-on personally rather than purely delegating.
* **Bootcamp / workshop delivery experience:** 
 has run technical discovery sessions or hackathons directly with client engineering teams, not just supported them.
* **Technical range:** 
 working fluency across agent orchestration, RAG, LLM evaluation/guardrails, APIs and integration architectures, and enterprise data/security considerations.



  





**Strongly Preferred** 




  




* Prior experience working in close partnership with a GTM or presales lead on enterprise deals, including regulated industries such as BFSI, insurance, or wealth management.



  





**Also Important** 



* **Regional Exposure:** 
 Familiarity with enterprise technology landscapes across India and the broader APAC region.
* **Communication:** 
 Comfortable running a room of client engineers for a full day, and equally comfortable presenting architecture to a CTO in ten minutes.
* **Travel \& Flexibility:** 
 Willing to be deployed across accounts and geographies within the region as deal priorities shift.

3278be2a.title: Technical solutions Engineer
3278be2a.description: * Customer\-Focused Solutions : Work closely with customers to understand their energy needs and suggest solar solutions that are both technically sound and valuable for them.

a645c922.title: Technical Solutions Specialist
a645c922.description:
**About NowPurchase**




**Building the future of Metal Manufacturing!** 




 NowPurchase is transforming the
 **$140B metal manufacturing industry** 
 the backbone of infrastructure, transportation, and industrial growth. We are building Indias most trusted digital procurement platform for metal manufacturers while creating an operating system that makes procurement
 **smarter, faster, and autonomous** 
 .We are a growing team of
 **150\+ professionals** 
 with a strong PAN India presence, supported by 2 registered offices, 7 warehouses, and 2 Processing unit centers, enabling seamless nationwide operations.Having worked with
 **250\+ foundries across India** 
 , were now scaling aggressivelyacross regions, products, and value\-added solutions. Our momentum has been recognized globally and nationally, including:
 


* **Financial Times High\-Growth Companies Asia\-Pacific (2024 \& 2025\)**
* **Indias first\-ever ESOP buyback by a B2B commerce startup (2024\)**
* **Innovative Startup of the Year Eastern Leadership Awards 2025**
* **Dun \& Bradstreet Startup50 Award**
* **Deloitte Technology Fast 50, India (2025\)**



  





**Why this role matters?**




 This is not a transactional sales role. You will
 **own customer growth** 
 , build long\-term relationships with foundries, and drive adoption of

 Address quality complaints, collaborate with Sales and Business Development teams on pricing strategies, and provide technical support to customers, demonstrating cost savings via MetalCloud software.

 roles

 engineering.

 companies. Strong negotiation, relationship\-building, and problem\-solving skills

75fc2028.title: Lead Engineer, FinOps
75fc2028.description:
We are looking for a highly skilled FinOps \& Cloud Optimization Lead to bridge the gap between engineering excellence and financial efficiency in cloud operations. This role combines deep expertise in DevOps, Cloud Engineering, and FinOps to design, implement, and govern cloud operations frameworks that drive agility, reliability, security, and cost optimization across multi\-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, and GCP).
  
Responsibilities


* Lead cloud cost management and optimization initiatives using Apptio Cloudability and FinOps best practices
* Design and implement scalable, secure, and automated cloud infrastructure using Terraform, CloudFormation, and Bicep
* Architect and optimize CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab, or Azure DevOps
* Establish cloud financial governance frameworks including showback, chargeback, budgeting, forecasting, and cost allocation
* Analyze cloud spend and recommend optimization opportunities through rightsizing, Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, auto\-scaling, and resource scheduling
* Implement containerization and orchestration strategies using Docker and Kubernetes (EKS/AKS/GKE)
* Develop cloud cost dashboards, reporting, anomaly detection, and budget monitoring solutions
* Collaborate with Finance, Engineering, Product, and Cloud Operations teams to align cloud investments with business objectives
* Drive DevSecOps, SRE, observability, and automation best practices across cloud environments

Requirements


* 6–10 years of experience in DevOps, CloudOps, Platform Engineering, Cloud Architecture, or FinOps, with hands\-on experience in cloud cost management and optimization
* Mandatory hands\-on experience with Apptio Cloudability and/or Apptio FinOps solutions
* Strong experience with AWS, Azure, and/or GCP cloud platforms
* Expertise in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, ARM/Bicep) and CI/CD tools
* Deep understanding of cloud billing models, cost allocation, budgeting, forecasting, and optimization techniques
* Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud\-native architectures
* Proficiency in Python, Bash, or PowerShell scripting and automation
* Strong analytical, stakeholder management, and communication skills
* FinOps Certified Practitioner (FCP) and cloud certifications (AWS/Azure/GCP) are preferred

0c9036ab.title: Senior Microsoft Cloud Engineer
0c9036ab.description:
**This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Senior Microsoft Cloud Engineer based in India.**
 This role offers the opportunity to design, maintain, and improve enterprise Microsoft cloud environments within a technology\-focused organization. You will be responsible for supporting critical infrastructure, optimizing cloud services, and driving automation across Microsoft platforms. The position combines hands\-on engineering, troubleshooting, security practices, and continuous improvement initiatives. You will work with modern Microsoft technologies including Microsoft 365, Azure, Intune, and Entra ID while collaborating with technical teams to deliver reliable solutions. This is an ideal opportunity for an experienced cloud engineer who enjoys solving complex infrastructure challenges and improving operational efficiency. Your expertise will directly contribute to the stability, security, and scalability of enterprise digital services.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Administer and support Microsoft 365 services, including Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint Online, and OneDrive.
* Manage users, groups, licenses, roles, permissions, and access configurations across Microsoft environments.
* Maintain Microsoft Intune by configuring policies, device profiles, application protection, software deployments, and device enrollment processes.
* Administer Microsoft Entra ID, including Conditional Access policies, Multi\-Factor Authentication, Enterprise Applications, and Role\-Based Access Control.
* Support Azure infrastructure and compute resources, including Virtual Machines, networking, backups, monitoring, and Log Analytics.
* Perform infrastructure monitoring, troubleshooting, incident analysis, and resource planning to ensure reliable service delivery.
* Automate administrative tasks, reporting, and operational workflows using PowerShell.
* Investigate incidents, analyze audit logs, and collaborate with Microsoft Support when required.
* Document technical solutions, configurations, and operational procedures to maintain accurate knowledge resources.
* Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives focused on security, automation, and cloud infrastructure optimization.


**Requirements**
* Proven experience administering Microsoft 365, Intune, Entra ID, and Azure environments within an enterprise setting.
* Strong practical knowledge of Azure Virtual Machines, networking concepts, backup solutions, and monitoring capabilities.
* Confident experience using PowerShell for automation, administration, and reporting.
* Hands\-on troubleshooting experience with Microsoft 365 and Azure services.
* Strong understanding of identity, access management, and cloud security principles.
* Ability to analyze complex technical issues and provide effective solutions independently.
* Strong documentation skills and a structured approach to technical operations.
* English proficiency at B1\+/B2 level or higher.
* Experience working with Microsoft Defender, Hybrid Exchange, Active Directory, Entra Connect, ADFS, PKI, Azure DevOps, or Terraform is considered an advantage.
* Previous experience supporting large\-scale enterprise Microsoft 365 environments is a plus.


**Benefits**
* Flexible working model with the option to work remotely or from an office environment.
* Remote onboarding process designed to support a smooth start.
* Performance\-based bonuses, offered annually or quarterly depending on the role.
* Access to professional development opportunities, internal learning resources, partner training programs, and company libraries.
* Health and life insurance coverage.
* Wellbeing initiatives and access to corporate psychological support.
* Mobile communication expense reimbursement.
* Opportunity to work with modern cloud technologies and contribute to impactful enterprise solutions.


**How Jobgether Works**
 We use an
 **AI\-powered matching process** 
 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

**Data Privacy Notice:** 
 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

aff51dda.title: AI/ML Solutions Architect - PostgreSQL
aff51dda.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
This role is responsible for architecting and designing advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions, leveraging a broad suite of data engineering and modeling technologies. The position drives strategic technical decisions, guides teams in implementing scalable AI/ML systems, and ensures alignment with organizational standards and client requirements. They play a pivotal role in integrating modern data platforms and delivering innovative solutions that address complex business challenges.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1\. Architect end\-to\-end AI/ML solutions using Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit\-learn, ensuring robust model development and deployment frameworks.
  
2\. Design scalable data pipelines and real\-time processing systems utilizing Apache Spark, Kafka, and PostgreSQL to support machine learning workflows.
  
3\. Guide the team in implementing advanced ML models, including deep learning, NLP, and time series forecasting, using tools such as XGBoost, LightGBM, and Spark MLlib.
  
4\. Oversee integration of data engineering platforms like Apache Airflow, DataBricks, and RabbitMQ to optimize data ingestion, transformation, and orchestration for AI/ML projects.
  
5\. Ensure technical excellence by advocating best practices in model validation, performance optimization, and reproducibility across Python, R, and SQL\-based environments.
  
6\. Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements, translate business needs into technical specifications, and deliver tailored AI/ML solutions that meet quality and compliance standards.
  
7\. Mentor and coach team members in advanced AI/ML concepts, fostering continuous learning and adoption of emerging technologies within the skill cluster.
  
8\. Architect and implement RESTful API integrations to enable seamless communication between AI/ML components and external systems, ensuring scalable, secure, and efficient data exchange across diverse enterprise environments.
  
Skill Requirements
  
1\. Expert Proficiency In Ai/Ml Model Development, Including Classical Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Nlp, And Time Series Forecasting.
  
2\. Excellent Knowledge Of Python, R, Sql, And Bash For Data Analysis, Modeling, And Automation.
  
3\. Expertlevel Experience With Tensorflow, Pytorch, Scikitlearn, Pandas, Numpy, Xgboost, Lightgbm, And Spark Mllib For Building And Deploying Models.
  
4\. Advanced Proficiency In Designing And Managing Data Pipelines Using Apache Spark, Kafka, Airflow, Databricks, And Rabbitmq.
  
5\. Excellent Understanding Of Relational Databases Such As Postgresql And Mysql For Data Storage And Retrieval.
  
6\. Strong Ability To Translate Business Requirements Into Technical Solutions And Deliver Highcomplexity Ai/Ml Architectures.
  
  

Other Requirements

2\. Google Professional Machine Learning Engineer

Job Title: IT Architect

Through our strong partners we distribute financial products on B2C, B2B2C and B2B models for different business lines. Depending on the experience, the architects will contribute as well to help a solution architect to prepare deliverables of an IT project validation committee (architecture diagrams, etc). This role is part of the architecture team which is a transversal team working in all SET managed applications or participating in projects for PF Corporate (DevSecOps, IT evolution in business projects)
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Direct Responsibilities:
   

  

 IT Architect oversees complex IT evolutions on applications oriented to ensure alignment with BNPP group business and IT strategy. The role designs, guide implementation and/or implement changes on applications for make them secure, scalable, observable, modular and resilient according to BNPP standards and technological roadmaps.
   

  

* Maintenance of the defined architecture, technological alignment, developmentstandardsand norms

**Contributing Responsibilities**

 Technical \& Behavioral Competencies
   

  

 Technical Skills

* Expertisein modern application architecture, including cloud\-native, microservices, and event\-driven design.

* Frontend frameworks: Angular/React or Blazor

* IBM Cloud

**Other Skills**
 Skills Referential (Required knowledge, skills and abilities)
   

  

* Agilemethodologyexposure
* Knowledge of banking products isa niceto have
* Proactive mindset
* Business / IT relationship (including IT OPS)


**Behavioral Skills**
* Ability to managea programand projects.
* Analytical ability, Detail\-oriented.
* Ability to adopt\& promotean Agile Mindset.
* Problem solving.
* Relationship building.

* Ability to collaborate/Teamwork.
