 Location: Chennai
   

  

**About BNP Paribas Group**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. It operates in 65 countries and has nearly 185,000 employees, including more than 145,000 in Europe. The Group has key positions in its three main fields of activity: Commercial, Personal Banking \& Services for the Group’s commercial \& personal banking and several specialized businesses including BNP Paribas Personal Finance and Arval; Investment \& Protection Services for savings, investment, and protection solutions; and Corporate \& Institutional Banking, focused on corporate and institutional clients. Based on its strong diversified and integrated model, the Group helps all its clients (individuals, community associations, entrepreneurs, SMEs, corporates and institutional clients) to realize their projects through solutions spanning financing, investment, savings and protection insurance. In Europe, BNP Paribas has four domestic markets: Belgium, France, Italy, and Luxembourg. The Group is rolling out its integrated commercial \& personal banking model across several Mediterranean countries, Turkey, and Eastern Europe. As a key player in international banking, the Group has leading platforms and business lines in Europe, a strong presence in the Americas as well as a solid and fast\-growing business in Asia\-Pacific. BNP Paribas has implemented a Corporate Social Responsibility approach in all its activities, enabling it to contribute to the construction of a sustainable future, while ensuring the Group's performance and stability.
   

  

**About BNP Paribas India Solutions**
 Established in 2005, BNP Paribas India Solutions is a wholly owned subsidiary of BNP Paribas SA, European Union’s leading bank with an international reach. With delivery centers located in Bengaluru, Chennai and Mumbai, we are a 24x7 global delivery center. India Solutions services three business lines: Corporate and Institutional Banking, Investment Solutions and Retail Banking for BNP Paribas across the Group. Driving innovation and growth, we are harnessing the potential of over 10000 employees, to provide support and develop best\-in\-class solutions.
   

  

 Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 At BNP Paribas, we passionately embrace diversity and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all employees are valued, respected and can bring their authentic selves to work. We prohibit Discrimination and Harassment of any kind and our policies promote equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants, irrespective of, but not limited to their gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, ethnicity, race, colour, national origin, age, religion, social status, mental or physical disabilities, veteran status etc. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in.

1c157d0e.title: Senior Architect
1c157d0e.description:
**Designation:** 
 Senior Architect, Demo Engineering
 



**Why should you choose us?** 




 Rakuten Symphony is reimagining telecom, changing supply chain norms and disrupting outmoded thinking that threatens the industry’s pursuit of rapid innovation and growth. Based on proven modern infrastructure practices, its open interface platforms make it possible to launch and operate advanced mobile services in a fraction of the time and cost of conventional approaches, with no compromise to network quality or security. Rakuten Symphony has operations in Japan, the United States, Singapore, India, South Korea, Europe, and the Middle East Africa region. For more information, visit: https://symphony.rakuten.com.
 



  





 Building on the technology Rakuten used to launch Japan’s newest mobile network, we are taking our mobile offering global.
 



  





 To support our ambitions to provide an innovative cloud\-native telco platform for our customers, Rakuten Symphony is looking to recruit and develop top talent from around the globe. We are looking for individuals to join our team across all functional areas of our business – from sales to engineering, support functions to product development.
 



  





 Let’s build the future of mobile telecommunications together!
 



  





 About Rakuten Group, Inc. (TSE: 4755\) is a global leader in internet services that empower individuals, communities, businesses and society. Founded in Tokyo in 1997 as an online marketplace, Rakuten has expanded to offer services in e\-commerce, fintech, digital content and communications to 2 billion members around the world. The Rakuten Group has over 30,000 employees, and operations in 30 countries and regions. For more information visit https://global.rakuten.com/corp/.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are hiring a Senior Demo Architect to help turn complex telecom transformation ideas into working demonstrations, proof\-of\-value scenarios and customer\-ready solution stories. This role sits at the intersection of Telco OSS, RAN operations, RIC/SMO concepts, cloud\-native platforms, automation and AI\-enabled operations.
 



  





 The ideal candidate is hands\-on enough to build credible demo flows, analytical enough to work with real or synthetic operator data, and customer\-facing enough to support strategic presales conversations. This is not a presentation\-only role. It requires someone who can understand an operator pain point, shape a relevant use case, build or adapt the demo environment, and explain the value clearly to both technical and executive stakeholders.
 



  





 The person in this role will work closely with sales, solution architecture, product, engineering and customer\-facing teams to support strategic accounts, executive briefings, technical workshops, proof\-of\-concept activities and major customer demonstrations.
 



  





**Role Mission** 




 The mission of this role is to make advanced telecom automation and intelligent operations feel real, practical and achievable for customers. The role should help customers move from general interest in AI, automation and cloud\-native OSS toward concrete understanding of how these capabilities can reduce operational friction, improve network performance, accelerate troubleshooting and support the journey toward more autonomous operations.
 



  





**Primary Responsibilities** 



* Design and maintain high\-quality demo environments for OSS automation, assurance, observability, RAN intelligence, RIC/SMO\-related scenarios and AI\-assisted operations.
* Build realistic use cases using product capabilities, APIs, dashboards, workflows, network data, synthetic data and customer\-provided inputs where available.
* Support strategic presales engagements by translating customer challenges into credible demo stories and proof\-of\-value flows.
* Work with operators to understand gaps in their current operational model, data landscape, OSS tooling and automation maturity.
* Create reusable demo assets, data sets, scripts, dashboards, architecture diagrams, solution narratives and customer\-specific demo journeys.
* Partner with product and engineering teams to turn market feedback into stronger use cases, clearer demos and sharper roadmap input.



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 1\. Demo engineering and environment ownership
 


* Own the day\-to\-day quality, readiness and continuous improvement of demo environments used for customer meetings, executive briefings, events and internal enablement.
* Build end\-to\-end demo flows that connect OSS, RAN, cloud infrastructure, data platforms, automation workflows and AI\-driven insights into one coherent operational story.
* Create demo scenarios that show the operational journey before and after automation, including faster detection, better triage, improved visibility, safer change execution and more consistent actioning.
* Maintain demo scripts, setup guides, dependencies, data assumptions and reset procedures so demonstrations are repeatable and reliable.
* Make demos visually clear, technically credible and grounded in real operator operating models rather than generic feature walkthroughs.



 2\. State\-of\-the\-art telecom use\-case development
 


* Prototype differentiated use cases in areas such as intelligent assurance, anomaly detection, root\-cause analysis, predictive maintenance, closed\-loop automation, RAN optimization and energy efficiency.
* Build practical RIC/SMO\-aligned scenarios involving rApps, xApps, policies, KPIs, events, topology data, performance counters and automation workflows.
* Explore AI\-enabled operations use cases, including AI\-assisted incident triage, recommendation engines, natural\-language operational assistants and policy\-aware automation support.
* Connect technical capabilities to measurable operator value, such as MTTR reduction, lower manual effort, fewer avoidable escalations, reduced truck rolls, better SLA performance and OPEX efficiency.
* Balance innovation with credibility by avoiding science\-project demos that are impressive but unrealistic for operator environments.



 3\. Strategic presales and customer engagement
 


* Support customer discovery sessions, technical workshops, innovation discussions, executive briefings and proof\-of\-value planning for strategic accounts.
* Help account teams understand customer pain points across network operations, service assurance, RAN performance, cloud operations, change management, data fragmentation and automation maturity.
* Translate customer requirements into demo scope, use\-case flows, technical architecture, success criteria and proof\-of\-value plans.
* Demonstrate solutions using customer context, including sanitized data, dummy data, simulated network events, representative KPIs or customer\-provided data when approved.
* Contribute to RFI/RFP responses, technical proposals and customer presentations where deeper solution credibility is needed.



 4\. Data\-driven demonstrations and proof of value
 


* Work with alarms, counters, KPIs, logs, events, traces, topology, inventory, configuration data, tickets and historical incident data.
* Create realistic synthetic data sets when customer data is not available, with enough fidelity to support meaningful telecom operational scenarios.
* Build dashboards, visualizations and workflow views that make the problem, insight, action and business value easy to understand.
* Help define proof\-of\-value success metrics and validation steps for customer engagements.
* Partner with customer teams and internal stakeholders to show how the solution could fit into the customer environment, not just a lab environment.



 5\. Cross\-functional enablement
 


* Create reusable demo packs, talk tracks, demo guides, customer journey maps, architecture diagrams and use\-case documentation.
* Train sales, presales and solution teams on how to position and demonstrate key capabilities.
* Provide structured feedback to product management and engineering based on customer reactions, competitive gaps and demo limitations.
* Support marketing, analyst briefings and industry showcases with strong demonstration narratives and credible technical examples.
* Act as a bridge between customer needs, product capabilities and commercial priorities.



  





**Required Experience** 



* 8\-15 years of experience in telecom solution engineering, demo engineering, presales, solution architecture, OSS/RAN engineering, cloud platforms, automation or network operations.
* Technically deep enough to earn credibility with OSS, RAN, cloud and data teams.
* Strong understanding of telecom operator environments, especially network operations, service assurance, observability, incident management, change management, RAN operations and automation workflows.
* Hands\-on experience building or configuring technical demos, proof\-of\-concepts, lab environments, customer workshops or solution prototypes.
* Ability to work across technical and business audiences, from network engineers and cloud architects to operations leaders and executive stakeholders.



  





**RAKUTEN SHUGI PRINCIPLES:** 




 Our worldwide practices describe specific behaviours that make Rakuten unique and united across the world. We expect Rakuten employees to model these 5 Shugi Principles of Success.
 


* **Always improve, always advance.** 
 Only be satisfied with complete success \- Kaizen.
* **Be passionately professional.** 
 Take an uncompromising approach to your work and be determined to be the best.
* **Hypothesize \- Practice \- Validate \- Shikumika.** 
 Use the Rakuten Cycle to success in unknown territory.
* **Maximize Customer Satisfaction.** 
 The greatest satisfaction for workers in a service industry is to see their customers smile.
* **Speed!! Speed!! Speed!!** 
 Always be conscious of time. Take charge, set clear goals, and engage your team.

b6df6794.title: Architect I - Enterprise Solutions
b6df6794.description:
**Role Description**
 The D365 Finance \& Operations Solution Architect is responsible for end‑to‑end solution definition, design, and governance for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance \& Supply Chain Management implementations in healthcare provider, payer, and life‑sciences environments across the USA and India. The role combines architecture leadership, domain consulting, and delivery oversight to ensure compliant, scalable, and high‑quality solutions for multi‑entity, multi‑country healthcare organizations.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the overall D365 F\&O/F\&SCM solution architecture for healthcare clients (hospitals, clinic networks, diagnostics, pharmacies, payers, and med‑device/life‑sciences), covering finance, supply chain, procurement, projects, and shared services.
* Translate healthcare business requirements (patient care operations, clinical supply, pharmacy, insurance/payer, capex/OPEX control) into scalable F\&O designs including integrations, data, and security.
* Lead discovery and fit‑gap workshops with clinical, operations, finance, and IT stakeholders in USA and India, aligning solution design with local regulatory, tax, and compliance requirements.
* Define environment, deployment, and ALM strategy for multi‑region programmes, including localisation for US GAAP/IRS, Indian GST, TDS/TCS, and statutory reporting.
* Design and govern integrations between D365 F\&O and EHR/EMR, HIS, LIS, pharmacy, insurance/payer systems, and healthcare ISVs using DMF, dual‑write, APIs, and Azure services.
* Drive data architecture and migration strategy including CoA harmonisation, item/master data, vendor/contract data, and patient‑billing related financial data with appropriate controls and anonymisation where required.
* Define security, role‑based access, and SoD aligned to healthcare processes and compliance needs (e.g., alignment with HIPAA principles where applicable on financial/operational data touchpoints, internal controls, audit).
* Provide design governance for customisations and extensions, ensuring use of standard capabilities, ISVs, and Microsoft best practices to minimise technical debt and simplify validation.
* Act as solution authority across the delivery lifecycle, managing design risks, change requests, and cross‑workstream dependencies (finance, supply chain, pharmacy, projects, integration, data, testing).
* Support pre‑sales for healthcare accounts: solution proposals, RFP/RFI responses, estimation, solution walkthroughs, and industry‑specific demos (e.g., centralised procurement, inventory optimisation for OT/ICU, pharmacy processes).
* Act as trusted advisor to CFOs, COOs, CIOs, and clinical operations leadership, shaping roadmaps for finance transformation, shared services, procurement consolidation, and cost optimisation.
* Mentor functional and technical teams in both USA and India, fostering reusable healthcare templates (process maps, configuration blueprints, data templates, test packs).


**Required Experience (5–7 Years)**
* 5–7 years of overall IT/ERP experience with at least 10\+ years on Microsoft Dynamics AX / D365 F\&O / F\&SCM and a minimum of 5\+ years focused on healthcare or life‑sciences clients.
* Minimum 3–5 years in a Solution Architect / Senior Solution Architect role on large, multi‑entity or multi‑country D365 F\&O programs.
* Strong experience with end‑to‑end implementations involving finance, procurement, inventory/warehousing, and project accounting for hospitals, clinic chains, diagnostics networks, or healthcare service organizations.
* Proven track record with USA and/or India rollouts, including localization for US and Indian finance, tax, and statutory requirements.
* Demonstrable experience in designing and governing integrations with EMR/EHR, HIS, LIS, pharmacy, or insurance/payer platforms and healthcare ISVs.
* Consulting or partner background with substantial client‑facing responsibilities, including steering committees and executive stakeholder management.


**Skills And Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in business, Finance, Engineering, Computer Science, or related field; healthcare, life‑sciences, or supply chain certifications are an advantage.
* Deep understanding of D365 F\&O/F\&SCM capabilities across GL, AP, AR, FA, Cash \& Bank, Project accounting, Procurement \& Sourcing, Inventory \& Warehouse, and basic manufacturing where relevant.
* Strong grasp of healthcare business processes: patient and clinical operations cost tracking, service line profitability, procurement and inventory for medical consumables and implants, pharmacy operations, and capital projects for hospital expansion.
* Familiarity with regulatory and compliance considerations in healthcare finance and operations (e.g., controls around patient‑related financial data, audit trails, contract management for insurers and TPAs).
* Hands‑on experience with LCS and Azure DevOps for requirements, backlog, builds, and releases, understanding of Azure integration services and Power Platform for healthcare‑adjacent solutions.
* Excellent communication and facilitation skills, able to engage both business (finance, operations, clinicians) and technical teams across USA and India.
* Microsoft certifications in D365 (e.g., MB‑300, MB‑310, MB‑330, MB‑700\) preferred;


**Behavioral Competencies**
* Strong ownership and accountability for solution integrity and value realisation in complex healthcare programmes.
* Customer‑centric mindset with focus on patient safety impact, operational efficiency, and financial sustainability
* Ability to work in cross‑cultural teams spanning USA and India, managing time‑zone and stakeholder expectations effectively.
* Continuous learning attitude towards D365 roadmap, healthcare regulations, and emerging healthcare technology trends.


**Skills**
 dynamics 365 finance \& operations,financial management,supply chain management,azure devops,

d3a70e33.title: Oracle Fusion Payroll Cloud Techno-Functional Consultant
d3a70e33.description:
**Oracle Fusion Payroll Cloud Techno\-Functional Consultant** with expertise in **India and GCC (KSA/UAE) Payroll**.

**Position:** Oracle Fusion Payroll Cloud Techno\-Functional Consultant  
**Experience:** 10\+ Years  
**Employment Type:** Full\-time  
**Work Mode: Hyderabad**

**Notice Period: Immediate or 15 days** 

**Role Overview**

We are looking for an experienced Oracle Fusion Payroll Cloud Techno\-Functional Consultant who can work across both functional and technical aspects of Oracle Payroll Cloud implementations. The role involves end\-to\-end payroll solution delivery for multi\-country implementations, including India and GCC (KSA/UAE), with hands\-on experience in payroll configuration, Fast Formula development, HCM Extracts, integrations, statutory compliance, and production support.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead end\-to\-end Oracle Fusion Payroll Cloud implementations.
* Configure payroll elements, earnings, deductions, costing, payroll calendars, and statutory compliance.
* Develop and debug Payroll Fast Formulas for payroll calculations, eligibility, taxation, gratuity, and custom business requirements.
* Build HCM Extracts, BI Publisher reports, OTBI reports, HDL/HSDL templates, and payroll integrations.
* Design and support integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), REST/SOAP APIs.
* Configure payroll solutions for India, KSA, and UAE legislations.
* Support SIT, UAT, parallel payroll runs, go\-live, and post\-production activities.
* Prepare functional and technical documentation, test scripts, and training materials.

**Mandatory Skills**

* Oracle Fusion Payroll Cloud (Functional \& Technical)
* India Payroll (PF, ESI, PT, TDS, Form 16, Form 24Q, Gratuity)
* KSA Payroll (GOSI, WPS, Mudad, End\-of\-Service Benefits)
* Oracle Payroll Fast Formula
* HCM Extracts
* HDL / HSDL
* BI Publisher
* OTBI Reporting
* Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)
* SQL / PL/SQL
* Payroll Costing \& GL Integration
* Payroll integrations with Time \& Labor, Benefits, and Finance

**Preferred Skills**

* UAE Payroll (SIF, WPS, End\-of\-Service Gratuity)
* US Payroll knowledge (W\-2, W\-4, ACA, Garnishments)
* Multi\-country Oracle Payroll implementations
* Payroll accounting and reconciliation
* HRMS/ERP migration experience
* Live production support for GCC payroll implementations

**Experience Requirements**

* Oracle HCM Cloud (Functional \& Technical): 6\+ Years
* India Payroll: 4\+ Years
* KSA/UAE Payroll: 3\+ Years (Mandatory)
* Fast Formula Development: 3\+ Years
* HCM Extracts / BI Publisher: 4\+ Years
* Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC): 3\+ Years
* SQL / PL/SQL: 5\+ Years
* Minimum 3 end\-to\-end Oracle HCM implementation projects

**Preferred Certification**

* Oracle Payroll Cloud Certified Implementation Professional

Pay: ₹150,000\.00 \- ₹160,000\.00 per month

Work Location: In person

04bfc807.title: Azure Cloud Consultant/Azure Cloud Engineer
04bfc807.description:
**Brennan. Where true performance thrives.**
 At Brennan, we believe that
 *how* 
 technology is delivered is every bit as important as
 *what* 
 the technology is. We focus on creating real and relevant value for customers with solutions that fit their specific needs and always reflect their true interests.
   

  

 It’s a claim backed by our
 **True Performance System** 
 \- a way of working engineered to get us closer, and deliver better, for our customers and their actual experience of technology.
   

  

**Why join Brennan**
 True performance for our customers starts with a true belief in our people.
   

  

 It’s why we’ve structured our business to help our teams, and their talents, shine bright. It's why we’ve created a workplace where people of all backgrounds, beliefs and experiences are welcomed and empowered. And it’s why we’ve built an organization where real innovation makes a genuine impact and generates true rewards for our team members.
   

  

**True rewards**
 In addition to competitive remuneration, Brennan offers extensive benefits, including:
   

  

* Training and certification bonuses
* Culture Awards that recognize excellence
* Brennan Daredevils \- our annual, all\-expenses paid trip awarded to our top performers and outstanding contributors
* Vibrant, fun social activities
* Discounted hardware and software
* An environment that embraces learning and development


****The Role:****
 The Cloud Consultant is a member of the Cloud Practice, supporting the delivery of Azure Cloud solutions into customer environments. The role works closely with senior consultants and engineers to assist in implementing cloud projects.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
* Designing and executing cloud assessments using tools such as Azure Migrate to evaluate workload readiness, risks, and cost considerations prior to migration.
* Performing cloud environment reviews aligned with industry best practice frameworks (e.g. Well\-Architected Reviews), focusing on cost optimisation and operational efficiency, and leveraging native cloud cost management and monitoring tools to improve visibility and identify actionable savings opportunities.
* Implementing and delivering cloud projects in line with defined scope, timelines, and quality standards.
* Maintaining and enhancing Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for Azure cloud \[DS1] environments, including version control and updates to Azure landing zone configurations aligned with the Azure cloud landing zone principles.
* Collaborating with cross\-functional teams to plan and deliver cloud services, ensuring alignment on timelines and resource requirements.
* Providing Level 2/Level 3 technical support to resolve complex cloud infrastructure and platform issues.
* Contributing to design, documentation, and implementation guides.
* Ensuring high service quality through adherence to best practices, standards, and attention to detail.
* Working with vendors such as Microsoft to stay aligned with platform capabilities and best practices.
* Assisting in the development and standardisation of cloud service offerings, including reusable templates and automation.
* Participating in knowledge sharing and mentoring within the engineering team.
* Pursuing and maintaining relevant industry certifications and keeping up to date with cloud technologies and trends.
* Contributing to internal process improvements, documentation, and automation initiatives to enhance delivery efficiency.


****Key Competencies and Qualifications Required:****
* 3\-5 years of experience in IT Infrastructure, Cloud, or System Administration
* Working knowledge of Microsoft Azure and cloud infrastructure services, including Virtual Machines, Storage, and Networking (VNets).
* Understanding of cloud migration concepts and tools such as Azure Migrate, including lift\-and\-shift (rehost) migrations.
* Exposure to Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using ARM/Bicep and/or Terraform.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Entra ID, RBAC, MFA, cloud security best practices, and governance concepts.
* Knowledge of Windows/Linux, DNS, IP addressing, firewalls, virtualization (VMware/Hyper\-V), and Azure Monitor.
* Strong problem\-solving, communication, and collaboration skills, with a willingness to learn, contribute to documentation, and pursue advanced cloud certifications.


**Brennan** 
 is an equal opportunity employer.

a2a52825.title: Cloud Platform Architect - AWS
a2a52825.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Cloud Platform Architect \- AWS with AI** 
 to lead the design and implementation of enterprise\-scale cloud and GenAI solutions. This role combines deep AWS architecture expertise with cutting\-edge AI capabilities to drive cloud transformation initiatives, governance frameworks, and intelligent automation across complex enterprise environments.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead the design and implementation of GenAI solutions using AWS Bedrock and Bedrock Agent Core aligned to enterprise AI initiatives
* Develop Python\-based automation, integrations, validation frameworks and technical assessment utilities for cloud and AI solutions
* Architect secure, scalable and highly available AWS cloud environments aligned with enterprise governance and compliance standards
* Lead AWS Landing Zone implementation, multi\-account governance setup and cloud platform engineering initiatives
* Drive cloud migration assessments, modernization strategies, execution planning and post\-migration optimization programs
* Automate cloud infrastructure provisioning and operational workflows using Terraform, CloudFormation and Python
* Implement IAM strategies, SCPs, security controls, backup, disaster recovery and monitoring solutions across AWS environments
* Collaborate with customer stakeholders, engineering teams and delivery teams to define architecture roadmaps and cloud transformation strategies







**Requirements** 



* 12–16 years of experience in software engineering
* Hands\-on expertise in AWS Bedrock and Bedrock Agent Core for building enterprise GenAI and agentic AI solutions
* Expert\-level proficiency in Python for automation, cloud engineering and AI\-driven implementations
* Background in designing GenAI architectures on AWS using Bedrock, APIs and orchestration frameworks
* Expertise in architecting enterprise\-scale AWS cloud environments and multi\-account strategies
* Strong knowledge of AWS Landing Zone, AWS Organizations and Control Tower, along with SCPs, IAM and governance frameworks
* Familiarity with AWS services including EC2, Lambda and RDS, as well as ELB, S3, CloudTrail, AWS Config and GuardDuty
* Experience in AWS migration programs including server/application migrations and Migration Factory models
* Skills in Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and CloudFormation
* Competency in Kubernetes/EKS, Docker and CI/CD pipelines, along with monitoring tools and production\-scale AWS environments
* Capability to deliver architecture/design documentation, solution diagrams and technical governance artifacts







**Nice to have** 



* AWS Solutions Architect Professional or Specialty certifications
* Exposure to Agentic AI frameworks, orchestration platforms and enterprise AI modernization initiatives
* Experience with hybrid cloud connectivity, enterprise integrations and cloud modernization programs

abb2155d.title: Senior Cloud & Infrastructure Engineer
abb2155d.description:
**Senior Cloud \& Infrastructure Engineer** 




  





**REPORTING RELATIONSHIP** 




 POSITION REPORTS TO: ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR IT
 



 DEPARTMENT: TECHNOLOGY
 



 POSITION LOCATION: VADODARA (
 **HYBRID)** 




  





**POSITION SUMMARY** 




 The position is offered through Company. This is a hands\-on, breadth\-oriented role for an engineer who wants to run a real production environment, modernize how infrastructure is built and operated, and work closely with security and development to ship and run software safely. As lead infrastructure engineer for Omni’s multi\-tenant Azure estate and Windows server fleet, this role works in close daily partnership with Omni’s Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, who acts as the technical sounding board, security reviewer, and sign\-off authority on significant infrastructure decisions. This role operates under a matrix reporting structure, with a functional reporting line to the CTO, Omni Agent Solutions (USA) and an administrative reporting line to the Associate Director IT (India).
 



  





**JOB RESPONSIBILITIES** 




 • Operate as the lead infrastructure engineer in close daily partnership with Omni’s Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, who provides technical direction, conducts security review, and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions before they reach production.
 



 • Run and modernize Omni’s Azure environment, including compute, networking, identity, Azure App Services, Azure SQL, Microsoft WAF, Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365, and Azure Monitor.
 



 • Own the Windows Server fleet end\-to\-end: provisioning, patching cadence, Group Policy and Active Directory operations, lifecycle planning, and end\-of\-support migrations.
 



 • Own Microsoft 365 license allocation and Azure subscription management across Omni’s multi\-tenant environment, including license assignment and recovery, subscription and tenant governance, cost visibility, and ongoing right\-sizing.
 



 • Modernize the infrastructure\-as\-code practice. Propose tooling and patterns for joint review with the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, and incrementally bring infrastructure under code with security guardrails built in from the start.
 



 • Partner with the senior developer and broader development team to extend modern CI/CD patterns from application code into infrastructure deployment, and to design systems that scale securely as the business grows.
 



 • Work closely with Omni’s security team and managed SOC on hardening, vulnerability remediation, identity controls, endpoint protection through SentinelOne, and compliance evidence.
 



 • Cross\-train into the security workstreams the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer manages day\-to\-day, including endpoint detection and response, SASE and ZTNA networking, SIEM, and the managed SOC’s tooling, so the two roles can back each other up across disciplines.
 



 • Manage observability across Datadog and Azure Monitor, including alerting, on\-call signal hygiene, and runbook development.
 



 • Maintain the homegrown line\-of\-business application infrastructure (Azure App Services, Azure SQL, and Microsoft WAF).
 



 • Run day\-to\-day business continuity and disaster recovery operations within Omni’s defined RPO and RTO targets. Maintain DR runbooks and run periodic failover and tabletop exercises.
 



 • Build and maintain runbooks, architecture diagrams, and change records so the environment can be supported by anyone on the team.
 



 • Partner with Omni’s co\-managed MSP as a shared delivery team across day\-to\-day operations and escalations, rather than treating the MSP as an outside vendor.
 



 • Provide escalation support to internal end users for infrastructure\-impacting tickets routed through the helpdesk and the co\-managed MSP.
 



 • Participate in an after\-hours rotation covering monthly maintenance windows and incident response, and co\-lead
 



 post\-incident reviews. Formalizing the rotation is part of the role, in partnership with the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer.
 



  





**KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS AND ABILITIES** 




 • 8\+ years of cloud engineering experience, with significant Azure depth.
 



 • 3\+ years' operating Windows Server environments at production scale.
 



 • Hands\-on experience with hybrid identity, including Active Directory, Group Policy, and Entra ID, in a Windows\-centric environment.
 



 • Strong cloud and hybrid networking experience, including firewall change management, network segmentation, cross\-tenant routing, IPsec and SSL VPN, NSGs, and subnet design.
 



 • Experience operating to defined RPO and RTO targets, including DR runbook maintenance and failover testing.
 



 • Strong infrastructure\-as\-code experience. Terraform preferred, with openness to Azure\-native equivalents such as Bicep or ARM templates.
 



 • Demonstrated ability to modernize engineering practices in close collaboration with security counterparts, partnering on the final shape of the practice rather than dictating it.
 



 • Comfort operating in a role where a security peer reviews and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions, and where outcomes are defined jointly rather than independently.
 



 • Comfort cross\-training across infrastructure and security disciplines, holding a primary area of focus while providing secondary coverage of the other.
 



 • Track record of partnering closely with security and development teams to ship and operate software safely and at scale.
 



  





**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS** 




 • Familiarity with Microsoft 365 Copilot or other enterprise AI rollouts.
 



  





 • Exposure to NIST CSF, CIS Controls, or ISO/IEC 27001, and how these frameworks apply to both cloud and on\-
 



 premises or Group Policy deployment.
 



  





 • Familiarity with SOC 2 control operation and evidence collection.
 



 • Working knowledge of California privacy regulation (CCPA / CPRA). HIPAA exposure also a plus.
 



 • Microsoft partnership program exposure (CSP, Solutions Partner designations).
 



 • Secondary cloud and SaaS familiarity beyond Azure, including Google Workspace, Google Cloud Storage, and Wasabi object storage.
 



 • Exposure to thin\-client deployments and cloud browser management.
 



 • Cloudflare familiarity (edge, DNS, security).
 



 • Next\-generation firewall platform experience (Palo Alto Networks, Fortinet FortiGate, or comparable).
 



 • Enterprise backup and DR platform experience (Veeam, Axcient, Azure Backup, or comparable).
 



 • Experience migrating workloads from traditional VMs to serverless or cloud\-native application platforms.
 



 • SQL Server DBA exposure for day\-to\-day database operations (not a primary focus of the role).
 



 • IIS management experience.
 



 • AWS, Kubernetes, or serverless experience.
 



 • Experience operating in a small infrastructure team where breadth matters more than depth in any one area.

38085d04.title: Solution Architect-AWS
38085d04.description:
**Job Description**
 Senior Solutions Architect – AWS Cloud
   

  

**Position:** 
 Solutions Architect – AWS Cloud
   

  

**Experience:** 
 4\+ Years
   

  

**Location:** 
 Hyderabad
   

  

 Role Summary
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Senior Solutions Architect – AWS Cloud** 
 to design, implement, and optimize scalable, secure, and cost\-effective cloud solutions on AWS. The ideal candidate will work closely with customers, pre\-sales teams, project managers, and technical teams to deliver cloud transformation initiatives and drive business outcomes.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Design and architect AWS cloud solutions aligned with business and technical requirements.
* Lead cloud migration, modernization, and digital transformation initiatives.
* Develop High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) documents.
* Conduct cloud assessments, discovery workshops, and technical solution presentations.
* Design highly available, scalable, and disaster recovery architectures.
* Implement AWS security best practices, governance frameworks, and compliance controls.
* Provide technical leadership during project delivery and customer engagements.
* Optimize cloud infrastructure for performance, reliability, and cost efficiency.
* Collaborate with networking, security, application, and DevOps teams.
* Support pre\-sales activities including solution design, effort estimation, proposal preparation, and technical presentations.
* Mentor and guide cloud engineers and junior architects.


**Requirements**
**Job Requirements**
 Required Technical Skills
   

  

 AWS Services
   

  

* EC2, VPC, EBS, S3, EFS
* IAM, AWS Organizations, Control Tower
* RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB
* Route 53, Elastic Load Balancer (ELB), Auto Scaling
* CloudWatch, CloudTrail, AWS Config
* Lambda, API Gateway
* ECS, EKS, Docker, Kubernetes


 Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
   

  

* Terraform
* AWS CloudFormation


 Core Competencies
   

  

* Networking and Security
* Disaster Recovery and Backup Solutions
* Hybrid Cloud Architectures
* Cost Optimization and FinOps
* High Availability and Scalability Design


 Migration Tools
   

  

* AWS Application Migration Service (MGN)
* AWS Elastic Disaster Recovery (DRS)
* AWS Database Migration Service (DMS)


**Preferred Certifications**
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate


 Education
   

  

* Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.


 Good to Have
   

  

* Experience with multi\-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, and GCP).
* Exposure to enterprise data center and cloud transformation projects.
* Strong customer\-facing and pre\-sales consulting experience.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience with DevOps tools and CI/CD pipelines.

4cfd23f5.description:
Job Description – Business Consultant (Principal) – Cloud \& Security
 



**Company:** 
 NextGen Identity
 



**Role:** 
 Business Consultant – Principal
 



**Location:** 
 Remote
 



**Experience Required:** 
 12–15 Years
 



**Joining:** 
 Immediate Joiners Only
 



 About Us
 



 NextGen Identity is a leading Identity \& Access Management and Cybersecurity consulting company delivering secure cloud, infrastructure, and identity solutions for enterprise customers across multiple industries.
 



 Position Overview
 



 We are seeking a highly experienced Business Consultant – Principal to lead strategic cloud security consulting engagements. This role requires deep technical expertise, solution architecture experience, customer consulting skills, and the ability to guide large enterprise transformation initiatives.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 


* Lead enterprise cloud security consulting and solution architecture engagements.
* Design secure multi\-cloud environments across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
* Architect Infrastructure as Code (IaC) solutions using Terraform.
* Design and implement Kubernetes\-based enterprise platforms.
* Develop secure cloud networking architectures and best practices.
* Lead implementation of Web Application Firewall (WAF), AWS GuardDuty, and Security Command Center solutions.
* Provide strategic guidance on cloud security governance and risk management.
* Engage with customers to understand business objectives and recommend scalable security solutions.
* Mentor technical consultants and provide architectural leadership.
* Prepare technical proposals, solution presentations, and executive\-level documentation.



 Required Skills \& Qualifications
 


* 12–15 years of experience in Cloud Security, Infrastructure, and Enterprise Consulting.
* Expert\-level experience with Terraform.
* Strong expertise in AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Extensive experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration.
* Deep understanding of Cloud Networking and Security Architecture.
* Hands\-on experience with Web Application Firewall (WAF).
* Experience implementing AWS GuardDuty and Security Command Center.
* Strong leadership, consulting, stakeholder management, and presentation skills.
* Excellent problem\-solving and architectural decision\-making abilities.



 Good to Have (Preferred Skills)
 


* AWS/Azure/GCP Professional Certifications.
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) or equivalent.
* Experience with DevSecOps and Cloud Governance.
* Knowledge of Zero Trust Architecture.
* Familiarity with enterprise IAM solutions such as Microsoft Entra ID, SailPoint, Okta, or Saviynt.



 Why Join Us?
 


* Lead enterprise\-scale cloud transformation programs.
* Work with global customers on complex security initiatives.
* Opportunity to shape cloud security strategy and architecture.
* Strong career growth within a fast\-growing IAM and Cybersecurity consulting organization.

09229e2f.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
**Artificial Intelligence \& Engineering**
 AI \& Engineering leverages cutting\-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These solutions insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transforming mission\-critical operations.
   

  

 Join our AI \& Engineering team to help in transforming technology platforms, driving innovation, and helping help make a significant impact on our clients' success achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re\-engineering operations and processes that are could be critical to businesses.
   

  

**Position Summary**
**Level:** 
 Data Engineer II
   

  

 As an experienced Data Engineer II at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.
   

  

**Work you’ll do:**
 Apply industry knowledge to requirements gathering and analysis, ensuring alignment with sector needs. Demonstrate expertise across the entire software development lifecycle, from design and coding to deployment and defect resolution, collaborating with stakeholders for effective delivery. Conduct peer and team reviews to maintain quality standards. Actively engage in Agile practices, including sprint planning, retrospectives, and effort estimation. Build and share business process knowledge, supporting project knowledge management and team training. Proactively recommend process improvements, track efficiency gains, and contribute to automation and innovation, all aimed at enhancing project outcomes and delivering greater value to clients.
   

  

**The Team:**
 AI \& Data offers a full spectrum of solutions for designing, developing, and operating cutting\-edge Data and AI platforms, products, insights, and services. Our offering helps clients innovate, and enhance their data, AI, and analytics capabilities, ensuring they can mature and scale effectively.
   

  

 AI \& Data professionals will work with our clients to:
   

  

* Design and modernize large\-scale data and analytics platforms including data management, governance and the integration of structured and unstructured data to generate insights leveraging cloud, edge and AI/ML technologies, platforms and methodologies for storage, processing
* Leverage automation, cognitive and AI based solutions to manage data, predict scenarios and prescribe actions
* Drive operational efficiency by managing and upgrading their data ecosystems and application platforms, utilizing analytics expertise and providing As\-a\-Service models to ensure continuous insights and enhancements.


 Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru/Chennai/Pune
   

  

 Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PM
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* 3 \- 6 years of relevant consulting, industry or technology experience
* Experience in Cloud SQL and Cloud Bigtable
* Experience in Dataflow, BigQuery, Dataproc, Datalab, Dataprep, Pub/Sub and Genomics
* Experience in Google Transfer Appliance, Cloud Storage Transfer Service, BigQuery Data Transfer
* Experience with data processing software (such as Hadoop, Kafka, Spark, Pig, Hive) and with data processing algorithms (MapReduce, Flume).
* Experience working with technical customers.
* Experience in writing software in one or more languages such as Java, C\+\+, Python, Go and/or JavaScript.
* Strong problem solving and troubleshooting skills
* Strong communication skills
* Willingness to travel up in case of project requirement


**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* Experience working data warehouses, including data warehouse technical architectures, infrastructure components, ETL/ELT and reporting/analytic tools and environments.
* Experience in technical consulting.
* Experience architecting, developing software, or internet scale production\-grade Big Data solutions in virtualized environments such as Google Cloud Platform (mandatory) and AWS/Azure (good to have)
* Experience working with big data, information retrieval, data mining or machine learning as well as experience in building multi\-tier high availability applications with modern web technologies (such as NoSQL, Kafka,NPL, MongoDB, SparkML, Tensorflow). ▪ Working knowledge of ITIL and/or agile methodologies


**Education:**
 BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university

 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively.  At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them.  At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. **Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

c87a7f5d.title: Product Industrialization Program Manager
c87a7f5d.description:
### **Job Title**

Product Industrialization Program Manager
### **Job Description**

As Product Industrialization Program Manager, you are in the lead for the execution and release of new product introductions and Manufacturing Transfer in the global supply chain and operations (design transfer) with minimal disruption of customer deliveries. You are responsible for driving the industrialization Project management, Strategic Transformation Program and represent the operations and the supply chain in the integral project team.  



  

**Your role:**

* Leads the planning and execution of complex manufacturing projects, from inception to delivery, ensuring alignment with Philips' organizational strategy and objectives across multiple business domains and knowledge centers and applies advanced understanding of entrepreneurial skills and supports the entrepreneurial environment and follows up on initiatives
* Industrialization Project, Program Management of all Industrialization deliverables to meet Schedule, Cost, and Quality Requirements
* Drive the Strategic transformation programs to establish flexible \& lean supply chain considering current geopolitical situations
* Formulates the project plan, in accordance with the goals and timing, set by management; The plan includes resources, costs, risk assessment and quality aspects.
* Manages multiple interdependencies and business risks related to product introduction activities.
* Drives industrial and supply chain improvements/processes in PDLM focusing on Design for manufacturing, Design for Supply Chain and industrial quality.
* Process owner for the processes in the relevant area like process validation. Ensures employees work compliant and provide sufficient training to keep up\-to\-standard. Keeps abreast of new regulations and assess impact for own work
* Ensure optimum process capability, adherence to quality standards, and DfMAT (design for manufacturability, assembly, and test) best practices are leveraged
* Leading and cooperating with an Operations project team including engineering, procurement, quality, logistics, catalog management and manufacturing
* Representing Operations in the integral project team and acting as Single Point of Contact between Operations and the cross functional project team
* Identify and drive manufacturing/engineering/value chain improvements during product development projects \& transfer projects and drive product improvements regarding variety, cost, quality, and failure rate, implementing DfMAT principles
* Identify the impact of new products on the current supply chain architecture and manufacturing concepts to develop the required architecture and solutions, initiate the deployment and define guidelines and execute implementation
* Leading the implementation in the supply chain of project related Engineering Changes
* Cooperate with stakeholders to define the supply chain and manufacturing concepts of new products with optimal landed costs • Driving operational excellence of project execution to achieve first time right predictable project execution.
* Researches and evaluates emerging trends, technologies, and best practices in manufacturing, incorporating relevant advancements into project plans to drive innovation and competitive advantage for Philips.
* Offers strategic recommendations and insights based on project learnings and outcomes, contributing to the continuous improvement of Philips' manufacturing processes and capabilities.
* Synthesizes project data and information into comprehensive reports and presentations for senior management, providing regular updates on project status, milestones achieved, and upcoming milestones.

**You're the right fit if you have:**

**Education Qualification:**

* Bachelor/Master degree in a technical field, Mechanical/Electrical/ Electronics/ Production/Industrial Engineering
* PMP level or equivalent mandatory, Track record in project management.

**Technical/Functional Competencies:**

* Project, Program Management especially in New Product Introduction, Global Mfg. transfers \& Strategic Transformation
* Manufacturing Fundamentals in medical device manufacturing
* Engg. Change Management, Integrated Supply Chain Management, Risk Management
* Lifecycle Management Fundamentals, Process \& Industrial Engineering
* Operation excellence methodology (LEAN, 6 Sigma)
* Medical Device regulation knowledge (nice to have)
* Industry 4\.0, Digital Manufacturing, AI, Data Integration (Preferred)
* Conceptual thinking capabilities (Translate Global Architecture to requirements and Design and determine production impact)
* Ability to resolve complex issues in creative ways and influence stakeholders accordingly

**Work Experience:**

* Min 12\+ years in a complex assembly/test industry, Preferably in Medical device
* Project, Program Management in global environment
* Experience in leading multi\-disciplinary teams \& projects
* Should have experience on

New Product Introduction (NPI)


Industrial Integration and Global Mfg. transfers


Strategic Transformation wrt Manufacturing \& Supply chain


Global Supply chain set up


Process Engineering, Industrial Engineering


Change Management


Process Qualification/Validation


Manufacturing Infra Establishment


* Design for Manufacturability, Assembly \& Testing (DFM/DFA/DFMAT)
* Supplier assessment, selection \& APQP Deployment
* Capex \& Opex Management
* Experience in quality management systems (preferably in the medical industry)

**Behavioural Competencies:**

* People, Stakeholder Management \& ability to lead in matrix environment cross\-functional teams
* Global environment (must)
* Networking \& Collaborations
* Result and quality oriented
* Excellent communicative and social skills
* Proven ability to work in multi\-disciplinary teams
* Hands\-on can\-do mentality
* A promoter for diversity and inclusion

  

**How we work together**  

We believe that we are better together than apart. For our office\-based teams, this means working in\-person at least 3 days per week.
  

Onsite roles require full\-time presence in the company’s facilities.
  

Field roles are most effectively done outside of the company’s main facilities, generally at the customers’ or suppliers’ locations.
  

This is an office based role.


**About Philips**  

We are a health technology company. We built our entire company around the belief that every human matters, and we won't stop until everybody everywhere has access to the quality healthcare that we all deserve. Do the work of your life to help the lives of others.
  

* Learn more about our business .
* Discover our rich and exciting history .
* Learn more about our purpose .

If you’re interested in this role and have many, but not all, of the experiences needed, we encourage you to apply. You may still be the right candidate for this or other opportunities at Philips. Learn more about our culture of impact with care here .
\#EOS

fca998ef.description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
  
Job Summary
  
The Senior Program Manager at HCL will be responsible for the overall program management, applying Agile methodology to drive successful project delivery. The role involves overseeing multiple projects, ensuring alignment with organizational goals, and leading cross functional teams to achieve project objectives efficiently.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1\. Develop and implement program management strategies to ensure successful delivery of projects
  
2\. Utilize agile methodology to manage projects, facilitate scrum meetings, and drive continuous improvement
  
3\. Monitor project progress, identify risks and issues, and implement mitigation plans to ensure project timelines are met
  
4\. Collaborate with stakeholders to define project scope, goals, and deliverables
  
5\. Lead and mentor project managers and teams to enhance performance and meet project milestones
  
6\. Conduct regular project reviews and report on project status to senior management
  
7\. Drive a culture of accountability, transparency, and collaboration within the project teams
  
8\. Ensure adherence to quality standards, best practices, and compliance requirements in project execution
  
9\. Continuously assess and improve project management processes to optimize efficiency and delivery quality
  
Skill Requirements
  
1\. Proven experience in program management with a focus on delivering complex projects
  
2\. In\-depth knowledge and practical experience in agile methodology and frameworks (scrum, kanban, etc.)
  
3\. Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate teams and drive results
  
4\. Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities to engage with stakeholders at all levels
  
5\. Strategic thinking and problem\-solving skills to address project challenges effectively
  
6\. Proficiency in project management tools and software for planning, tracking, and reporting
  
7\. Ability to prioritize multiple demands in a fast paced environment and adapt to changing priorities
  
Other Requirements
  
1\.Project Management Professional (PMP) and Agile certifications such as Certified Scrum Master (CSM) or Agile Certified Practitioner (PMIACP) are preferred

9fb40a43.title: Delivery Manager
9fb40a43.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Delivery Manager
 



**Years of experience:** 
 9 \-13 Years only
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore
 



**In\-depth Technology experience; must be from Java/.Net/Data and Agentic AI Background only, with basic Big Data knowledge. Experience with Presales and P\&L required.** 




**Good Stability and Strong communication.** 




  





 We are looking for a Delivery Manager, who will take the leadership of a team of high\-performing, motivated engineers.
 



  





***Lead end\-to\-end execution of AI and GenAI initiatives from ideation through deployment, ensuring alignment with business goals, timelines, and success metrics.***




  





***Demonstrate strong knowledge of GenAI, large language models (LLMs), retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG), agentic systems, prompt\-based workflows, and AI\-powered enterprise solutions, with the ability to effectively engage technical and business teams on these topics.***




  





 Senior Delivery Manager works to maintain good customer relationships and improve the company's services to maintain customer satisfaction. Senior Delivery Manager is responsible for making sure that services are being seamlessly delivered to the client. Is in charge of a variety of tasks, such as leading project teams, rectifying reliability issues, monitoring progress, tracking KPIs, and managing budgets. Plays a vital role in boosting the user experience by ensuring the smooth delivery of top\-notch services that meet and exceed customer demands.
 



  





 The ability to manage big programs or accounts as well as Portfolios is a good plus.
 



  





**Details on tech stack** 



* Managing globally distributed engineering and project teams, simultaneously delivering implementation and support projects using Agile methodologies according to the Service / Work Orders (SO) or Contract Execution Plans (CEP) in place with Clients, SLA, Budget, Quality, and Customer Satisfaction.
* Tech Stack\- JAVA/Full\-stack/ Cloud/GenAI/Data Engineering/ Analytics/Data Science/ ML
 **(QA/Agile/Scrum masters/ ERP/SAP/Oracle/ Packaged services project/Salesforce/Workday implementation kind of project not required)**
* Managed large enterprise projects (Fixed bid or T\&M) \- Preferred someone who worked at onsite and managed customers from US/Europe.
* Setting up, maintaining, and improving reliable delivery processes in accordance with industry best practices and corporate PMO standards.
* Increase transparency of the delivery organization by regularly and accurately reporting status.
* Delivering projects on time, within budget, monitor and control the quality and other project constraints/baselines according to the initial planning and according to client expectations.
* Support bid teams on strategic new opportunities with the support of Project Managers, contribute to pre\-sales activities.
* Participate actively in the Delivery governance and optimization (reporting and monthly committee).
* Contributing to Company’s Business development and organizational standards implementation.
* Identifying customer needs and overseeing service delivery within the business context.
* Establishing efficient communication channels between our project teams and client organizations.
* Expanding the team by finding and attracting talent from the market and growing people internally.
* Defining and implementing training and knowledge sharing programs
* People management
* Engineering background is MUST.








**Nice to have requirements to the candidate** 




 The Delivery Manager position requires excellent leadership, people management, and problem\-solving skills. The innovative nature of our organization demands extensive practical knowledge of efficient software engineering processes combined with an ability to adapt and learn quickly.
 



  





**Specific qualifications for the position include:** 



* 9\+ years of experience in the software engineering industry with at least 4 years in leadership or management positions.
* Experience in developing distributed high loaded systems is a plus.
* Proven track record of creating and managing globally distributed delivery teams for an international customer.
* Excellent understanding and practical experience with modern project management methodologies and software engineering processes.
* Track record of attracting and retaining top talent.
* Excellent communication, leadership, organizational, negotiation and client management skills.
* Strong teamwork skills and attention to detail.
* Operational ability in a diverse, large\-scale environment.
* Fluent English

9628c923.title: Delivery Manager – Data Platform Delivery
9628c923.description:
**Role** 




 Kanerika is a global Data, AI and Intelligent Automation company helping enterprises modernize their data platforms through AI\-powered accelerators and delivery excellence. Our proprietary FLIP Migration Accelerators enable organizations to migrate legacy ETL, BI and analytics platforms to modern cloud ecosystems significantly faster and with lower risk. As customer adoption of FLIP continues to grow, we are looking for a highly experienced delivery leader to own end\-to\-end execution of migration and modernization programs. The Director – Data Platform Delivery will lead multiple customer engagements involving data platform modernization, ETL migrations, BI modernization, cloud data engineering, analytics, and AI\-driven transformation initiatives. The individual will be responsible for ensuring successful execution of projects delivered through FLIP Migration Accelerators while building a high\-performing delivery organization that consistently delivers quality, predictability, customer satisfaction, and profitability. This role combines technical leadership, program management, customer engagement, people leadership, and delivery governance.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





 Delivery Leadership • Own end\-to\-end delivery of multiple concurrent customer engagements. • Drive successful implementation of FLIP Migration Accelerator projects. • Ensure projects are delivered on schedule, within budget, and at high quality. • Build delivery governance, review mechanisms, and risk management processes. • Manage project financials including margins, utilization, forecasting, and profitability.
 



  





 Customer Success • Act as executive delivery owner for strategic customers. • Conduct steering committee meetings. • Build trusted relationships with customer executives. • Manage escalations proactively. • Drive customer satisfaction and identify expansion opportunities.
 



  





 Technical Leadership
 



 Provide delivery oversight across projects involving: • Data Engineering • Data Warehousing • Cloud Data Platforms • ETL Modernization • Data Migration • BI Modernization • Data Lakes • Lakehouse Architectures • Data Governance • Analytics Platforms
 



  





 Program Management
 



 • Establish PMO standards. People Leadership
 



 • Lead large migration programs across multiple workstreams.
 



 • Manage project plans, dependencies, RAID logs, and resource allocation.
 



 • Drive Agile delivery practices where applicable.
 



 • Monitor KPIs and executive dashboards.
 



 • Lead Delivery Managers, Project Managers, Architects, Technical Leads, and Engineering teams.
 



 • Mentor future delivery leaders.
 



 • Build capability in cloud data engineering and migration delivery.
 



 • Participate in hiring and workforce planning.
 



 • Drive utilization and resource optimization.
 



 • Define delivery playbooks for FLIP implementations.
 



 • Standardize project execution methodologies.
 



 • Improve automation across delivery lifecycle.
 



 • Drive continuous improvement initiatives.
 



 • Ensure adherence to security, quality, and compliance standards.
 



 Collaboration Partner closely with: • Sales • Presales • Product Management • Engineering • Customer Success • Architecture • R\&D • Executive Leadership to ensure successful customer outcomes.
 



  





**Required Skills \& Qualifications** 




 • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
 



 • 18\+ years of overall IT experience, with 8\+ years leading enterprise data engineering or delivery of large\-scale BI Migration, Data Warehousing, or Analytics delivery programs.
 



 • Proven experience delivering enterprise BI migration projects using platforms such as Power BI, Tableau, Cognos, SSRS, Crystal Reports, Business Objects, or Qlik.
 



 • Strong understanding of Data Warehousing, ETL/ELT, SQL, data modeling, reporting architectures, and BI modernization.
 



 • Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP) and modern data platforms such as Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric, Azure Synapse, or Databricks.
 



 • Microsoft Azure, Databricks, Snowflake, or Fabric certifications are a plus.
 



 • Strong delivery management experience with expertise in project planning, stakeholder management, risk mitigation, budgeting, and delivery governance.
 



 • Experience leading cross\-functional teams in Agile/Scrum environments with excellent communication and client management skills.
 



 • PMP, Scrum Master, or other Project Management certifications are preferred.

 The right candidate will bring strong Siemens Teamcenter experience alongside the consultative ability to engage senior stakeholders and drive enterprise\-wide adoption. This is not a Teamcenter support or administration role — we need a transformation leader who can connect Engineering, R\&D, Manufacturing, and future AI initiatives into a coherent program.
