ca3800cf.title: Cloud Infrastructure Lead/Architect
ca3800cf.description:
**Cloud Infrastructure Lead/Architect**

**Location:** Remote  
**Employment Type:** C2C / Full\-Time (FTE)  
**Experience:** 10\+ Years

**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced **Cloud Infrastructure Lead/Architect** to design, implement, and manage scalable, secure, and highly available cloud infrastructure solutions. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience with **Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC)**, along with strong technical leadership and client\-facing experience.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, architect, and implement scalable, highly available, and secure cloud infrastructure on GCP and/or AWS.
* Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.
* Deploy and manage Kubernetes workloads using Helm and Kustomize.
* Design and implement CI/CD pipelines using GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Cloud Build, Harness, or similar tools.
* Implement rolling, canary, and blue/green deployment strategies.
* Ensure infrastructure security, compliance, auditability, and observability.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex infrastructure and platform issues.
* Provide technical leadership, mentoring, and architectural guidance to engineering teams.
* Collaborate with clients to understand technical and business requirements and deliver effective cloud solutions.
* Participate in Agile planning, backlog management, and sprint activities.
* Support pre\-sales engagements by providing technical expertise when required.

**Required Skills**

* 10\+ years of experience in Cloud Infrastructure, Platform Engineering, or a similar role.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or Amazon Web Services (AWS).
* Expertise in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Strong experience with Kubernetes, Helm, and Kustomize.
* Experience designing and managing CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation.
* Knowledge of cloud security, governance, compliance, and best practices.
* Experience with monitoring, logging, and infrastructure observability tools.
* Strong understanding of high availability, scalability, disaster recovery, and cloud architecture.
* Experience leading technical teams and mentoring engineers.
* Excellent communication, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.

**Preferred Skills**

* Python or other scripting languages.
* Experience with Machine Learning infrastructure.
* Experience with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Cloud Build, or Harness.
* Experience working in Agile environments.
* Client\-facing consulting experience.

**Preferred Certifications**

* Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
* Google Cloud Security or Networking Certifications
* AWS Solutions Architect Certification

**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

**Must\-Have Skills**

* Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS
* Terraform
* Kubernetes
* Helm \& Kustomize
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
* CI/CD Pipelines
* Cloud Security \& Compliance
* Cloud Architecture
* Technical Leadership
* Client Engagement

Pay: ₹90,000\.00 \- ₹120,000\.00 per month

Experience:

* Cloud Infrastructure: 10 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

d1c9774d.title: Cloud Platform Engineer
d1c9774d.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Platform Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Designs, builds, tests, and deploys cloud application solutions that integrate cloud and non\-cloud infrastructure. Can deploy infrastructure and platform environments, creates a proof of architecture to test architecture viability, security and performance.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 ServiceNow IT Service Management (ITSM)
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Platform Engineer, a typical day involves designing and developing cloud\-based application solutions that seamlessly integrate both cloud and traditional infrastructure components. The role includes building and testing these solutions to ensure they meet performance and security standards. Additionally, the engineer deploys infrastructure and platform environments and creates proof of architecture models to validate the feasibility and robustness of the proposed designs. Collaboration with various teams to align technical solutions with business needs is also a key part of the daily activities.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure smooth deployment and integration of cloud solutions.
* Continuously monitor and optimize cloud infrastructure for performance and cost efficiency.
* Document architecture designs and deployment processes to support knowledge sharing and future maintenance.
* Assist junior team members by providing guidance and support in technical tasks.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in ServiceNow IT Service Management.
* Experience with cloud infrastructure deployment and management.
* Strong understanding of cloud security principles and best practices.
* Ability to design and implement scalable and reliable cloud architectures.
* Familiarity with automation tools and scripting for cloud environment management.
* Knowledge of integration techniques between cloud and on\-premises systems.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in ServiceNow IT Service Management.
* This position is based at our Gurugram office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

52b810a2.title: Solution Architect - Supply Chain Engineering
52b810a2.description:
**Key Responsibilities**
* Define and maintain solution architectures supporting Supply Chain functions, including demand planning, procurement, manufacturing, inventory management, warehousing, logistics, and order fulfillment.
* Collaborate with business leaders and product owners to understand strategic priorities and translate them into scalable technology solutions.
* Develop architecture blueprints, integration designs, data flows, and technical specifications that align with enterprise architecture principles.
* Lead solution design across ERP, WMS, TMS, MES, APS, integration platforms, cloud services, and analytics solutions.
* Ensure seamless integration between enterprise applications using APIs, middleware, event\-driven architectures, and data platforms.
* Evaluate emerging technologies and recommend innovative solutions that improve operational efficiency, visibility, and business agility.
* Provide technical leadership during project delivery, ensuring adherence to architecture standards, security policies, and quality requirements.
* Conduct architecture reviews, design validations, risk assessments, and technical governance throughout the project lifecycle.
* Partner with cybersecurity, infrastructure, data, and application teams to ensure secure, reliable, and high\-performing solutions.
* Support vendor evaluations, technology selection, proof\-of\-concepts, and solution roadmaps.
* Mentor development teams on architecture best practices, design patterns, and technical standards.
* Maintain architecture documentation and contribute to continuous improvement of architecture frameworks and governance processes.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline. Master's degree is preferred.
* 8 to 12 years of experience in enterprise application architecture, solution design, or systems engineering, with significant experience in Supply Chain technology.
* Proven experience designing solutions using ERP platforms such as SAP S/4HANA, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, or equivalent enterprise applications.
* Strong understanding of Supply Chain processes, including procurement, planning, manufacturing, warehouse management, transportation, and distribution.
* Experience with cloud platforms, enterprise integration technologies, APIs, microservices, and event\-driven architectures.


**Required Skills**
* Strong expertise in enterprise and solution architecture methodologies.
* Experience with application integration, middleware, ETL, messaging platforms, and API management.
* Knowledge of cloud technologies (Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud), DevOps, CI/CD, and containerization technologies.
* Familiarity with data architecture, analytics platforms, and master data management.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and presentation abilities.
* Ability to influence cross\-functional teams and drive technical alignment across multiple projects.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with Industry 4\.0, IoT, AI/ML, digital manufacturing, automation, or advanced analytics solutions.
* Certifications such as TOGAF, SAP Solution Architect, Azure Solutions Architect, AWS Certified Solutions Architect, or equivalent.
* Experience in global manufacturing, consumer goods, life sciences, or industrial organizations.
* Knowledge of Agile methodologies, SAFe, and architecture governance frameworks.


 (ref:hirist.tech)

714f0daf.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
714f0daf.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  


**Job Description**



Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?



As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.



This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.



If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.


**Responsibilities**


**Technical Leadership**


* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**


* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**


* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**


* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**


* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**


* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* **Power Platform Expertise**
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* **Power Platform Governance**
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)
* **Azure \& Microsoft Ecosystem**
* Solid experience in integrating Power Platform with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Entra AD) and Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive)
* Experience with authentication and authorization: Entra AD, OAuth, service principals, managed identities
* **DevOps \& ALM**
* Proven experience with Power Platform ALM, including: Managed vs unmanaged solutions
* Versioning and deployment strategies
* **Experience with:**
* Azure DevOps or GitHub
* CI/CD pipelines for Power Platform
* Automated testing strategies (where applicable)
* Familiarity with source control best practices for low\-code assets
* **Development \& Customization Skills**
* Strong proficiency in: Power Fx
* JavaScript (for model\-driven apps)
* Understanding data modeling best practices and normalization
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., SOAP, REST)
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities


**Assets**


* K2 Five / K2 BlackPearl – Workflows, Smart Objects, Forms and Views, Administration \& Troubleshooting, End\-to\-End testing
* Certifications: PL 600 \- Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
* Experience setting up or running a Power Platform Center of Excellence
* Prior experience in citizen development enablement
* Exposure to AI Builder, Copilot Studio, or Power Platform \+ AI scenarios
* Background in enterprise integration


**Why Husky?**


**Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\-being.


**Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.


**Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.


**Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.


**Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.


**Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.


**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.


**Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.


**Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

6c7ffd9e.title: SOLUTION ARCHITECT L1
6c7ffd9e.description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
 Role Purpose
 



 The purpose of this role is to design solution architecture for cross\-system interactions and business logic integration, ensuring seamless interoperability across multiple applications.
 


 ͏
 
 Area of Responsibility
 



 Requirement Analysis\-Participate in requirement discussions with client stakeholders to define solution and implementation level needs basis the business requirements.
 



 Designing\-Create solution architecture designs to meet cross\-system interactions and business logic integration requirements, ensuring system cohesion across multiple applications.
 



 Integration assessment and support\-Assess and evaluate interactions across multiple applications by evaluating implementation dependencies and integration requirements.
 



 Troubleshooting\-Support validation of solution components during implementation and ensures the solution functions as designed.
 



 Risk Analysis and Assessment\-Assist in identifying potential risks by evaluating system performance of implemented architectural solutions, to ensure efficient system landscape.
 


 ͏ ͏ ͏
 
 Mandatory Skills: AI for Product Software Engineering .
 



  
 



 Experience: 8\-10 Years
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

c69d1573.title: Solutions Architect (Remote)
c69d1573.description:
* **Role** 
 : Solutions Architect (Remote)
* **Location** 
 : Remote (Work from Anywhere)
* **Job** 
**Type** 
 : Contract
* **Payout** 
 : $40 \- $100/hour



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Solutions Architect to work on a contract basis. The role involves designing and implementing scalable technical solutions aligned with business objectives. You will collaborate with stakeholders to identify requirements and translate them into architectural designs. This position requires expertise in cloud infrastructure and application development.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Design and architect end\-to\-end solutions for high\-impact projects in a cloud\-native environment.
 



 • Evaluate and recommend technology stacks and frameworks to meet project requirements.
 



 • Work closely with engineering teams to ensure architectural decisions align with business goals.
 



 • Provide technical guidance to teams on best practices for scalability, performance, and security.
 



 • Develop and maintain documentation for architectural decisions and solution designs.
 



  





**Required Skills \& Qualifications:** 




 • Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP is required.
 



 • Proficiency in designing and implementing microservices and serverless architectures.
 



 • Strong knowledge of containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes.
 



 • Familiarity with infrastructure as code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation.
 



 • Ability to analyze technical requirements and propose viable architectural solutions.
 



  





**More About the Opportunity:** 




 This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of cutting\-edge digital solutions. The client operates in a fast\-evolving market, ensuring exposure to innovative technologies and industry best practices.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 




 We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.
 



  





**Apply Now!**

a1117cda.title: Salesforce Engineer II, Service Cloud / Health Cloud- Hyderabad (hybrid)
a1117cda.description:
Salesforce Engineer II, Service Cloud / Health Cloud\- Hyderabad (hybrid)
Syneos Health® is a leading fully\-integrated life sciences services organization built to accelerate customer success. We partner with innovators at every point across the drug development and commercialization continuum, helping them navigate complexity, anticipate change and accelerate progress.
  

  

Our Clinical Solutions team members act with a drug development mindset, applying their years of experience and deep expertise to truly understand customer needs and represent those in the solutions we shape.
  

  

Whether you join us in a Functional Service Provider partnership or a Full\-Service environment, you’ll collaborate with passionate problem solvers, innovating as a team to help our customers achieve their goals. We are agile and driven to deliver – for one another, our customers, and, most importantly, for those in need.
  

  

Discover what your 25,000 future colleagues already know:
  

  

Why Syneos Health
  

* We are passionate about developing our people, through career development and progression; supportive and engaged line management; technical and therapeutic area training; peer recognition and total rewards program.
* We are committed to building an inclusive culture – where you can authentically be yourself. Central to this is our purpose – Driven to Deliver – which captures the passion of our colleagues to show up each day and shape solutions that have the ability to dramatically impact someone’s life.
* We are continuously building the company we all want to work for and our customers want to work with. Why? Because we know that when we bring together smart colleagues from across the world, we can shape the future of healthcare, driving impact for customers and defining the pace of patient progress.
**Job Responsibilities**

**Job Summary**

The Salesforce Engineer II, Service Cloud / Health Cloud designs, develops, configures, tests, and supports Salesforce solutions for Syneos Health’s Service Cloud, Health Cloud, REMS, and Engagement Center platforms. This role focuses on case management, patient and HCP workflows, REMS processes, enrollment, service operations, user experience, automation, reporting support, and platform configuration.


The role works closely with the Senior Salesforce Engineer, Salesforce architecture, product owners, business stakeholders, QA, validation, operations, and platform support teams. The position contributes to the development of an internal Salesforce engineering capability by building platform knowledge, documenting supported components, resolving production issues, and delivering maintainable enhancements across Service Cloud, Health Cloud, REMS, and related capabilities.


**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, configure, test, and support Salesforce solutions across Service Cloud, Health Cloud, REMS, Experience Cloud, and Field Service capabilities.
* Build and maintain Salesforce Flows, Apex classes, triggers, Lightning Web Components, page layouts, dynamic forms, permission sets, validation rules, custom objects, and metadata configuration.
* Support business processes such as case management, patient engagement, HCP engagement, enrollment processing, REMS operations, documentation workflows, surveys, and service operations.
* Work with business analysts and product owners to refine requirements and convert them into maintainable Salesforce solutions.
* Partner with QA and validation teams to support test planning, defect resolution, regression testing, and release evidence.
* Troubleshoot production issues and service requests related to Salesforce configuration, automation, access, data, and user experience.
* Participate in code reviews, design reviews, sprint ceremonies, and release readiness activities.
* Assist in documenting system functionality, technical designs, configuration decisions, and support procedures.
* Follow Syneos standards for secure development, least privilege access, auditability, data protection, and regulated platform delivery.

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or equivalent experience.
* 3 or more years of Salesforce development or administration experience.
* Hands\-on experience with Salesforce Flow, Apex, Lightning Web Components, SOQL, permission sets, custom objects, validation rules, and platform configuration.
* Experience supporting Service Cloud, Health Cloud, Experience Cloud, or similar CRM business processes.
* Experience troubleshooting Salesforce defects and supporting production users.
* Understanding of Salesforce security, including profiles, permission sets, field\-level security, sharing, and role hierarchy.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Salesforce Platform Developer I certification.
* Salesforce Administrator or Advanced Administrator certification.
* Salesforce Service Cloud Consultant or Health Cloud Accredited Professional.
* Experience with REMS, patient services, healthcare, life sciences, contact center, or regulated workflows.
* Experience building technical documentation and support procedures for enterprise platforms.
* Familiarity with Azure DevOps, SFDX, Git, and Salesforce deployment tools.

**Get to know Syneos Health**

  

Over the past 5 years, we have worked with 94% of all Novel FDA Approved Drugs, 95% of EMA Authorized Products and over 200 Studies across 73,000 Sites and 675,000\+ Trial patients.


No matter what your role is, you’ll take the initiative and challenge the status quo with us in a highly competitive and ever\-changing environment. Learn more about Syneos Health.


http://www.syneoshealth.com


**Additional Information**

  

Tasks, duties, and responsibilities as listed in this job description are not exhaustive. The Company, at its sole discretion and with no prior notice, may assign other tasks, duties, and job responsibilities. Equivalent experience, skills, and/or education will also be considered so qualifications of incumbents may differ from those listed in the Job Description. The Company, at its sole discretion, will determine what constitutes as equivalent to the qualifications described above. Further, nothing contained herein should be construed to create an employment contract. Occasionally, required skills/experiences for jobs are expressed in brief terms. Any language contained herein is intended to fully comply with all obligations imposed by the legislation of each country in which it operates, including the implementation of the EU Equality Directive, in relation to the recruitment and employment of its employees. The Company is committed to compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act, including the provision of reasonable accommodations, when appropriate, to assist employees or applicants to perform the essential functions of the job.

* Salesforce Administrator or Advanced Administrator certification.
* Salesforce Service Cloud Consultant or Health Cloud Accredited Professional.
* Experience with REMS, patient services, healthcare, life sciences, contact center, or regulated workflows.
* Experience building technical documentation and support procedures for enterprise platforms.
* Familiarity with Azure DevOps, SFDX, Git, and Salesforce deployment tools.

**Get to know Syneos Health**

  

Over the past 5 years, we have worked with 94% of all Novel FDA Approved Drugs, 95% of EMA Authorized Products and over 200 Studies across 73,000 Sites and 675,000\+ Trial patients.


No matter what your role is, you’ll take the initiative and challenge the status quo with us in a highly competitive and ever\-changing environment. Learn more about Syneos Health.


http://www.syneoshealth.com

**Additional Information**

  

Tasks, duties, and responsibilities as listed in this job description are not exhaustive. The Company, at its sole discretion and with no prior notice, may assign other tasks, duties, and job responsibilities. Equivalent experience, skills, and/or education will also be considered so qualifications of incumbents may differ from those listed in the Job Description. The Company, at its sole discretion, will determine what constitutes as equivalent to the qualifications described above. Further, nothing contained herein should be construed to create an employment contract. Occasionally, required skills/experiences for jobs are expressed in brief terms. Any language contained herein is intended to fully comply with all obligations imposed by the legislation of each country in which it operates, including the implementation of the EU Equality Directive, in relation to the recruitment and employment of its employees. The Company is committed to compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act, including the provision of reasonable accommodations, when appropriate, to assist employees or applicants to perform the essential functions of the job.

**Summary**


The Salesforce Engineer II, Service Cloud / Health Cloud designs, develops, configures, tests, and supports Salesforce solutions for Syneos Health’s Service Cloud, Health Cloud, REMS, and Engagement Center platforms. This role focuses on case management, patient and HCP workflows, REMS processes, enrollment, service operations, user experience, automation, reporting support, and platform configuration.

2e7c754f.title: Cloud Platform Engineer
2e7c754f.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Platform Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Designs, builds, tests, and deploys cloud application solutions that integrate cloud and non\-cloud infrastructure. Can deploy infrastructure and platform environments, creates a proof of architecture to test architecture viability, security and performance.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 AWS Architecture
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As an AWS\-focused Cloud Engineer, you are responsible for designing, implementing, and operating secure, scalable, and reliable AWS cloud environments within the cloud landing zone and wider infrastructure ecosystem. You provide technical leadership, ensure adherence to cloud best practices, and collaborate with cross\-functional teams to optimize cloud operations, cost efficiency and compliance.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

 Design, build, and maintain AWS cloud environments that meet organizational requirements for scalability, performance, reliability, and security.
   

  

 Architect AWS\-based solutions using services such asEC2, ECS/EKS, Lambda, RDS/Aurora, API Gateway, S3, Cloud Front, and advanced networking components.
   

  

 Implement AWS security and compliance controls, including IAM, SCPs, KMS, encryption, Secrets Manager, CloudTrail, Guard Duty, and AWS Organizations governance.
   

  

 Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform to enable automated, consistent, and repeatable environment provisioning.
   

  

 Optimize cloud performance and cost by applying best practices for autoscaling, caching, right\-sizing, tagging, and cost monitoring using AWS Cost Explorer/Budgets.
   

  

 Monitor, operate, and troubleshoot AWS workloads using a centralized observability solution using the LGTMstack.
   

  

 Support containerized and serverless workloads, including managing EKS clusters, ECS/Fargatedeployments, and Lambda\-based architectures.
   

  

 Lead incident response for cloud\-related issues, ensuring timely resolution and root\-cause analysis. Create and maintain accurate, up\-to\-date documentation for architectures, operational procedures, and cloud governance guidelines.
   

  

 Collaborate with developers, architects, cybersecurity teams, and product owners to enable cloud\-native solution delivery.
   

  

 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

 Expert\-level knowledge of AWS and hands\-on experience with core and advanced services (compute, networking, storage, IAM, container and serverless services, CI/CD, and monitoring).
   

  

 Strong proficiency in Infrastructure as Code, primarily with Terraform/Terr grunt or Open Tofu
   

  

 Scripting and automation experience in Python or Bash for orchestration, tooling, and operational automation.
   

  

 Deep understanding of AWS networking, including VPC design, subnets, routing, NACLs, security groups, VPN/Direct Connect, private/hybrid connectivity, and network security patterns.
   

  

 Cloud security expertise, including IAM design, least
   

  

 privilege models, KMS, encryption strategies, compliance requirements, and vulnerability management on AWS.
   

  

 Experience operating container platforms, such as Amazon EKS or ECS, including cluster design, networking, scaling, observability, and secure operation.
   

  

 Knowledge of monitoring and observability tools, preferably Prometheus/Grafana but also CloudWatch,CloudTrail, X\-Ray, or equivalent.
   

  

 Solid troubleshooting and incident\-management skills, including analysing logs, metrics, distributed systems, and multi\-service AWS environments.
   

  

 Experience with CI/CD pipelines (preferably GitLab CI, or AWS Code Pipeline/Code Build, GitHub Actions, or similar).
   

  

 Strong documentation and communication skills in English.
   

  

 Additional Information:\-
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in AWS Architecture.
* This position is based at our Chennai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required., 15 years full time education

 for an experienced Cloud Engineer with a strong foundation in cloud infrastructure, DevOps, monitoring, and cost optimization. f5cec4a3.title: Enterprise Sales Specialist- IT Infra Managed Services/ Applications
f5cec4a3.description:
**Title:** 
 Client Manager/ Sr. Client Manager
 



**About the Role:** 
 The role requires strong
 
 Enterprise Sales experience in IT Infra Managed services Sales/ Application Sales space for the West region which will include Ahmedabad along with Mumbai.
 



**Location:** 
 Mumbai
 



**Experience:** 
 10\- 18 Years
 



**Travel:** 
 Yes
 



  





**Job Description summary:** 




 The primary responsibility of the Senior Client Manager is to take full ownership of his/her assigned accounts. Their key focus is to manage and grow relationships to drive land, expansion and renewals across all solutions within assigned accounts. They are required to identify \& pursue leads
 



  





 Responsible for selling the company’s products or services to and maintaining relationships with existing accounts.
 



  





**Key Roles and Responsibilities:** 



* Manage and grow relationships to drive land, expansion and renewals across all solutions within assigned accounts.
* Identify \& Pursue leads.
* Minimize churn and maximize retention in assigned accounts.
* Drive client satisfaction throughout the entire lifecycle of the clients’ buying process.
* Generate demand by assisting clients to identify current needs and then effectively articulate how NTT Data can add value through our services and solutions.
* Influence and work closely with vendors to achieve required results.
* Use NTT Data’s sales tools and methodology to effectively manage accounts, opportunities, pipelines and forecast.
* Take ownership of a range of clients within the assigned segment.
* Develop open and effective channels of communication in with each client within the assigned account.
* Encourage revenue growth by inspiring clients to additional services.
* Become the reliable point of contact for clients that is required to establish a strong business relationship.
* Able to determine the best solution requirements for each client that can be deployed by other departments.
* Build enduring relationships and display an understanding of the client industry, business environment and strategy to identify current and future opportunities for NTT Data
* Develop and/or align governance and compliance policies in own practice area to identify and manage risk exposure liability.
* Monitor and control financial governance and compliance throughout an area of specialization in order to manage financial cost.



  





**Knowledge, Skills and Attributes:** 



* Sales business acumen \- Skills supporting successful selling through organizational and business outcome mindset. Success will require focusing on planning, leveraging tools and data,. Developing the skills to understand your client’s business (including commercial and financial aspects) in order to bring value to them from NTT’s portfolio of services.
* Sales client engagement and management \- Skills used to effectively manage and analyze the client throughout the client lifecycle, with the goal of improving client relationships and driving sales growth. Success will require detailed understanding of client needs, effective sales planning, and building trust, all while managing to client expectations. Developing the skills required to know your client, building effective and lasting relationships with them and to be seen as a trusted advisor.
* Sales solution skills \- Knowledge of NTT Ltd.'s offerings, client applications, use cases and market trends and the skill to apply them to individual client and prospect situations that positions the sales team member as an expert client advisor. Success will require the ability to link NTT offerings, including high\-value services to specific client and prospect needs and outcomes.
* Sales pursuit \- Skills and knowledge that enable a sales team member to create success by identifying and advancing opportunities at assigned prospects and clients. Success will require both individual ownership as well as accountability for coordinating internal and external resources in order to close sales opportunities.



  





**Academic Qualifications and Certifications:** 



* BE and or MBA/ Post\-graduate qualification would be advantageous



  





**Required Experience:** 



* 10\+ years of experience in enterprise sales in the IT services industry.
* Prefer Experience of working with Tier 1 Tech companies handling Enterprise sales
* Experience in the areas of application services and infrastructure services
* Advanced experience in a similar role in a similar environment
* Advanced experience in a sales environment
* Advanced sales and client engagement experience coupled with a good understanding of business, sourcing and technology market
* Advanced experience negotiating with clients and vendors
* Advanced experience with business to business and business to consumer sales techniques
* Experience providing mentoring and coaching to less experienced client managers
* Advanced experience analyzing commercial information
* Experience working with Salesforce.com platform

b2af0ccc.title: Delivery Manager
b2af0ccc.description:
**Deliver connected services that power the future of mobility!**


At WirelessCar, we develop digital services that connect millions of vehicles around the world. Our solutions enable safer, smarter, and more sustainable mobility, working with some of the world's leading automotive brands.


We're now looking for a **Delivery Manager** to join one of our global Solution Areas. This is a key customer\-facing role for someone who enjoys leading complex software deliveries, building trusted customer relationships, and driving operational excellence across cross\-functional teams.


As **Delivery Manager**, you report to the **Manager Solution Area** and are a member of the **Solution Area Leadership Team**. You are accountable for the end\-to\-end delivery, performance, and quality of one or more customer deliveries, while contributing to the overall performance and development of the Solution Area.

#### **Your mission**


As Delivery Manager, you ensure that customer commitments are fulfilled throughout the entire delivery lifecycle. You balance customer value, operational stability, financial performance, and compliance while coordinating cross\-functional teams to deliver high\-quality software and services.


You act as the operational owner of the customer delivery, ensuring alignment between customer expectations, business objectives, and the Solution Area strategy. Working closely with engineering teams, product management, operations, and customer stakeholders, you create transparency, manage risks proactively, and continuously improve delivery performance.

#### **What you'll do**

**Own customer delivery**

* Be accountable for end\-to\-end delivery of one or more customer deliveries.
* Ensure fulfilment of committed deliveries and agreed Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
* Ensure overall quality, stability, and performance of delivered solutions and services.
* Act as the primary operational escalation point for the customer.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with customer stakeholders.
* Provide transparent communication on delivery status, risks, and performance.

**Lead delivery execution**

* Lead the delivery core team and coordinate cross\-functional execution across the delivery lifecycle.
* Define delivery priorities, roadmaps, and milestones aligned with customer agreements and Solution Area objectives.
* Sponsor delivery epics and major customer changes.
* Drive collaboration across engineering, operations, product, and supporting functions.
* Ensure deliveries follow established governance and Ways of Working.
* Continuously improve delivery performance and operational efficiency.

**Drive commercial and operational performance**

* Manage delivery run\-time and one\-time costs within agreed targets.
* Monitor customer change requests, development costs, and time charging.
* Identify and proactively manage financial risks and cost deviations.
* Contribute to forecasting and financial transparency.

**Manage governance, security and risk**

* Ensure compliance with regulatory, privacy, and governance requirements.
* Identify, assess, mitigate, and escalate delivery, security, and compliance risks.
* Act as Information Owner / Processing Manager where applicable.
* Support sustainable, secure, and compliant service delivery.

**Contribute to Solution Area leadership**

* Contribute as a member of the Solution Area Leadership Team to planning, prioritization, and continuous improvement.
* Collaborate closely with the Manager Solution Area and fellow leaders to strengthen delivery capability, operational excellence, and business performance.
* Contribute to strategic initiatives and the evolution of ways of working across the Solution Area.

#### **Who you are**


You're a collaborative leader who creates clarity in complex environments and brings people together around common goals. You build trust with customers and colleagues alike, combining commercial awareness with structured execution and a strong focus on delivering customer value.


You enjoy working across organizational boundaries, influencing without formal authority, and creating momentum through collaboration rather than hierarchy.

#### **We believe you bring**

* Experience in Delivery Management, Program Management, Project Management, or similar leadership roles.
* Experience leading complex software or digital service deliveries.
* Strong understanding of software development and Agile ways of working.
* Experience coordinating cross\-functional teams in an international environment.
* Strong customer and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience balancing customer satisfaction, operational performance, and business objectives.
* Experience managing delivery risks, dependencies, and financial follow\-up.
* Excellent communication skills in English, both written and spoken.

#### **We offer you**

* A people\-focused company with healthy work–life balance and a hybrid work model
* A flat organizational culture grounded in Nordic leadership values — trust, openness, autonomy
* A high\-tech environment with cutting\-edge products \& services
* A global workplace with clear opportunities for role and career growth
* Involvement in services that support Electric Vehicles and sustainability
* A personal tech fund where you choose the tools you prefer

**Way of Working**


The work location for this role is our office in central Bangalore, India. At WirelessCar we operate in a hybrid setup, combining the benefits of office collaboration with the flexibility of remote work.

**Recruitment Process:**


Ready to lead a team that shapes secure and sustainable mobility solutions for the future?


Apply now and join our journey!


Last application date: **July 31, 2026**

**Note before applying:**Our company language is English, please submit your application in English, cover letter is not required; instead, you will answer a few short questions to help us understand your experience and ambitions.

**To join our journey**  

WirelessCar is always on the move, often into uncharted land. We are curious, believe in collaboration and are always open to new ideas on how we can make a difference. When you join our journey, you will be part of a great crew of highly competent and warm hearted people from all over the world.

7b165791.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
7b165791.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

  



**Job Description**



As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.


**Responsibilities:**


* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)


* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis


* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way


* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled


* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals


* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.


* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.


* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.


* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.


* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract


* Manage and lead weekly call with customer


* Escalate issues when required


* Builds relationship with customers


* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


**Qualifications:**


* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.


* Project Management experience


* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude


* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage


* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications

  


* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

c5d3dbb0.title: Senior Real Estate Product Delivery Manager
c5d3dbb0.description:
**Some careers have more impact than others.**


If you’re looking for a career where you can make a real impression, join HSBC and discover how valued you’ll be.


HSBC is one of the largest banking and financial services organisations in the world, with operations in 62 countries and territories. We aim to be where the growth is, enabling businesses to thrive and economies to prosper, and, ultimately, helping people to fulfil their hopes and realise their ambitions.


We are currently seeking an experienced professional to join our team in the role of **Senior Real Estate Product Delivery Manager**

**In this role, you will:**

* This job profile provides a broad overview of the Job Category Delivery Management and is not intended to exhaustively describe the job.The successful candidate will lead a team of Business Analysts within Product Delivery and will be accountable for the ongoing maintenance and development of Yardi IA. Activities include process design and business requirement specification; support data flow developments and system configuration; report development; SIT testing and implementation and providing support to the Ops teams.
* The Candidate will also work alongside the value stream and play a key role in supporting the Real Estate Product strategy. The role will also liaise with the vendor and internal IT to ensure developments are delivered in a timely and safe fashion.
* This is a Delivery role in Fund Services working within the Private Assets Product Delivery Team. The purpose of the role is to steer a team of analysts to deliver strategic change in a safe and agile fashion and to provide technical support to the BAU teams.The role holder will work alongside the Yardi Applications owner and will be responsible for.
* Managing and owning the development and maintenance of the Yardi applications working alongside the vendor and internal stakeholders to deliver solutions that satisfy business requirements. Supporting the Strategic product build and the migration of strategic clients; Production support/defect management; Ensuring the team delivers in line with its demand; Planning and prioritisation of day\-to\-day services across the team.
* Overall Value Stream delivery of the Real Estate portfolio; Support the Product Delivery Lead in setting the Value Stream Delivery strategy and drive standards across the teams for efficiency and effective delivery.
* Support the Product Delivery Lead in enabling the delivery of Securities Services strategy through Product and Client led change delivery; Provide hands on direction, mentoring and coaching to those involved in the team; Promote an environment of inclusion, diversity, collaboration and trust.
* Empowers the team to deliver better outcomes with stakeholders, alignment to a “Front\-to\-Back” sustainable product and operating model.Promotes the value of challenging the status quo, seeking to improve ways of working and having a forward\-thinking mindset, in line with the Group’s Values and Strategy

**To be successful you will:**

* Sound knowledge of Real Estate; Solid knowledge of Yardi Investment Accounting modules and Yardi Voyager; Proven experience implementing and running large Yardi Voyager systems
* Solid understanding of the product development cycle; Successful experience directly supporting Investment Accounting modules; Experience with Extract Transform and Load (ETL) functionality
* Yardi loan module, including Debt Manager; Yardi Commercial module; Data implementation; Writing simple SQL queries and YSR reports
* Working with stakeholders to gain information required; Using Voyager to troubleshoot helpdesk tickets
* Change delivery practices including a sound knowledge of a range of methodologies
* Using Jira (or similar solutions) to manage and track task delivery

**You’ll achieve more at HSBC**

**Hsbc.Com/Careers**


HSBC is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and, opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. We encourage applications from all suitably qualified persons irrespective of, but not limited to, their gender or genetic information, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, social status, medical care leave requirements, political affiliation, people with disabilities, color, national origin, veteran status, etc., We consider all applications based on merit and suitability to the role.”


Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.

**\*\*\*Issued By HSBC Electronic Data Processing (India) Private LTD\*\*\***

53e4ae44.title: Technical delivery Manager
53e4ae44.description:
**About The Role**
 Techdome is hiring a Technical Delivery Manager to own end\-to\-end delivery of software projects across our payments and platform products.
   

  

**You don't need to have been a Delivery Manager before.** 
 If you're a Tech Lead, Senior Engineer, Engineering Lead, Scrum Master, or Project Lead who has been driving projects, unblocking teams, and talking to stakeholders — and you're ready to own delivery formally — this role is built for you. We care about capability and readiness, not the title on your last offer letter.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own end\-to\-end delivery of software projects: scope, timeline, quality, and budget.
* Lead and coordinate cross\-functional teams (engineering, QA, product, design).
* Run Agile / Scrum delivery: planning, standups, reviews, and retrospectives.
* Manage client and stakeholder communication, expectations, and escalations.
* Identify, track, and mitigate delivery risks early.
* Plan resourcing and capacity; keep teams unblocked.
* Report on project health and delivery metrics to leadership and clients.


 What We're Looking For
   

  

* 5\+ years in software development or delivery, with experience leading a team, module, or project — formally or informally.
* A technical background: you can hold your own in engineering discussions and understand trade\-offs.
* Hands\-on exposure to Agile / Scrum ways of working (running or actively participating in ceremonies).
* Strong communication: comfortable managing clients, stakeholders, and escalations.
* Ownership mindset: you take responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks.
* Familiarity with Jira, Confluence, or similar tools.


**We'll Consider You Even If**
* You've never held a "Delivery Manager" or "Project Manager" title.
* Your leadership experience is as a Tech Lead or Senior Engineer who ran projects.
* You don't have a PM certification.


 Nice to Have (Not Required)
   

  

* Payments / fintech project experience.
* PMP, CSM, SAFe, or similar certification.
* Comfort using AI tools to speed up delivery, reporting, and documentation.


 Why Techdome
   

  

 Technology\-driven company with 10\+ years building products across industries, including payments and fintech. Real ownership, fast growth, and a collaborative team where your decisions have impact. This is a genuine step\-up opportunity: you'll own delivery from day one, with leadership support as you grow into the role.
   

  

 Hiring Process
   

  

 Fast and transparent. We use JIA, our in\-house AI hiring platform, to review every application consistently and respond within a working day. From there: a delivery / leadership round, a team discussion, and an offer.
   

  

**Not sure if you qualify? Apply anyway.** 
 If you've been doing the work without the title, we want to see your application.

603a2080.title: Delivery Manager
603a2080.description:
**Deliver connected services that power the future of mobility!**
 At WirelessCar, we develop digital services that connect millions of vehicles around the world. Our solutions enable safer, smarter, and more sustainable mobility, working with some of the world's leading automotive brands.
   

  

 We're now looking for a
 **Delivery Manager** 
 to join one of our global Solution Areas. This is a key customer\-facing role for someone who enjoys leading complex software deliveries, building trusted customer relationships, and driving operational excellence across cross\-functional teams.
   

  

 As
 **Delivery Manager** 
 , you report to the
 **Manager Solution Area** 
 and are a member of the
 **Solution Area Leadership Team** 
 . You are accountable for the end\-to\-end delivery, performance, and quality of one or more customer deliveries, while contributing to the overall performance and development of the Solution Area.
   

  

**Your mission**
 As Delivery Manager, you ensure that customer commitments are fulfilled throughout the entire delivery lifecycle. You balance customer value, operational stability, financial performance, and compliance while coordinating cross\-functional teams to deliver high\-quality software and services.
   

  

 You act as the operational owner of the customer delivery, ensuring alignment between customer expectations, business objectives, and the Solution Area strategy. Working closely with engineering teams, product management, operations, and customer stakeholders, you create transparency, manage risks proactively, and continuously improve delivery performance.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
**Own customer delivery**
* Be accountable for end\-to\-end delivery of one or more customer deliveries.
* Ensure fulfilment of committed deliveries and agreed Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
* Ensure overall quality, stability, and performance of delivered solutions and services.
* Act as the primary operational escalation point for the customer.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with customer stakeholders.
* Provide transparent communication on delivery status, risks, and performance.


**Lead delivery execution**
* Lead the delivery core team and coordinate cross\-functional execution across the delivery lifecycle.
* Define delivery priorities, roadmaps, and milestones aligned with customer agreements and Solution Area objectives.
* Sponsor delivery epics and major customer changes.
* Drive collaboration across engineering, operations, product, and supporting functions.
* Ensure deliveries follow established governance and Ways of Working.
* Continuously improve delivery performance and operational efficiency.


**Drive commercial and operational performance**
* Manage delivery run\-time and one\-time costs within agreed targets.
* Monitor customer change requests, development costs, and time charging.
* Identify and proactively manage financial risks and cost deviations.
* Contribute to forecasting and financial transparency.


**Manage governance, security and risk**
* Ensure compliance with regulatory, privacy, and governance requirements.
* Identify, assess, mitigate, and escalate delivery, security, and compliance risks.
* Act as Information Owner / Processing Manager where applicable.
* Support sustainable, secure, and compliant service delivery.


**Contribute to Solution Area leadership**
* Contribute as a member of the Solution Area Leadership Team to planning, prioritization, and continuous improvement.
* Collaborate closely with the Manager Solution Area and fellow leaders to strengthen delivery capability, operational excellence, and business performance.
* Contribute to strategic initiatives and the evolution of ways of working across the Solution Area.


**Who You Are**
 You're a collaborative leader who creates clarity in complex environments and brings people together around common goals. You build trust with customers and colleagues alike, combining commercial awareness with structured execution and a strong focus on delivering customer value.
   

  

 You enjoy working across organizational boundaries, influencing without formal authority, and creating momentum through collaboration rather than hierarchy.
   

  

**We believe you bring**
* Experience in Delivery Management, Program Management, Project Management, or similar leadership roles.
* Experience leading complex software or digital service deliveries.
* Strong understanding of software development and Agile ways of working.
* Experience coordinating cross\-functional teams in an international environment.
* Strong customer and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience balancing customer satisfaction, operational performance, and business objectives.
* Experience managing delivery risks, dependencies, and financial follow\-up.
* Excellent communication skills in English, both written and spoken.


****We offer you****
* A people\-focused company with healthy work–life balance and a hybrid work model
* A flat organizational culture grounded in Nordic leadership values — trust, openness, autonomy
* A high\-tech environment with cutting\-edge products \& services
* A global workplace with clear opportunities for role and career growth
* Involvement in services that support Electric Vehicles and sustainability
* A personal tech fund where you choose the tools you prefer


**Way of Working**
 The work location for this role is our office in central Bangalore, India. At WirelessCar we operate in a hybrid setup, combining the benefits of office collaboration with the flexibility of remote work.
   

  

**Recruitment Process:**
 Ready to lead a team that shapes secure and sustainable mobility solutions for the future?
   

  

 Apply now and join our journey!
   

  

 Last application date:
 **July 31, 2026**
**Note before applying:** 
 Our company language is English, please submit your application in English, cover letter is not required; instead, you will answer a few short questions to help us understand your experience and ambitions.
   

  

**To join our journey**
 WirelessCar is always on the move, often into uncharted land. We are curious, believe in collaboration and are always open to new ideas on how we can make a difference. When you join our journey, you will be part of a great crew of highly competent and warm hearted people from all over the world.

27c3e6f8.title: Technical Delivery Manager (8+ Years Experience) – Hybrid, Bangalore
27c3e6f8.description:
**Location:** 
 Bangalore (Hybrid)
   

  

**Experience:** 
 8\+ Years
   

  

**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
   

  

 We are hiring a seasoned
 **Technical Delivery Manager** 
 with a strong background in telecom and B2B project delivery. This role demands a technically sound leader who can drive end\-to\-end delivery in agile environments, ensuring quality outcomes across complex telco solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of telecom\-based B2B projects, ensuring timely and high\-quality execution
* Coordinate across cross\-functional teams, stakeholders, and clients to manage scope, priorities, risks, and dependencies
* Apply agile delivery principles to manage and optimize workflows, sprints, and releases
* Monitor project health through metrics and proactively resolve issues to keep delivery on track
* Build strong client relationships through consistent communication, transparency, and technical credibility


**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Minimum of 8 years of experience in IT project and delivery management, with a strong technical background
* At least 5 years of domain experience in the Telecom (Telco) industry
* Proven experience in B2B delivery environments
* Deep understanding of Agile delivery frameworks (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and ability to manage multiple project streams simultaneously
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills


**Preferred Profile**
* Individuals who have grown from technical roles into delivery leadership positions
* Experience managing distributed teams in hybrid work setups
* Familiarity with BRB (Build, Run, and Business support) delivery structures in telecom


**If you’re a tech\-savvy delivery leader with a strong telco background and a drive for excellence, we welcome you to join our dynamic team.**

28df0203.description:

 : Coimbatore

 Any UG/PG

 As per company policy

 We are seeking a highly skilled Technical Program Manager to drive end\-to\-end services and
 



 product development initiatives at iHub/Square. The role requires strong technical expertise, program
 



 management experience, and the ability to collaborate across cross\-functional teams to ensure timely
 



 and high\-quality delivery.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 ● Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of multiple projects in services and product development.
 



 ● Define project scope, roadmap, timelines, and success metrics.
 



 ● Collaborate with internal teams, external partners, and stakeholders to align on objectives and progress.
 



 ● Mentor and guide engineering and delivery teams to enhance efficiency and quality.
 



 ● Maintain comprehensive project documentation including timelines, progress reports, and performance metrics.
 



 ● Identify risks early and implement mitigation strategies to ensure smooth execution.
 



 ● Ensure adherence to quality standards and project governance processes.

**Technical Expertise:** 




 ● Hands\-on experience in product and service development.
 



 ● Knowledge of programming (Java, Python, MERN/MEAN Stack), APIs, cloud platforms, DevOps, automation, AI/LLM/Data Science exposure is a plus.
 



 ● Familiarity with project management tools and methodologies (Agile, Scrum, Kanban, Waterfall).
 



 ● Strong understanding of SDLC and user\-centered design principles.
 



  





**Certifications (Preferred):** 




 ● PMP, CSM, CAPM, Prince2, PMI\-ACP, or equivalent certifications.
 



  





**Soft Skills:**
