16bea2b7.title: CT Managed Services Technology Solution Lead
16bea2b7.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**Technology Solution Lead – Manager**
 (Finance, Accounting and Tax \| Technology Presales \| Managed Services)
   

  

**Role Summary**
 As an EY Global Managed Services – Technology Solution Lead (TSL), you will own and execute technology solutioning and presales for finance focused, technology powered managed services deals. Translate finance, accounting and tax requirements of clients, into cloud ready, costed, and delivery feasible technology solutions. This is a technology presales role, not business consulting or delivery.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Technology Solutioning
+ Lead technology led requirement discovery with finance, accounting and tax stakeholders
+ Define end\-to\-end technology scope across ERP, cloud, data, integration, and AI
+ Act as the primary technology solution owner for the deal


* Deal Shaping \& Architecture
+ Design solution architectures across presales stages
+ Assess feasibility, delivery approach, resourcing, and cost
+ Build cloud first solutions for finance domains (R2R, P2P, O2C, Controls, Reporting, etc)
+ Integrate client and EY technology solutions into a managed services construct


* Proposal Development
+ Own technology sections of proposals.
+ Define transition, transformation, and steady state technology models.
+ Recommend ERP, cloud, data, automation, and AI components aligned to deal outcomes.


**Essential Functions of the Job:**
* End\-to\-end Technology Solution Engineering:


 RFI/RFP response \- Engineer deal level solution designs spanning integration with diverse client systems and data sources → EY data solutions → EY finance and accounting solutions (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud/Microsoft Dynamics 365 BC / F\&O and the likes) → agentic AI and specialist finance SaaS platforms.
   

  

* Technical Landscape Transition \& Assumptions:


 Define technology solution transition and transformation models, integration patterns, data movement, AI infusion, cloud constraints, extensibility approach, and non functional assumptions —excluding functional configuration or blueprinting.
   

  

* Feasibility, Sizing \& Commercial Inputs:


 Provide hard inputs on technical feasibility, delivery approach, effort drivers, dependencies, constraints, risks, and cost (including TCO/ROI) levers across the full technology solution stack, including best\-of breed AI bolt\- ons.
   

  

* Presales to Delivery Technical Handover:


 Package technology scope, solution architectures, assumptions, and constraints for delivery teams to execute post deal close; support mobilization/design authority through early transition as needed.
   

  

* Emerging Technology Awareness:


 Evaluate applicability of emerging technologies (cloud services, data platforms, AI/agentic solutions) within deal solutions and incorporate them where they materially improve feasibility, scalability, or commercial outcomes.
   

  

**Knowledge and Skills Requirements:**
* Technology Led Consulting Mindset (Finance, Accounting \& Tax)


 Experience applying digital finance transformation concepts strictly through technology solutioning, deal shaping, and presales engineering along with next\-gen finance operating model design and advisory.
   

  

* Finance Domain Context (Functional)


 Finance, accounting, tax and reporting knowledge \- sufficient to understand requirements, make architecture, integration, and feasibility decisions across multi\-ERP anchored solutions.
   

  

* ERP Anchored Presales Solutioning


 Multiple hands\-on implementation experience with SAP S/4HANA(preferred) and/or Dynamics 365 BC / F\&O, with deep understanding of R2R, P2P and O2C process areas.
   

  

* Multi\-Component Stack Design


 Solutioning across integrations → data/ETL → ERP → specialist / AI finance platforms (e.g., Blackline, HighRadius, Hypatos, Caseware, TR OneSource, Vertex and similar tools).
   

  

* Cloud, Data \& Integration Architecture


 Working knowledge of multi\-cloud architectures, data platforms, and crosssystem integrations across hybrid (cloud \+ on\-prem) environments.
   

  

* Presales Execution Ownership


 Direct ownership of RFI/RFP tech responses, managed services proposals, tech solution write ups, and client orals for large enterprise pursuits.
   

  

* Feasibility, Costing \& Risk Discipline


 Ability to synthesize functional and non functional requirements, build multi component cost models (incl. TCO/ROI), and manage RAID during presales.
   

  

* Executive Communication \& Stakeholder Alignment


 Crisp verbal and written communication with senior executives and proven ability to align globally distributed, cross functional stakeholders across pursuits.
   

  

**Other Requirements:**
* Individual Contributor


 Proven ability to influence without authority in deal and presales contexts.
   

  

* Global Delivery Exposure


 Hands on experience working across offshore / onsite models and multiple geographies.
   

  

* Delivery \& Engineering Awareness


 Familiarity with SAFe and DevOps practices sufficient to assess feasibility during presales.
   

  

* Architecture Discipline


 Exposure to architecture frameworks (e.g., TOGAF / IASA) applied practically to solution design. Certification is desired by not mandatory.
   

  

* Service Design Awareness


 Working knowledge of IT service strategy and design concepts (e.g., ITIL v3/v4\) relevant to managed services. Certification is desired by not mandatory.
   

  

* Mobility


 Willingness to undertake domestic and international travel as required for pursuits and client engagements.
   

  

**Job Requirements:**
* Education:
+ BS/MS in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
+ MBA in Finance/Operations preferred
+ Certifications in any of data, AI, architecture framework (TOGAF) or ERP (SAP, Dynamics, etc) preferred


* Experience:
+ 12\+ years of total professional experience across technology, business development \& thought leadership, of which
+ 4\+ years of technology presales/solution consulting experience
+ 8\+ years of hands\-on techno\-functional ERP implementation experiences across core modules – P2P, O2C and R2R


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

c932d577.title: Solution Architect - ITS, GSI & ITS Vertical
c932d577.description:
**Description**
 Sales, Marketing and Global Services (SMGS)
   

  

 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 AWS Solutions Architects are trusted advisors to our customers, helping them solve some of their largest business challenges by designing and advising on some of the most scalable, flexible and resilient solutions in the world.
   

  

 Working closely with internal teams at AWS, you’ll identify how our customers push the boundaries and how we can improve our services to obsess over our customers.
   

  

 Being a thought leader who creates and presents content you’ll help all of our customers scale and grow in non\-linear ways, using AWS as their building blocks.
   

  

 In this role, you will push technology boundaries and help scale some of the Emerging companies across various Verticals in India. You will have the opportunity to partner with customers early in their cloud journey and help them scale as well as customers further in their cloud journey where you can have visible and measurable impact in their growth ambitions.
   

  

 You will test traditional thinking by pushing the boundaries for your customers and AWS to dream and deliver beyond what they think is possible.
   

  

 Our customers’ needs are moving fast, so you will too. Be part of the team helping our Emergin customers find innovative and transformative ways to reinvent their business!
   

  

 \#aws\-ags\-India
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Work directly with customers to accelerate their business outcomes and recommend best\-practice cloud architectures in line with their long\-term business needs.
   

  

* Drive technical solutions discussions with your customers, diving deep into the details to solve complex technical problems and use your knowledge to craft scalable, flexible, and resilient cloud architectures.
* Scope and own customer engagements, with attention towards clear and well\-defined objectives and success criteria.
* Work backwards from your customer's business needs to accelerate adoption of the most appropriate AWS technology
* Define and execute on the strategy by engaging highly technical teams (Solutions Architects, Technical Account Managers, AWS professional services consultants and consulting/managed services partners).
* Act as a thought leader in the wider community, playing a key role in educating, sharing best practices, presenting at events, writing white papers, blogs, and running workshops.
* Share the voice of the customer to influence the roadmap of new features and services for the AWS platform. Proactively work within the organisation to influence the evolution of the platform.
* Serve as a key technical member of the Solutions Architecture team through influencing decision makers across multiple domains to ensure customer success in building applications and services on the AWS platform which align to long\-term business goals.


 A day in the life
   

  

 Our solutions architects are experienced technologists with technical breadth and depth coupled with strong interpersonal skills. The variety of customers is huge as we work across all industries within the SMB segment, like FSI, Retail , IT\& ITeS , Media and Entertainment to name a few. On a daily basis you will work alongside people who are leading the way in designing cloud bases architecture. We are the trusted advisor to our customers, so challenge our customers to think differently, learn more build elegant, transformative solutions!
   

  

 As a Solutions Architect you’ll own the overall technical relationship between customers and AWS and make recommendations on security, cost, performance, reliability and operational efficiency. They work to understand the customer's business needs and give prescriptive guidance on how to create business value with technology. To do this they collaborate with other teams such as account management, professional services, support, product teams and the AWS partner ecosystem.
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree
* 8\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 3\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience
* 10\+ years of IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking experience
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with AI/ML technologies
* Experience working with Gen AI/ML technologies and services and building solutions for customers


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Delhi

cbc4440f.title: Technical Implementation & Pre-Sales ExecutiveSales Executive
cbc4440f.description:
Company: Detective Monkey Education \& Careers Private Limited
 



 Employment Type: Full\-time
 



 Location: Assam
 



 Work Mode: Initially remote for 2–3 months; office\-based/hybrid after our office becomes operational
 



 Fixed Salary: ₹10,000 per month
 



 Total Earning Potential: ₹20,000–₹25,000 per month, including performance incentives
 



 About the Role
 



 We are looking for a technically capable and confident individual who can manage school ERP/LMS implementation, data migration, basic website development, technical support and product demonstrations.
 



 This is a combined technical implementation and pre\-sales role. The selected candidate should be comfortable working with technology and communicating directly with school owners, principals, administrators and teachers.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 • Collect, clean and structure school data from Excel files according to the required LMS format
 



 • Upload and verify student, staff, fee and academic data in the ERP/LMS
 



 • Configure the ERP/LMS according to each school’s requirements
 



 • Conduct online and on\-site product demonstrations for schools
 



 • Explain ERP/LMS features clearly to school management and staff
 



 • Assist interested schools during follow\-ups and support the sales conversion process
 



 • Build basic school websites using AI tools such as Lovable
 



 • Connect domains and manage basic DNS, hosting and deployment configurations
 



 • Provide technical assistance during school onboarding
 



 • Train school administrators, teachers and other users
 



 • Identify technical issues and coordinate with the development team when required
 



 • Maintain proper records of implementations, demonstrations, issues and follow\-ups
 



 • Ensure that school data and company credentials remain confidential and secure
 



 Required Skills
 



 • Basic understanding of coding and software development
 



 • Ability to create functional websites using Lovable or similar AI development tools
 



 • Basic knowledge of domains, DNS, hosting, servers and website deployment
 



 • Good knowledge of Excel and data formatting
 



 • Understanding of ERP, LMS or school management software
 



 • Ability to learn new software quickly
 



 • Good communication and presentation skills
 



 • Confidence in conducting live product demonstrations
 



 • Ability to explain technical features in simple language
 



 • Strong problem\-solving ability and attention to detail
 



 • Willingness to travel to schools when required
 



 Preferred Candidate Profile
 



 • Graduate in BCA, B.Tech, B.Sc. Computer Science, IT or a related field
 



 • Freshers with strong practical technical knowledge are encouraged to apply
 



 • Previous experience with ERP/LMS implementation, technical support, SaaS products, websites or software demonstrations will be an advantage
 



 • Candidates should be responsible, professional and comfortable working independently
 



 • Preference may be given to candidates based in Assam
 



 • Access to a personal laptop and a stable internet connection is preferred
 



 Compensation and Incentives
 



 • Fixed salary: ₹10,000 per month
 



 • Additional incentives for successfully completed school onboarding
 



 • Incentives for qualified product demonstrations
 



 • Conversion incentives when a demonstrated school purchases the product and completes the required payment
 



 • Additional incentives for website development and deployment
 



 • Total monthly earnings may reach ₹20,000–₹25,000 depending on performance
 



 • Compensation and responsibilities will be reviewed based on performance
 



 Selection Process
 



 Shortlisted candidates will complete a practical assessment involving:
 



 • Excel data structuring
 



 • Basic LMS configuration
 



 • A short ERP/LMS demonstration
 



 • Creation of a basic website using an AI development tool
 



 • Basic questions regarding domains, DNS, hosting and troubleshooting
 



 To Apply
 



 Send your updated CV and details of any relevant projects or experience to:
 



 📩 hello@detectivemonkey.in
 



 Please use the subject line: Application – Technical Implementation \& Pre\-Sales Executive
 



 Join us and help schools adopt smarter digital systems for administration, teaching and learning.

6b5de2ae.title: Database Specialist Solution Architect
6b5de2ae.description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for a Database Specialist Solution Architect to join the India WWSO Specialists team and help customers modernize their database estates on AWS. In this role, you will be the hands\-on technical expert who works directly with customers to plan, design, and execute database migrations \- moving workloads from commercial databases like Oracle and SQL Server to AWS purpose\-built databases including Amazon Aurora, Amazon DynamoDB, and Amazon RDS.
   

  

 You will engage across the full migration lifecycle: from discovery and schema assessment through proof\-of\-concept validation and production cutover planning. This is a deeply technical, customer\-facing role for someone who thrives on solving complex database challenges and enabling customers to achieve better performance, scalability, and cost efficiency on AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Engage with customers to assess existing database environments, identify migration candidates, and recommend target AWS database services.
* Design database migration architectures using AWS DMS, Schema Conversion Tool (SCT), and native replication approaches.
* Conduct hands\-on proof\-of\-concept engagements demonstrating performance, compatibility, and operational benefits of AWS databases.
* Provide technical guidance on schema conversion, stored procedure refactoring, and application compatibility for Oracle/SQL Server to Aurora/RDS/DynamoDB migrations.
* Develop migration runbooks, cutover plans, and rollback strategies for production database migrations.
* Support competitive technical evaluations against Oracle, SQL Server, and other cloud database offerings.
* Collaborate with Database Sales Specialists to qualify opportunities and accelerate deal closure through technical validation.
* Create and deliver technical workshops, immersion days, and enablement sessions for customers and partners.
* Contribute to the development of reusable migration tools, scripts, and best\-practice documentation.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree or above in computer science, computer engineering, or related field, or experience from a technical internship
* 4\+ years of database administration experience, or Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent
* Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities, or experience in SQL Server/MySQL and experience in Oracle DB
* 
* Experience with at least one AWS or cloud\-managed database service (Aurora, RDS, DynamoDB, or equivalent).
* 
* Working knowledge of database migration tools and methodologies (AWS DMS, SCT, or similar).
* 
* Strong SQL skills and understanding of relational database design, normalization, and indexing strategies.
* 
* Customer\-facing experience with the ability to communicate complex technical concepts to varied audiences.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of databases and AWS database services: ElasticSearch, Redshift, DynamoDB
* Experience in Postgres, or experience in SQL Server/MySQL and experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities
* AWS Professional level certification, or 3\+ years of database (eg. SQL, NoSQL, Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, Kinesis) experience
* 
* Experience migrating production Oracle or SQL Server databases to Amazon Aurora or Amazon RDS.
* 
* Hands\-on experience with Amazon DynamoDB data modeling and single\-table design patterns.
* 
* Experience with infrastructure\-as\-code (CloudFormation, Terraform, CDK) for database provisioning.
* 
* Experience in a pre\-sales, consulting, or specialist SA role at a technology company.
* 
* Exposure to India Public Sector environments and compliance requirements.


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Delhi

c934b50c.description:

**Location: Malad (West), Mumbai**  
**Experience: 2 Years to 6 Years**  
**Qualification: Any Graduate**  
**Industry: IT/Software/SAAS/LMS**

**Role Overview**  
We are looking for a Pre\-Sales Consultant who can bridge the gap between client requirements andproduct capabilities. This role will play a critical part in driving deal conversions by crafting solution\- oriented proposals, delivering impactful demonstrations, and aligning our offerings with business outcomes.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Solutioning \& Client Understanding**  
 Engage with prospects to understand business challenges, training needs, and operational requirements.  
 Map client requirements to Violet’s LMS, LXP, Onboarding, and HR\-Tech solutions, including AI\-driven capabilities.  
 Create structured solution approaches tailored to enterprise use cases.  
**2\. Sales Enablement \& Deal Support**   
 Partner with the sales team to drive qualified opportunities toward closure.  
 Participate in discovery calls, client meetings, and strategic discussions.  
 Provide consultative inputs to strengthen deal positioning.

 Deliver customized product demos aligned with client use cases.

**5\. Cross\-Functional Collaboration**  
 Work closely with Product, Delivery, and Technical teams for solution validation.

**Key Skills \& Competencies**  
 Strong understanding of SaaS platforms (LMS, LXP, HR Tech preferred)  
 Ability to translate product features into business value and ROI  
 Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills  
 Experience in handling enterprise clients and complex sales cycles  
 Structured thinking with the ability to create solution documents and proposals  
 Basic understanding of integrations, APIs, and system workflows is an advantage  
 Experience working with demo environments or sandbox setupsExperience Required  
 2 to 4 years of experience in Pre\-Sales / Solution Consulting / SaaS Sales Support  
 Experience in Learning, HR Tech, or enterprise SaaS solutions preferred

Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: ₹300,000\.00 \- ₹600,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

4e45ca2e.title: Solutions Architect - Del, Cross Industries
4e45ca2e.description:
**Description**
* Do you like helping customers solve technical problems?
* Would you like to do this using the latest cloud computing technologies?
* Do you have a knack for helping companies understand Emerging Technology Domains such as GenAI, Agentic AI, Analytics , Microservices architectures including the integration approaches?
* Do you thrive on rolling up your sleeves , a Builder who can help Architect new and emerging technologies along with been consultative to ensure success?
* Do you want to be part of the Retail / CPG team helping to establish Amazon Web Services as a leading technology platform for some of the largest Brands \& Customers in India.


 AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and consistent support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer\-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.
   

  

 As a Solution Architect, you will have the opportunity to help shape and deliver on a strategy to build mind share and broad use of Amazon’s utility computing web services within strategic accounts and partners. Your broad responsibilities will include: owning the technical engagement and ultimate success around specific implementation projects, and developing a deep expertise in the Amazon Web Services technologies as well as broad know\-how around how applications and services are constructed using the Amazon Web Services platform.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will possess customer\-facing skills that will allow him/her to represent AISPL well within a customer’s environment and drive discussions with senior personnel within the company, as well as a technical background that enables him/her to easily interact and give guidance to software developers and architects. He/she should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, product, and technical challenges.
   

  

**Roles \& Responsibilities**
* Serve as a key technical member of the Retail/CPG Account team in helping to ensure customer success in building applications and services on the Amazon Web Services platform.
* Scope each customer engagement, with attention towards clear and well\-defined objectives and success criteria.
* Own each technical engagement, and help ensure a timely and successful delivery of value. (delivery of actual solutions to be done by Amazon Web Services partners)
* Capture and share best\-practice knowledge amongst the solution architect community.
* Understand the Amazon Web Services market segments, customer base, and industry verticals.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 This role is within the Retail/CPG team in Amazon Web Services India (AWS India) and based out of
   

  

 Delhi
   

  

* As a Solutions Architect, you’ll help your customers plan their successful cloud journey leveraging emerging technologies like GenAI to achieve business outcomes. You’ll solve complex, technical challenges so your customers can focus on their business. This includes using your knowledge to craft scalable, flexible, and resilient cloud architectures. You’ll drive or take part in technical solutions discussions, diving deep into the details with customer teams.
* Building relationships to understand our customers and partners is key. As a trusted technical advisor, you’ll use your interpersonal skills to influence a variety of stakeholders from technical teams to executives. You’ll help ensure their short\-term technology decisions are aligned with their long\-term goals. Speeding up the adoption of our services will be part of your day to day.
* You’ll also act as thought leader in the wider community. This includes taking part in educating, sharing best practices, presenting at events, writing white papers, blogs, and running workshops. You won’t just be part of an industry movement; you’ll be leading it.
* As a customer obsessed advisor, you’ll also have the chance to shape the direction of our products and services. This is through gathering feedback from customers whilst collaborating with our engineering and service teams.


 To be successful in this role you need to be passionate builder with genuine curiosity about how technology can support your customers’ business models and objectives.
   

  

 Want to find out what it’s like to be a Solution Architect at AWS? Watch this video (https://bit.ly/3keYcC9\).
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 The Solutions Architect team at AWS is responsible for helping customers successfully implement cloud technologies. In a typical week you will meet multiple customers, and you will collaborate with them on designing and operating well\-architected solutions. You will earn their trust and show them the art of the possible, educating them around the capabilities of AWS. Partnering with internal teams and experts, leveraging a deep knowledge of our tools and products, you’ll craft highly scalable, flexible, and resilient cloud architectures that address our customers’ business problems. As part of our team, you’ll have the opportunity to continuously learn and innovate daily.
   

  

 Want to learn more about being a Solutions Architect at AMAZON, follow the link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=Js21xKMFdww
   

  

**About The Team**
 Retail/CPG Solutions Architects work hand in hand with AWS customers to help drive AWS services adoption. They are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with customers of different stages. Supporting the overall technical relationship between customers and AWS, they work to understand the customer's business needs and give prescriptive guidance on how to create business value with technology. Solutions Architects also have broader impact at scale, taking a supporting role in creating and presenting technical content and best practices.
   

  

 You will be part of a team that is responsible for driving adoption of AWS technologies while bringing differentiated value to customers. This is a team dedicated to some of the largest Brands/Services/Ecommerce customers in India . This customers follow unique technology adoption patterns and growth trajectories that distinguish them from traditional businesses, so you will be employing engagement strategies and programs tailored to their business needs and technical preferences.
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship \& Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 6\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 3\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience
* 3\+ years of IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud
* 3\+ years of infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking experience


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10453664

9422e765.title: Solutions Support Engineer
9422e765.description:
Come join the organization that is redefining security for the AI era. As one of the fastest\-growing startups ever, we enable teams to secure cloud and AI applications by connecting code, cloud, and runtime into a single shared context. Trusted by security teams all over the world, we have a proven track record of success and a culture that values world\-class talent. Not to mention, we're now powered by Google, meaning we offer our customers an AI\-powered platform that harnesses Google’s Threat Intelligence and Security Operations to better detect, prevent, and respond to threats across all environments, allowing for further innovation.
 


  


 Our Wizards from all over the globe work together to protect the infrastructure of our customers, including over 50% of the Fortune 100, who trust us to scan and secure over 230 billion files daily. We’re honored to be a leading player in a massive and growing market, and we continue to look for exceptional Wizards who are eager to make a significant impact on our team. At Wiz, you’ll have the freedom to think creatively, dream big, and use your full range of skills to contribute to our momentous growth. Come join our team and help us create secure cloud environments that allow even the best companies to move faster, all while having some fun!
 



  
 


  


**Summary** 



  


 As a Solutions Support Engineer, you will be part of a global team delivering expert\-level technical support across the Wiz cloud\-native security platform. You'll investigate complex, multi\-domain issues spanning cloud infrastructure, workload protection, vulnerability management, and runtime defense \- working across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments. This role combines deep technical troubleshooting with a growing emphasis on AI\-driven automation to scale support operations and improve resolution quality.
 


  


**What You'll Do** 



  

  
* Investigate and resolve customer technical issues across cloud security posture management, vulnerability scanning, threat detection, container/Kubernetes security, identity \& access management, network analysis, and data security
  
* Troubleshoot cloud connector and integration failures across AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI, and SaaS platforms \- including IAM/permissions issues, network connectivity, API authentication, and scanning infrastructure
  
* Diagnose workload scanning and runtime security issues including outpost deployment, sensor configuration, registry scanning, malware detection, and file integrity monitoring
  
* Analyze vulnerability findings \- triage false positives, validate detection accuracy, investigate SBOM/SCA results, and assess secret detection and patch management coverage
  
* Support shift\-left security workflows including CI/CD scanning, IaC security, admission controllers, Kubernetes connectors, and code/version control scanning
  
* Design and implement automation that scales the support offering \- leveraging AI agents, agentic workflows, and tooling to improve triage accuracy and resolution efficiency
  
* Participate in on\-call rotation for after\-hours, holiday, and weekend support coverage
  


  


**What You'll Bring** 



  

  
* 5\+ years of hands\-on technical experience in customer support, technical support, system administration, or a related customer\-facing role
  
* 2\+ years working with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) \- including IAM, networking (VPCs, security groups, firewalls), and core compute/storage services
  
* 1\+ years of hands\-on experience deploying, managing, and troubleshooting production Kubernetes clusters and containerized applications
  
* Strong understanding of cloud security fundamentals: identity and access management, network segmentation, compliance frameworks, and security posture assessment
  
* Experience reading and debugging code in one or more of: Python, Shell, JavaScript/JSON, Java, Go, or Terraform/HCL
  
* Proficiency with command\-line tools and Linux operating system environments
  
* Familiarity with the current AI landscape, including LLM architectures and the integration of AI\-driven tooling into technical workflows
  


  


**Nice to Have** 



  

  
* Experience with vulnerability management, SBOM/SCA analysis, or CVE triage workflows
  
* Hands\-on experience with threat detection, runtime security, or SIEM/SOAR integrations
  
* Experience building or supporting agentic workflows, RAG architectures, or AI\-powered automation
  
* Familiarity with Infrastructure\-as\-Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, Helm) and CI/CD pipelines
  
* Experience with GraphQL or REST API debugging and integration
  
* Background in compliance frameworks (CIS, NIST, SOC2, PCI\-DSS, HIPAA)
  
* Experience with ServiceNow, Jira, or Zendesk in a support engineering context
  


  


  
 



*Applicants must have the legal right to work in the country where the position is based, 
 

 without the need for
 

 visa
 

 sponsorship.
 

 This
 

 role does not offer
 

 visa
 



 sponsorship
 

 .*



  


 Wiz is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. 
 


  


 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Wiz will process your personal data in accordance with Wiz's Privacy Policy.

23e21707.title: Composable Commerce (LCNC- .Net) -Managed Services Engineer I-DFO&I-Customer
23e21707.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
**Customer**
 The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experience and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

**Level:** 
 Managed Services Engineer I or equivalent
   

  

 As an experienced Service Engineer I at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines.
   

  

**Work you’ll do:**
* Develop frontend components and user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and React.js
* Implement backend services and APIs using Java, Spring Framework, Spring Boot Microservices
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and experience in integrating frontend to backend services.
* Manage database systems (SQL and/or NoSQL) and ensure data integrity, security, and performance.
* Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and performance.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following industry best practices and coding standards.
* Strong in Spring Boot Microservices concepts, architecture and Design Patterns


**The team:**
 Our
 **Digital Foundry Operate \& Innovations** 
 (DFO\&I) team partners with organizations to rapidly design, build, and scale digital products and experiences that drive business growth and elevate customer engagement. As a multidisciplinary group of strategists, designers, engineers, and operations specialists, we deliver end\-to\-end solutions—from initial concept and agile development to ongoing digital operations—enabling clients to experiment, iterate, and scale digital initiatives with confidence and agility. We support clients across domains such as strategy, commerce, marketing, sales, and service, helping them realize their digital ambitions through flexible, scalable teams. Our expertise spans the full digital lifecycle, including customer research, experience design, platform development, content production, and marketing automation. By bridging the gap between strategy and execution, we empower organizations to achieve measurable outcomes and deliver exceptional customer experiences in an ever\-evolving digital landscape.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* 2 \- 3 years of hands\-on experience in .Net full\-stack
* Develop and maintain robust and scalable full\-stack web applications using the .NET framework, C\#, and JavaScript.
* Design and implement front\-end user interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks such as Angular, React, or Vue.js.
* Develop back\-end services and APIs using ASP.NET Web API or similar frameworks.
* Integrate third\-party APIs and services as needed to enhance application functionality.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other stakeholders to understand project requirements and translate them into technical specifications.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following industry best practices and coding standards.
* Conduct unit testing, debugging, and troubleshooting to ensure application reliability and performance.
* Work closely with DevOps teams to automate build, deployment, and monitoring processes.
* Stay updated with the latest trends and technologies in full\-stack development and incorporate them into project solutions.
* Participate in code reviews, knowledge sharing sessions, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Contribute to cloud\-native deployments and operations (commonly Microsoft Azure), including performance, reliability, and observability.


**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* GenAI integration experience: hands\-on experience integrating GenAI tools and platforms (Azure OpenAI / OpenAI API / AWS Bedrock / Google Vertex AI, Azure AI Search)
* Azure certification (e.g., Azure Administrator, Azure Developer, Azure Solutions Architect, or Azure DevOps Engineer).
* Experience in containerization (e.g., Docker and orchestration such as Kubernetes / AKS)
* Familiarity with common front\-end frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, or Vue) from a delivery/operability standpoint.


**Education:**
* BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university


**Location:**
* Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai


**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
   

  

 Requisition code: 353587

acec3481.title: Senior Solution Architect
acec3481.description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
  
Job Summary
  
  

Expert level skills of SCM EWM/SAP S/4 HANA EWM business process design and development with 18\+ years of SAP experience that includes at least 10\+ years of EWM project deployment experience.
  
Sound functional and technical understanding of Embedded and Decentralization SAP S/4 HANA EWM system architecture.
  
**Must Have:** S/4HANA EWM business process integration with legacy and other 3rd party systems for Inbound, Outbound, and Internal processes
  
**Must Have:** Knowledge on EWM integration with cross functional topics: Production processes, Quality Processes, Transportation management.
  
**Must Have:** Sound concepts (hands\-on preferred) on advanced EWM topics.
  
Knowledge on Handling Unit Management (required) and Serialization (preferred).
  
**Must Have:** Extensive knowledge on batch management and batch search strategies.
  
**Must Have:** At least one end\-to\-end deployment experience of EWM integration with non\-SAP systems, as an SAP EWM solution expert for identifying, analyzing, translating, and documenting business requirements for the EWM integration with 3rd party middleware integration technology architecture.
  
EWM integration with MES production order and batch management with CPG experience (beverages) would be preferred.
  
Should have hands\-on experience optimizing RF and Fiori apps for mobilizing warehouse process execution.
  
Excellent Communication skills and able to prepare and conduct fit\-gap workshops and EWM non\-native integrations solution expert for identifying, analyzing, translating, and documenting business requirements for the client.
  
Perform detailed analysis of customer requirements to produce custom solution specifications/Functional Specification documents for designing custom reports, forms, interfaces, and enhancements.
  
Able to perform various test cycles and provide help with test scripts, training materials and data creation.
  
Understanding of end\-to\-end logistics processes and being able to understand the business requirement clearly.
  
Knowledge on solving stock inconsistency, queue management, bin inconsistency, etc, issues experienced in daily business processes.
  
Must have
  
23 years of experience in SAP with 5\+ years of extensive experience in SAP HANA Extended Warehouse Management \- with 5 project lifecycles and at least one full life S/4 HANA EWM delivery experience preferred
  
Experience of transformation project in S/4HANA EWM / EWM 9\.5/EWM 9\.6
  
Should have experience in integrating EWM with TM (of any other non SAP Transportation Management solution), GTS/International trade, and SAP \& non\-SAP ERP
  
Should have experience in cross module integration topics with Manufacturing modules \- PP and QM.
  
Should have extensive knowledge in topics of Batch Management, Serialization management and Handling Unit management.
  
Should have extensive functional experience in RF, Fiori and nice to have experience integrating RFID solutions.
  
Experience in Yard logistics is plus.
  
Experience of delivering proposals as both stand alone or an integral part of wider consult\-build\-run propositions
  
Must have worked as an end\-to\-end Lead Solution Architect, driving, and closing SAP HANA (on\-premises \& cloud) customer proposals single handed.
  
Preferred if candidate have experience working in clean core strategy.
