bfade3a4.title: Solutions Architect
bfade3a4.description:
**🚀 About SimuPhish** 




 SimuPhish is an AI\-driven Human Risk Management and Phishing Simulation platform built to help organizations strengthen their human firewall through realistic simulations, gamified awareness, and data\-driven insights. We empower employees to become the strongest defense against cyber threats.
 



  





**💡 Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a
 **Solutions Architect** 
 who can act as a strong bridge between our Engineering/Product teams and Pre\-Sales function. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of technology, solution design, and client communication, and can translate complex technical capabilities into clear, compelling business solutions.
 



 You will play a key role in RFP responses, solution documentation, and proposal development, ensuring that every client\-facing solution is technically sound, scalable, and aligned with business goals.
 



  





**🧩 Key Responsibilities** 



* Act as the technical bridge between Engineering and Pre\-Sales teams.
* Understand client requirements and translate them into scalable technical solutions.
* Lead and contribute to RFPs, RFIs, and proposal responses.
* Create clear, structured solution design documents, architecture diagrams, and technical write\-ups.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Sales, and Customer Success teams to ensure solution alignment.
* Support pre\-sales calls with technical consulting and solution walkthroughs.
* Evaluate feasibility, effort estimation, and integration approaches for client requirements.
* Maintain a library of reusable solution templates, documentation, and proposal assets.
* Ensure consistency, accuracy, and quality in all technical deliverables.



  





**✅ Required Technical Skills** 



* Proven experience (3\-5 years) as a Solutions Architect / Pre\-Sales Engineer / Technical Consultant.
* Strong understanding of system design, APIs, integrations, and SaaS architecture.
* Should have domain knowledge of Infrastructure, Networking, Cloud, Systems, SDLC and GRC.
* Hands\-on experience with RFP/RFI response cycles and enterprise proposals.
* Ability to translate technical concepts into business\-friendly language.
* Strong documentation skills (architecture diagrams, solution notes, technical specs).
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Previous experience with Human Risk Management Platforms will be a
 *plus* 
 .
* When required, candidate should be willing to travel. (
 *for technical discussions, events etc* 
 )
* Experience working with cross\-functional teams in a fast\-paced environment.



  





**🌟 Why Join Us** 



* Work with a global cybersecurity brand making a real impact.
* Remote flexibility with a collaborative and innovative team culture.
* Opportunity to experiment, innovate, and grow with creative freedom.
* Inclusive, supportive environment that values ideas and individuality.

c4b1dd77.title: Cloud Engineer
c4b1dd77.description:
**Company Description** 
 AI Vidya is a training and career enablement organization focused on developing future leaders in artificial intelligence. The company provides personalized AI training programs designed to help individuals build practical, industry\-relevant skills. With dedicated job assistance and expert guidance, AI Vidya supports learners throughout their career journey in the digital age. The organization emphasizes confidence\-building, skill mastery, and ongoing mentorship to help participants thrive in the fast\-paced world of AI. Joining AI Vidya means being part of a community that aims to lead and innovate in the evolving AI landscape.
   

**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time remote Cloud Engineer role. The Cloud Engineer will design, build, and maintain cloud\-based infrastructure to support AI Vidya’s training platforms and internal systems. Responsibilities include implementing scalable and secure cloud solutions, managing Linux\-based servers, configuring and monitoring databases, and optimizing performance and reliability across environments. The role involves collaborating with software development teams to deploy applications, automate workflows, and improve CI/CD pipelines. The Cloud Engineer will also troubleshoot production issues, implement best practices for security and cost optimization, and contribute to documentation and operational standards.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong foundation in Cloud Computing and Infrastructure, including experience with major cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) and infrastructure\-as\-code tools.
* Proficiency in Linux administration and systems management, including monitoring, security hardening, and automation using shell scripting or similar tools.
* Hands\-on experience with Databases (SQL and/or NoSQL), including configuration, performance tuning, backup strategies, and high availability.
* Software Development skills with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Java, Go) and familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and version control (e.g., Git).
* Understanding of networking concepts (VPCs, subnets, load balancers, firewalls) and cloud security best practices.
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment, manage priorities, and collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience with containerization and orchestration (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) and prior exposure to AI or data platforms is a plus.

76194380.title: Technical Architect -App support & Modernization
76194380.description:
**Job Requirements**  

At Quest Global, it’s not just what we do but how and why we do it that makes us different. With over 25 years as an engineering services provider, we believe in the power of doing things differently to make the impossible possible. Our people are driven by the desire to make the world a better place—to make a positive difference that contributes to a brighter future. We bring together technologies and industries, alongside the contributions of diverse individuals who are empowered by an intentional workplace culture, to solve problems better and faster.

**Job Description:**


We are looking for a **Technical Architect with 12\+ years of experience** in designing and delivering scalable, enterprise\-grade solutions. The ideal candidate will bring deep expertise in **cloud\-native architecture, microservices, and modernization strategies, while also demonstrating strong leadership and management skills.**


This role requires strong experience **in cloud\-native platforms, microservices, modernization strategies, and enterprise migrations**, while also **leading \& mentoring cross\-functional teams** in delivering high\-quality, scalable, and future\-ready solutions. The architect will **lead the transformation of monolithic legacy systems into modern, distributed, and event\-driven platforms, while driving architectural governance, innovation, and delivery excellence.**


**Key Responsibilities :**

* Define and implement **cloud\-native architecture strategies \& roadmaps** across AWS, Azure, or hybrid environments.
* Lead legacy application modernization, decomposing monoliths into **scalable microservices and event\-driven components**.
* Establish and enforce **architecture governance**, API \& coding standards, best practices and integration patterns.
* Oversee **containerization, orchestration (Kubernetes/ECS/AKS), CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices** for scalable and secure delivery.
* Design data migration and integration strategies, ensuring smooth transition from legacy databases to modern platforms.
* Guide adoption of **best\-fit technologies** across application, data, and infrastructure layers.
* Manage and mentor **cross\-functional engineering teams**, ensuring skill development and delivery excellence.
* Act as a **bridge between engineering and leadership**, translating business needs into scalable technology solutions.
* Drive **performance reviews, team development plans, and career growth discussions**.
* Mentor, coach, and upskill teams, fostering a **culture of engineering excellence and innovation**.
* Ensure alignment of team efforts with program priorities, timelines, and enterprise strategy.
* Collaborate with program managers and delivery leads to **balance business priorities, risks, and technical debt**.
* Act as a trusted advisor to leadership, providing recommendations on **technology investment and modernization strategy**.

**Mandatory Skills :**

* **Cloud \& Containerization**: AWS, Microsoft Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, ECS, EKS, AKS
* **Programming \& Frameworks**: C\#, .NET Core, Java, Python, Node.js (polyglot mindset preferred)
* **Architecture \& Design**: Microservices, API\-first, event\-driven, SOA, REST, gRPC, GraphQL
* **Integration \& Messaging**: RabbitMQ, Kafka, Redis Cache, Service Bus, Pub/Sub patterns
* **Data \& Storage**: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, DocumentDB, MongoDB, Cloud\-native storage solutions
* **DevOps \& Automation**: Git, Azure DevOps, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM, CloudFormation)
* **Security \& Compliance**: Identity \& access management, API security, cloud governance, regulatory alignment
* Good to have knowledge on AI/ML concepts and experience using AI assisted development tools for coding, debugging \& documentation


**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in computer science or related discipline.
* **12\+ years of software delivery experience.**
* **5\+ years of designing scalable microservice, event\-centric, and API\-first architecture.**
* Hands\-on experience transforming legacy monolithic applications into service\-oriented, containerized, and distributed systems.
* Experience designing architecture for large scale enterprise migration initiatives.
* Cloud Certification (AWS) is desirable.


**Soft Skills:**

* Strong **leadership and stakeholder management** skills, with the ability to influence at executive levels.
* Excellent communication skills—capable of translating complex technical concepts into business value.
* Collaborative mindset with experience in **Agile and scaled delivery environments**.
* Passion for continuous learning, innovation, and staying ahead of emerging technologies.


We are known for our extraordinary people who make the impossible possible every day. Questians are driven by hunger, humility, and aspiration. We believe that our company culture is the key to our ability to make a true difference in every industry we reach. Our teams regularly invest time and dedicated effort into internal culture work, ensuring that all voices are heard.


We wholeheartedly believe in the diversity of thought that comes with fostering a culture rooted in respect, where everyone belongs, is valued, and feels inspired to share their ideas. We know embracing our unique differences makes us better, and that solving the worlds hardest engineering problems requires diverse ideas, perspectives, and backgrounds. We shine the brightest when we tap into the many dimensions that thrive across over 21,000 difference\-makers in our workplace.

41c20d3b.title: Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) Sr. API Developer
41c20d3b.description:
Greetings from Doodleblue Innovations!

We are hiring for a **Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) Sr. API Developer**

Location: **Bangalore**

Experience: **5\-8 Years**

We're looking for an experienced **Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) Sr. API Developer** to join our team and work on a modern **Headless Commerce** platform. If you're passionate about building scalable API\-driven solutions and have expertise in **SCAPI, OCAPI, REST APIs, and Headless Commerce**, we'd love to connect with you!

**What We're looking for:**

* 5–8 years of overall experience with **4\+ years in API Development \& Integration Engineering**
* 3\+ years of hands\-on Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) development experience
* Strong expertise in **SCAPI, OCAPI, REST APIs, and API Security**
* Experience with **Headless Commerce** and **Backend for Frontend (BFF)** architecture
* Strong problem\-solving, debugging, and integration skills
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills

**Required Skills:**

* Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC)
* SCAPI \& OCAPI
* REST APIs \& Web Services
* JavaScript
* SFCC Service Framework
* API Security (OAuth, Authentication \& Authorization)
* API Troubleshooting \& Debugging
* Backend Integration Development
* API Design \& Integration Patterns
* Headless Commerce
* Git Version Control
* Salesforce B2C Commerce Developer Certification

**Preferred Skills:**

* Backend for Frontend (BFF) Architecture
* Headless Commerce Implementations
* Sterling OMS
* Payment Integrations
* Search \& Merchandising Platforms
* Analytics \& Tagging Platforms
* SFCC Jobs Framework
* Postman or Similar API Testing Tools
* Salesforce B2C Commerce Architect Certification

**Good to have:**

* Composable Commerce
* Fraud Prevention Platforms (Forter or similar)
* Vertex Tax Integration
* Shipping \& Fulfilment Integrations
* Retail \& Omnichannel Commerce Experience

Interested candidates can share their resumes to supriyar@doodleblue.com

Job Types: Full\-time, Permanent

Pay: From ₹800,000\.00 per year

Application Question(s):

* How many years of experience do you have with Salesforce Commerce Cloud?
* How many years of experience do you have as a Salesforce Commerce Cloud Senior API Developer?

Experience:

* API Development and Integration: 5 years (Required)
* Salesforce Commerce Cloud API Developer: 3 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

dc29a2bb.title: Cloud Architect
dc29a2bb.description:
Greetings from Themesoft!
 



  





 We're looking for a technology leader to define and drive enterprise cloud architecture, governance, and modernization initiatives while enabling secure, scalable, and automated cloud platforms.
 



  





**Position: Cloud Architect – Azure \& DevOps** 




**Position Type: Contract Role** 




**Experience: Minimum 8\-10 years** 




  





**Required Skills** 



* Strong expertise in Azure Cloud Architecture and Landing Zone design.
* Hands\-on experience designing and governing
 **Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)** 
 platforms.
* Define target architecture for greenfield AKS clusters while ensuring seamless coexistence with existing environments.
* Design and implement
 **NGINX Azure Managed Gateway API** 
 , including HTTPRoute/Gateway modeling, TLS, WAF strategy, and canary/weighted traffic routing.
* Experience leading
 **Azure CNI (Cilium)** 
 migration strategies, including IP planning, subnet sizing, pod density, and workload migration.
* Expertise in:
* Azure CNI (Cilium)
* Kubernetes networking and security
* Azure Policy and RBAC
* Azure Key Vault with CSI Driver
* GitHub standards (CODEOWNERS, reusable workflows, branch protection, approvals)
* Define and govern non\-functional requirements, including High Availability (HA), Disaster Recovery (DR), scalability, performance, and capacity planning.
* Drive delivery governance, architectural compliance, migration roadmaps, and platform modernization.



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Cloud Architecture
* Azure DevOps
* Kubernetes (AKS)
* Terraform
* GitHub Actions
* Azure Networking \& Security



  





  





**If interested, apply with CV or** 
 share resume to mythili@themesoft.com
 



  





 \#Hiring \#CloudArchitect \#Azure \#AzureCloud \#AKS \#Kubernetes \#DevOps \#Terraform \#AzureDevOps \#Cilium \#GitHubActions \#CloudSecurity \#CloudTransformation \#PlatformEngineering \#TechJobs

a3dddd12.title: GenAI Solution Architect
a3dddd12.description:
We are seeking a Seasoned AI Architect with strong expertise across AI/ML, Generative AI, Agentic AI and enterprise\-scale architecture design to lead the conception, design, and proposal solutioning of next\-generation intelligent solutions for COE.
 



  





 This role goes beyond traditional data science—focusing on AI platform architecture, LLM\-powered systems, agentic frameworks, and production\-grade deployment of AI solutions aligned with business value. Experience in SLM and Knowledge Graph will be added advantage.
 



  





 The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise, architectural thinking, and business acumen to translate enterprise challenges into scalable AI solutions. Experience with AI services of Azure (Azure AI foundry) is mandatory.
 



  





 Location\-Pune/Bangalore/Noida/Mumbai/Kolkata/Hyderabad/Chennai
 



 Work Mode\-Hybrid
 



 Notice Period\- Immediate to 30 days
 



  





 JD\-
 


* 13\+ years of experience
* 4\+ years in AI/ML, Data Science, or Advanced Analytics
* Proven experience in Gen AI and Agentic AI solution architecture \& enterprise deployments
* Experience designing production\-grade GenAI \& Agentic AI solutions
* Experience in pre\-sales, RFPs, and POCs for innovative solutions
* Familiarity with domain\-specific AI applications (BFSI, Manufacturing, Telecom, Healthcare)
* Experienced in AI RFP/proposal responses across multiple tech stack \& POCs
* Has Azure AI experience (mandatory) incl. Azure AI Foundry, Agent 365, Microsoft Agent Framework (additional experience in AWS or GCP will be added advantage)
* Immediate joiners within 30 days
* Has worked on Machine Learning in past (at least to a limited extent)
* Good comms skills for stakeholder management

ff046f72.title: DE-Cloud Architect
ff046f72.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 We are the only professional services organization who has a separate business dedicated exclusively to the financial services marketplace. Join Digital Engineering Team and you will work with multi\-disciplinary teams from around the world to deliver a global perspective. Aligned to key industry groups including Asset management, Banking and Capital Markets, Insurance and Private Equity, Health, Government, Power and Utilities, we provide integrated advisory, assurance, tax, and transaction services. Through diverse experiences, world\-class learning and individually tailored coaching you will experience ongoing professional development. That’s how we develop outstanding leaders who team to deliver on our promises to all of our stakeholders, and in so doing, play a critical role in building a better working world for our people, for our clients and for our communities. Sound interesting? Well, this is just the beginning. Because whenever you join, however long you stay, the exceptional EY experience lasts a lifetime.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Cloud Architect at EY GDS. You will work on designing and implementing cloud\-native applications and services using AWS technologies. You will collaborate with development teams to build, deploy, and manage applications that meet business needs and leverage AWS best practices. This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a leading firm whilst being instrumental in the growth of a new service offering. We are the only professional services organization who has a separate business dedicated exclusively to the financial and non\-financial services marketplace. Join Digital \& Emerging Technologies team and you will work with multi\-disciplinary teams from around the world to deliver a global perspective.
   

  

 EY Digital Engineering is a unique, industry\-focused business unit that provides a broad range of integrated services that leverage deep industry experience with strong functional capability and product knowledge. The Digital Engineering (DE) practice works with clients to analyse, formulate, design, mobilize and drive digital transformation initiatives. We advise clients on their most pressing digital challenges and opportunities surround business strategy, customer, growth, profit optimization, innovation, technology strategy, and digital transformation. We also have a unique ability to help our clients translate strategy into actionable technical design, and transformation planning/mobilization. Through our unique combination of competencies and solutions, EY’s DE team helps our clients sustain competitive advantage and profitability by developing strategies to stay ahead of the rapid pace of change and disruption and supporting the execution of complex transformations.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Application Development: Design and develop cloud\-native applications and services using AWS services such as Lambda, API Gateway, ECS, EKS, and DynamoDB, Glue, Redshift, EMR.
* Deployment and Automation: Implement CI/CD pipelines using AWS CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and CodeDeploy to automate application deployment and updates.
* Architecture Design: Collaborate with architects and other engineers to design scalable and secure application architectures on AWS.
* Performance Tuning: Monitor application performance and implement optimizations to enhance reliability, scalability, and efficiency.
* Security: Implement security best practices for AWS applications, including identity and access management (IAM), encryption, and secure coding practices.
* Container Services Management:
+ Design and deploy containerized applications using AWS services such as Amazon ECS (Elastic Container Service), Amazon EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service), and AWS Fargate.
+ Configure and manage container orchestration, scaling, and deployment strategies.
+ Optimize container performance and resource utilization by tuning settings and configurations.

* Application Observability:
+ Implement and manage application observability tools such as AWS CloudWatch, AWS X\-Ray, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).
+ Develop and configure monitoring, logging, and alerting systems to provide insights into application performance and health.
+ Create dashboards and reports to visualize application metrics and logs for proactive monitoring and troubleshooting.

* Integration: Integrate AWS services with application components and external systems, ensuring smooth and efficient data flow.
* Troubleshooting: Diagnose and resolve issues related to application performance, availability, and reliability.
* Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for application design, deployment processes, and configuration.


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
**Required Skills:**
* AWS Services: Proficiency in AWS services such as Lambda, API Gateway, ECS, EKS, DynamoDB, S3, and RDS, Glue, Redshift, EMR.
* Programming: Strong programming skills in languages such as Python, Java, or Node.js.
* CI/CD: Experience with CI/CD tools and practices, including AWS CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and CodeDeploy.
* Infrastructure as Code: Familiarity with IaC tools like AWS CloudFormation or Terraform for automating application infrastructure.
* Security: Understanding of AWS security best practices, including IAM, KMS, and encryption.
* Observability Tools: Proficiency in using observability tools like AWS CloudWatch, AWS X\-Ray, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.
* Container Orchestration: Knowledge of container orchestration concepts and tools, including Kubernetes and Docker Swarm.
* Monitoring: Experience with monitoring and logging tools such as AWS CloudWatch, CloudTrail, or ELK Stack.
* Collaboration: Strong teamwork and communication skills with the ability to work effectively with cross\-functional teams.


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate or Professional, AWS Certified Developer – Associate, or similar certifications.
* Experience: At least 11 Years of previous experience in an application engineering role with a focus on AWS technologies.
* Agile Methodologies: Familiarity with Agile development practices and methodologies.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong analytical skills with the ability to troubleshoot and resolve complex issues.


**Education:**
* Degree: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience


**What We Offer**
 EY Global Delivery Services (GDS) is a dynamic and truly global delivery network. We work across six locations – Argentina, China, India, the Philippines, Poland and the UK – and with teams from all EY service lines, geographies and sectors, playing a vital role in the delivery of the EY growth strategy. From accountants to coders to advisory consultants, we offer a wide variety of fulfilling career opportunities that span all business disciplines. In GDS, you will collaborate with EY teams on exciting projects and work with well\-known brands from across the globe. We’ll introduce you to an ever\-expanding ecosystem of people, learning, skills and insights that will stay with you throughout your career.
   

  

* Continuous learning: You’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.
* Success as defined by you: We’ll provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a meaningful impact, your way.
* Transformative leadership: We’ll give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the world needs.
* Diverse and inclusive culture: You’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

022269f7.title: Databricks Solution Architect
022269f7.description:
**Job Description**
 We're seeking a hands\-on Senior Consultant \- Databricks with deep technical expertise in building and optimizing Lakehouse\-based data and AI solutions. This is a contract role based in Singapore, offering flexibility to work on\-site with clients or remotely within the region.
   

  

 In this role, you'll design, develop, and operationalize Delta Lakehouse architectures using Databricks, driving real\-world outcomes for enterprise customers. You'll take ownership of implementation tasks, lead technical delivery, and mentor engineering teams in best practices across data engineering, governance, and AI.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Design and implement scalable data pipelines using Delta Live Tables (DLT), Spark SQL, Python, or Scala.
   

  

 Optimize ETL, streaming, and ML workloads for performance, cost efficiency, and reliability.
   

  

 Administer and configure Databricks Workspaces, Unity Catalog, and cluster policies for secure, governed environments.
   

  

 Automate infrastructure and deployments using Terraform, Git, and CI/CD pipelines.
   

  

 Implement observability, cost optimization, and monitoring frameworks using tools like Splunk, Prometheus, or CloudWatch.
   

  

 Collaborate with customers to build AI and LLM solutions leveraging MLflow, DBRX, and Mosaic AI.
   

  

**Required Skills \& Experience**
 Strong hands\-on experience with Databricks, including workspace setup, notebooks, clusters, and job orchestration.
   

  

 Expertise in Delta Lake, DLT, Unity Catalog, and SQL Warehouses.
   

  

 Proficiency in Python or Scala for data engineering and ML workflows.
   

  

 Strong understanding of AWS, Azure, or GCP cloud ecosystems.
   

  

 Experience with Terraform automation, DevOps, and MLOps practices.
   

  

 Familiarity with monitoring and governance frameworks for large\-scale data platforms.
   

  

**Nice to Have**
 Experience developing AI/LLM pipelines and RAG architectures on Databricks.
   

  

 Exposure to Bedrock, OpenAI, or Hugging Face integrations.
   

  

 Databricks certifications (Data Engineer, Machine Learning, or Solutions Architect) preferred.

ce0d84f6.title: Solution Architect(ITSM, ITOM- CMDB, Service Mapping, CSDM domain)
ce0d84f6.description:
**Company Name: WillwareTechologies
   

  

 Role: ServiceNow Architect
   

  

 Experience:8\+ Years
   

  

 Location: Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, Noida, Pune,Hyderabad
   

  

 WorkMode: Onsite**
  

  

  

 Job Description
 



 As a ServiceNow Architect, you will play a key role in designing and guiding the implementation of complex ServiceNow solutions across multiple platforms and modules. You will leverage your deep knowledge of ServiceNow capabilities and best practices to architect robust solutions that drive business value, improve operational efficiency, and ensure alignment with client needs.
 



**Must Have skills\- ITSM, ITOM\- CMDB, Service Mapping, CSDM** 




**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Solution Architecture: Lead the design and implementation of end\-to\-end ServiceNow solutions, including \- ITSM, ITOM\- CMDB, Service Mapping, CSDM, and other ServiceNow applications.
* Strategic Planning: Collaborate with business stakeholders, project managers, and technical teams to define the architectural vision and roadmap for ServiceNow implementations.
* Customization \& Configuration: Oversee the customization and configuration of ServiceNow modules, ensuring best practices and scalability.
* Integration Design: Architect integrations between ServiceNow and third\-party systems (such as LDAP, Active Directory, SAP, and custom APIs), ensuring seamless data flow and system interoperability.
* Leadership \& Mentorship: Provide technical leadership and guidance to development teams, ensuring the adoption of best practices and consistent, high\-quality coding standards.
* Platform Optimization: Identify opportunities to optimize ServiceNow environments for performance, usability, and cost\-efficiency, including reviewing data models, integrations, and workflows.
* Governance \& Security: Establish governance processes to ensure the integrity, security, and compliance of ServiceNow environments, including the proper management of data, access control, and system configurations.
* Client Engagement: Act as a subject matter expert, providing advice and recommendations to clients on ServiceNow architecture, process automation, and platform capabilities.
* Documentation: Produce comprehensive solution documentation, including architecture diagrams, workflows, and implementation guides.
* Upgrades \& Enhancements: Lead efforts for system upgrades, patching, and platform enhancements, ensuring minimal impact on operations and aligning with new ServiceNow releases and features.
  


* *ITSM: Experience in implementing ITIL processes (Incident, Problem, Change Management, etc.) in ServiceNow*
* *ITOM : Experience in multiple End\-to\-End implementation of ITOM including CMDB processes (Event Management, Discovery, Service Mapping, CMDB/CSDM, Cloud Management, Orchestration)*
* *CMDB Management: Experience with CMDB design, architecture and implementations with a fair understanding of ServiceNow CMDB model and extensions.*
* *Hands\-on development to include creation, configuration and customization of patterns, Discovery Schedules, probe, sensors and Event rules*
* Integration : Hands\-on experience with integrating ServiceNow with other CMDB tools and enterprise monitoring systems
* Familiar with scripting technology such as JavaScript, PowerShell, Perl, wmi, ssh, python, Xpath, SNMP•
* App Engine : Expertise in Custom module implementations
* Working experience on Workflow administration, ServiceNow Reporting, Form/UI configurations, Notifications, data imports, custom scripting
* Experience in identifying opportunities for process automation and optimization using advanced ServiceNow features
* CTAs/ ServiceNow Certified Candidates Preferred
  



  
 



 Qualifications: (Please list all required qualifications) ServiceNow Certified Application Developer (CAD), ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA), or ServiceNow Certified Technical Architect (CTA) preferred. ITIL Knowledge: Strong understanding and practical experience with ITIL frameworks, particularly Incident, Problem, Change Management, and Configuration Management, and the ability to map these processes to ServiceNow capabilities Project Management: Experience with agile methodologies and managing large\-scale ServiceNow implementations Leadership \& Communication: Strong leadership abilities with experience managing cross\-functional teams, guiding developers, and liaising with stakeholders at all levels. Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
 



*(Rationalizes basic requirements for candidates to apply. Helps w/rationalization when detailed.* 




***Required Qualifications:***



* *Experience: 8\-10 years of hands\-on experience designing and implementing ServiceNow solutions, with at least 3 years in a lead or architect role*
* *Technical Skills:*
* *Expertise in ServiceNow architecture, design, and configuration, including* 
**ITSM, ITOM\- CMDB, Service Mapping, CSDM**
* *In\-depth knowledge of ServiceNow platform capabilities, modules, and best practices*
* *Proven ability to design and implement scalable ServiceNow solutions, including ITSM, ITOM, CMDB, and emerging modules, with deep knowledge of the Common Services Data Model (CSDM) for platform alignment*
* *Extensive experience with ServiceNow integrations using REST, SOAP, OAuth2, JWT, and MID Server, ensuring seamless interoperability with external systems like AWS, Azure, Salesforce, or other enterprise platforms. Proficiency in ServiceNow scripting (JavaScript, Glide API, Business Rules, etc.)*
* *Expertise in designing solutions to maintain platform integrity, optimize CMDB structure, and enforce best practices in performance, scalability, and usability*
* *In\-depth knowledge of ServiceNow update sets, version control, deployment processes, and platform governance frameworks to ensure optimal performance and compliance*
* *Familiarity with advanced ServiceNow features such as Flow Designer, Virtual Agent, and Predictive Intelligence*
  



***Preferred Qualifications:***



* *Experience with* 
**ITSM, ITOM\- CMDB, Service Mapping, CSDM** 
*modules (Discovery, Orchestration, Event Management, SOM, CSM, SPM modules*
* *Familiarity with cloud technologies (AWS, Azure, etc.) and their integration with ServiceNow*
* *Experience with DevOps and CI/CD pipelines for ServiceNow deployments*
* *Knowledge of automation tools and frameworks to drive operational efficiencies*

8b95f35c.title: Customer Delivery Manager (AMEA) - SAP S/4 HANA , ARIBA & ITIL Processes
8b95f35c.description:
At ENGIE, we are building the energy future through bold digital transformation.
 **Our GET program is one of the most ambitious enterprise transformation initiatives in the industry, reshaping how we operate across continents with SAP S/4HANA and SAP ARIBA at its core.** 




  





 We are looking for a
 **Customer Delivery Manager to lead service delivery across our AMEA perimeter from Pune, India. In this role, you will be the trusted bridge between business entities and delivery teams, ensuring operational excellence while growing our India footprint** 
 . Your leadership will directly impact how thousands of users experience our platforms every day.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 




  





 \-
 **Own end\-to\-end RUN service delivery for AMEA entities (KSA, UAE, South Africa, and India from 2027\), ensuring service continuity, performance, and user satisfaction.** 




  





 \- Act as the single point of contact for business stakeholders, coordinating between RUN support teams and CORE change teams to resolve incidents and drive high\-impact ticket resolution.
 



  





 \- Lead operational governance through weekly and monthly reviews, providing transparent reporting on SLAs, KPIs, backlogs, and escalations.
 



  





 \- Coordinate India\-based functional consulting teams across SAP, ARIBA, and business domains within a matrix organization, ensuring skills alignment and team engagement.
 



  





 \- Drive continuous improvement by gathering entity feedback, identifying pain points, and implementing service optimization and automation initiatives.
 



  





 \- Manage escalations and define action plans with operational teams to address service dissatisfaction and restore confidence.
 



  





 \- Support the development and scaling of the India delivery center, aligning local operations with global standards and ITIL best practices.
 



  





**What You Bring** 




  





 \-
 **8 to 12\+ years of experience in SAP or business process service delivery, ideally in an** 




**SAP S/4HANA environment. Female candidates preferred.** 




  





 \-
 **Proven experience managing offshore delivery teams,** 
 preferably in India, within complex multi\-country setups.
 



  





 \-
 **Strong background in ITIL processes, service management frameworks, and operational governance.** 




  





 \- Demonstrated ability to work in multicultural environments, particularly with European stakeholders.
 



  





 \-
 **Flexible to work in different time zones (no Night shifts).** 




 \-
 **Individual contributor role, no team reporting.** 




  





 \- Excellent communication skills in English with strong customer orientation and delivery focus.
 



  





 \- Leadership qualities that foster team engagement, retention, and professional growth.
 



  





 \- A collaborative mindset with the ability to challenge priorities constructively and drive accountability.
 



  





**Location** 




  





**Pune, India — On Site** 




 Flexible to work in different time zones (no Night shifts)
 



 \-
 **Individual contributor role, no team reporting.** 




  





**Our Commitment** 




  





 At ENGIE, every talent has a role to play in accelerating the energy transition. Make a difference and enjoy a fulfilling professional experience. Take on exciting challenges and build a career path that reflects who you are. Join us and be part of the adventure of the century!
 



  





 ENGIE is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to gender, ethnicity, disability, age, sexual orientation, religion, or any other protected characteristic. We celebrate diversity because it drives innovation and strengthens our ability to serve communities worldwide.
 



  





 If you require reasonable accommodations during the recruitment process, please let us know. We are committed to ensuring an accessible and inclusive experience for every candidate.

80e7ef4a.title: Technical Delivery Manager – Microsoft Technologies (.NET)
80e7ef4a.description:
**Technical Delivery Manager (.NET Background)** 




 Experience : 18 – 22 years
 



 Location Bengaluru
 



  





 About the Role
 



 We are seeking an experienced Technical Delivery Manager – Project Management to lead the delivery of large\-scale Application Development \& Maintenance (ADM) engagements for a strategic global client. This leadership role is responsible for driving end\-to\-end delivery excellence, managing offshore operations, leading engineering teams of over 100 professionals, and building long\-term client relationships.
 



 The ideal candidate will have 18\+ years of experience in technology delivery, with a strong background in Microsoft technology\-based application development and support, combined with exceptional leadership, stakeholder management, and delivery governance capabilities.
 



 This role requires a strategic leader who can drive engineering excellence, foster AI adoption, build high\-performing teams, and contribute to account growth while ensuring consistent delivery quality.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of large\-scale Application Development \& Maintenance (ADM) programs using Microsoft technologies.
* Manage and mentor offshore delivery teams of 100\+ engineers, technical leads, architects, and project managers.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with client stakeholders, ensuring high customer satisfaction and trusted advisor status.
* Drive delivery governance through effective planning, execution, risk management, quality assurance, and reporting.
* Champion engineering excellence by implementing modern software engineering practices, automation, DevOps, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Lead AI adoption initiatives across engineering teams and promote a culture of innovation and operational excellence.
* Establish Agile delivery frameworks and ensure adherence to Agile best practices across programs.
* Provide technical and engineering leadership by driving architecture discussions, innovation, productivity improvements, and technology modernization.
* Develop high\-performing teams through coaching, mentoring, succession planning, and employee engagement initiatives.
* Manage project financials, including budgeting, forecasting, profitability, resource planning, and delivery metrics across both Time \& Material and Fixed Price engagements.
* Identify business growth opportunities within existing accounts, contribute to solution proposals, and support account expansion initiatives.
* Prepare and present executive\-level dashboards, delivery reviews, and strategic updates to senior client leadership.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful project execution and continuous customer success.



  





 Required Qualifications
 


* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
* 18\+ years of experience in IT services, application development, and delivery management.
* Extensive experience managing large\-scale ADM engagements within the Microsoft technology ecosystem.
* Proven experience leading global delivery teams comprising 100\+ professionals.
* Strong expertise in Agile delivery methodologies, project governance, delivery excellence, and program management.
* Demonstrated success in managing senior client stakeholders and executive\-level communications.
* Experience managing both Fixed Price and Time \& Material engagement models.
* Strong financial management skills, including budgeting, forecasting, revenue management, and resource planning.
* Experience driving engineering best practices, innovation, automation, and AI adoption initiatives.
* Excellent leadership, decision\-making, conflict resolution, and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong presentation, storytelling, negotiation, and communication skills.



  





 Preferred Skills \& Certifications
 


* PMP (Project Management Professional) certification preferred.
* Agile certifications such as Certified ScrumMaster (CSM), PMI\-ACP, SAFe Agilist, or equivalent are preferred.
* Exposure to AI\-enabled software engineering practices and delivery transformation initiatives.
* Experience in proposal development, solutioning, and account growth strategies.

145d2527.title: Associate Program Manager
145d2527.description:
**The Mission: Build the operating system for the future of AI\-powered entertainment.** 




  





**About Us** 




 Our journey at Dashverse began with a simple question: What if AI could power the next generation of entertainment? As a Series A technology company backed by leading Indian investors like Peak XV, Matrix, and Stellaris, we began our journey with Dashtoon, revolutionizing AI comics. Now, with Dashreels, we are creating a new universe of short\-form video, curating addictive short dramas while also launching our own game\-changing AI\-generated originals.
 



  





 We offer a personalized, binge\-worthy viewing experience that's captivating Indian audiences. Our mission is to become the go\-to destination for compelling, short\-form narrative content around the world. Are you ready to build the future of storytelling?
 



  





  





  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a highly analytical and content\-obsessed
 **Associate Program Manager – Content Strategy \& Insights** 
 to help shape the future of storytelling at Dashverse. This role sits at the intersection of
 **content strategy, market intelligence, and programming insights** 
 , with a strong focus on
 **micro\-drama trends** 
 and emerging entertainment formats.
 



 You will play a key role in identifying
 **what content works, why it works, and what we should build next** 
 . From decoding winning tropes, genres, and storytelling patterns across global microdrama platforms to conducting deep market and competitive research, you will help define Dashverse’s
 **content slate strategy** 
 .
 



 You will work closely with
 **Content, Licensing, Growth, Product, and Leadership teams** 
 to translate insights into actionable decisions—helping us build highly engaging, commercially successful, and culturally relevant content.
 



  





  





  





**Your Part** 




  





**Content Strategy \& Slate Development** 



* Conduct deep analysis of
 **micro\-drama ecosystems globally** 
 to identify winning content patterns, genres, themes, formats, and storytelling mechanics.
* Study
 **what’s working across competing platforms** 
 , including title performance, narrative structures, hooks, pacing, cliffhangers, character archetypes, and engagement trends.
* Recommend
 **content slate priorities** 
 based on market trends, whitespace opportunities, and content performance signals.
* Identify emerging themes, underserved genres, and content gaps to inform
 **future greenlighting and commissioning decisions** 
 .
* Build structured recommendations around
 **what types of stories, themes, and genres Dashverse should invest in** 
 .



  





**Market Intelligence \& Competitive Research** 



* Conduct extensive
 **primary and secondary market research** 
 to understand content trends across micro\-drama, OTT, and digital entertainment ecosystems.
* Track and analyze
 **top\-performing titles across platforms** 
 to identify repeatable success patterns.
* Study
 **genre evolution, content saturation, and whitespace opportunities** 
 to support strategic decision\-making.
* Monitor emerging storytelling trends, content formats, and entertainment shifts relevant to Dashverse.



  





**Cross\-Functional Influence** 



* Partner with
 **Content and Creative teams** 
 to share actionable insights around genres, tropes, storytelling patterns, pacing, and character archetypes.
* Work closely with
 **Licensing teams** 
 to evaluate external content opportunities and prioritize acquisitions based on market signals and trend potential.
* Collaborate with
 **Growth teams** 
 to align content priorities with platform growth opportunities and market demand.
* Partner with
 **Product teams** 
 to share insights on content trends, discovery opportunities, and category\-level demand signals.



  





**Insights \& Strategic Reporting** 



* Develop recurring reports and intelligence frameworks on
 **what is trending, what is saturating, and what is emerging** 
 in the micro\-drama ecosystem.
* Build internal knowledge systems to continuously track
 **competitive platforms, title performance, genre shifts, and storytelling trends** 
 .
* Synthesize complex research into
 **clear, actionable recommendations for leadership and cross\-functional teams** 
 .



  





  





  





**Mandatory Skills** 



* Strong understanding of
 **content strategy, programming, and digital entertainment trends** 
 .
* Deep curiosity about
 **storytelling, micro\-drama, OTT, short\-form entertainment, and emerging content formats** 
 .
* Strong analytical ability with experience translating
 **market intelligence into actionable content recommendations** 
 .
* Strong research and synthesis skills across
 **competitive analysis, market research, and content intelligence** 
 .
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence cross\-functional teams.
* Strong structured thinking and ability to derive insights from large sets of qualitative and quantitative information.



  





  





  





**Qualifications** 



* **MBA from a Tier 1 or Tier 2 institute (preferred)**
* **Bachelor’s degree from a Tier 1 institute (preferred)**
* **2–8 years of professional experience** 
 in consulting, strategy, media, OTT, content intelligence, consumer internet, research, or related domains
* Strong passion for
 **content, storytelling, media, and the entertainment industry**



  





  





  





**Good to Have Skills** 



* Experience in
 **content strategy, content programming, media research, or entertainment analytics** 
 .
* Familiarity with
 **micro\-drama, OTT ecosystems, creator economy, or short\-form video platforms** 
 .
* Exposure to
 **market intelligence, competitive benchmarking, or trend forecasting** 
 .
* Understanding of
 **AI\-driven entertainment trends and evolving digital content ecosystems** 
 .
* Strong interest in
 **pop culture, storytelling archetypes, and entertainment trends** 
 .



  





  





  





**What Success Looks Like** 



* You can clearly articulate
 **what content Dashverse should double down on—and why** 
 .
* Your insights directly influence
 **content slate decisions, licensing priorities, growth strategies, and product thinking** 
 .
* You become the internal expert on
 **“what’s working in micro\-drama.”**



  





  





  





**Why You Should Join Us?** 



* **Build from the Ground Up:** 
 This is a rare opportunity to shape the growth story of a breakout product from its early days.
* **Unprecedented Impact:** 
 Your work will directly influence our success and visibility in a key market.
* **Work with the Best:** 
 Join a dynamic and innovative team that is passionate about the future of storytelling and technology.
* **Accelerate Your Career:** 
 This role offers immense potential for personal and professional growth in a fast\-scaling company.



  





  





  





**Ready to take the lead? Apply Now and let's build the future of storytelling together.**

3a01676c.title: T&T- Customer | CS&D | Technical program manager | Pune | Manager
3a01676c.description:
Job requisition ID :: 108594
Date: Jul 13, 2026
Location: Pune
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**The team**

  



Customer is about much more than just the numbers. It’s about attesting to accomplishments and challenges and helping to assure strong foundations for future aspirations. Deloitte exemplifies the what, how, and why of change so you’re always ready to act ahead. Learn more about Customer


**Role Overview**
-----------------



We are seeking an experienced and results\-driven **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** to lead complex technology initiatives and drive cross\-functional programs across engineering, product, operations, security, and business teams. The TPM will be responsible for planning, executing, governing, and delivering large\-scale technology programs while ensuring alignment with business objectives and technical strategy.



The ideal candidate will possess strong program management expertise, technical acumen, stakeholder management skills, and a proven track record of delivering enterprise\-scale technology solutions in an Agile environment.


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

  


### **Program Leadership**


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of strategic technology programs from initiation through deployment and operational transition.
* Define program scope, objectives, roadmaps, timelines, milestones, and success metrics.
* Drive alignment across multiple teams and stakeholders to ensure successful execution of program goals.
* Identify and manage risks, dependencies, issues, and mitigation plans.


### **Technical Delivery Management**


* Partner with engineering, architecture, product, and infrastructure teams to deliver scalable and secure technology solutions.
* Translate business objectives into actionable technical execution plans.
* Monitor program progress, delivery metrics, and resource utilization.
* Ensure adherence to technology, security, and compliance standards.


### **Stakeholder Management**


* Communicate program status, risks, dependencies, and decisions to senior leadership and executive stakeholders.
* Facilitate governance meetings, steering committees, and executive reviews.
* Build strong partnerships across global teams and external stakeholders.


### **Agile Program Execution**


* Champion Agile, Scrum, and SAFe methodologies.
* Coordinate multiple Agile teams and manage release planning activities.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery excellence and operational efficiency.


### **Risk \& Compliance Management**


* Ensure compliance with regulatory, security, privacy, and operational requirements.
* Collaborate with cybersecurity, risk, legal, and compliance teams as needed.
* Establish and track mitigation plans for business and technology risks.


### **Financial \& Resource Management**


* Support budget planning, forecasting, and resource allocation activities.
* Track program costs, delivery commitments, and resource utilization.
* Manage vendor and third\-party engagements when applicable.


**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 8\+ years of experience in Program Management, Project Management, or Technical Delivery roles.
* 5\+ years of experience managing large\-scale, cross\-functional technology programs.
* Strong understanding of Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Experience leading Agile delivery teams.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Proven ability to manage globally distributed teams.
* Strong analytical, organizational, and problem\-solving abilities.


**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------


* Master's degree (MBA or relevant technical discipline).
* PMP, PgMP, PMI\-ACP, SAFe, Scrum Master, or equivalent certifications.
* Experience in Payments, Financial Services, Banking, FinTech, E\-commerce, or Digital Transformation programs.
* Familiarity with APIs, Microservices, Data Platforms, Cybersecurity, and Enterprise Architecture.
* Experience leading digital modernization or cloud transformation initiatives.


**Technical Skills**
--------------------


* Program \& Portfolio Management
* Agile / Scrum / SAFe
* SDLC \& Release Management
* Cloud Technologies (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* API \& Microservices Architecture
* Jira, Confluence, Azure DevOps
* Data Analytics \& Reporting
* Risk \& Compliance Management
* Vendor Management
* Executive Reporting \& Governance


**Core Competencies**
---------------------


* Strategic Thinking
* Leadership \& Influence
* Executive Communication
* Stakeholder Management
* Problem Solving
* Decision Making
* Risk Management
* Change Management
* Collaboration \& Teamwork
* Customer\-Centric Mindset


**Success Metrics**
-------------------


* On\-time and within\-budget program delivery
* Achievement of business and technology objectives
* Effective management of risks and dependencies
* Stakeholder satisfaction and engagement
* Improved delivery efficiency and operational excellence
* Compliance with security, regulatory, and governance standards

d972b907.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Amazon Now, Supply Chain
d972b907.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Come build the supply chain brain for Amazon's fastest\-growing quick commerce business.  

  

Amazon Now's SCOPE (Supply Chain Operations, Planning \& Efficiency) team is looking for a Technical Program Manager who wants to own two of the most foundational pillars of our supply chain — Buying and Forecasting. This isn't a "track and report" TPM role. You'll be the strategic anchor connecting AI/ML\-powered demand intelligence with automated procurement systems, directly shaping how thousands of dark stores across India stay stocked, efficient, and ready for customers in under 15 minutes.  

  

Here's why this role is different:  

  

You'll own the full lifecycle — from roadmap planning to GTM adoption — across programs that touch 20\+ stakeholders, 10\+ external systems, and thousands of stores  

You'll drive a forecasting accuracy leap from 55% MAPE to under 20% — a transformation that directly impacts instock rates, cost efficiency, and customer experience  

You'll take buying automation from baseline to 95%\+ PO automation, fundamentally changing how Amazon Now procures at scale  

You'll operate at the rare intersection of program rigor, technical depth (ML/Science systems, distributed pipelines), and business acumen — all three matter here  

You'll build lasting institutional muscle — governance frameworks, adoption playbooks, and review mechanisms that become the operating system for how we scale supply chain programs  

This is a high\-ambiguity, high\-impact space. If you thrive on connecting dots across complex systems, influencing without authority across worldwide teams, and turning chaos into repeatable execution — This is for you.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

End\-to\-End Program Ownership \& Delivery  

  

Own full lifecycle delivery of complex, cross\-organizational supply chain programs across Buying and Forecasting charters  

Drive roadmap \& OKR planning with 2\-month rolling cycles  

Co\-own P0/P1 metrics and establish program health mechanisms  

Cross\-Org Alignment \& Dependency Governance  

  

Manage 20\+ internal and external stakeholders across Tech, Product, Ops, Science, Seller Managers, and WW Teams  

Govern 10\+ external system dependencies concurrently (forecasting pipelines, vendor portals, WW platforms)  

Drive alignment across organizations including AFT, SCOT, Wombat, GPI, Category, ISMs, and Ops  

GTM Strategy \& Adoption Execution  

  

Design and execute multi\-phase Go\-to\-Market rollouts across DG and P3 hubs  

Drive adoption across thousands of dark stores in India and emerging markets  

Achieve 100% adoption within 30 days post\-launch (current baseline: 60\+ days)  

Buying Charter — Procurement Systems  

  

Drive automated PO generation \& optimization toward 95%\+ automation  

Own Multi Hub ASIN sourcing strategy and MOQ/MOV configuration  

Enable vendor ordering intelligence and Manual Buying UI tools  

Forecasting Charter — Demand Intelligence  

  

Drive MAPE improvement from 55% to Scale ASIN automation rate from 35% to \>90%  

Own S\&OP integrated planning framework, seasonal/high\-velocity event forecast models, and forecast tools (View/Download, Override, Explainability \& Analytics)  

Stakeholder Management \& Leadership Representation  

  

Serve as the program anchor and strategic voice for Buying \& Forecasting in leadership reviews  

Focus on strategic alignments, external dependencies, and GTM/adoption strategies while SDMs handle project execution and internal alignment  

  

About the team  

Amazon Now is Amazon's quick commerce business, delivering essentials to customers in under 15 minutes across India and emerging markets. At the heart of this promise is our Supply Chain Operations, Planning \& Efficiency (SCOPE) organization — the team that ensures thousands of dark stores stay optimally stocked, cost\-efficient, and ready to serve. We build AI/ML\-powered forecasting systems, automated procurement engines, and intelligent sourcing strategies that operate at massive scale. From demand prediction to purchase order generation to multi\-hub fulfillment, our supply chain systems are the backbone that turns speed into a sustainable, repeatable customer experience.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 3\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 5\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

87357239.title: Technical Program Manager
87357239.description:
**Technical Program Manager** 




**Location: Remote** 




**Experience: 4 to 8 years** 




**Education: Tier 1 preferred** 




  





**About the role and the client:** 




  





 The client builds the safety and alignment layer for frontier AI systems. They work with leading AI labs to make advanced models deployment\-ready — across red teaming, vulnerability discovery, safety evaluations, agent\-behavior testing, and the datasets and frameworks that make it measurable. If capability asks "what can the model do?", we ask "what happens when it fails, and how do we prevent it?"
 



  





 Every technology cycle begins with capability and matures through trust. AI is crossing that threshold now, and the assurance layer is becoming foundational. They are building the firm that does it to a benchmark standard.
 



  





 They are hiring a TPM to own delivery across both sides of our work: the client engagements we run for labs, and the proactive eval datasets we build, publish, and use to drive outreach and credibility.
 



  





**What you'll own** 




  





 Client delivery
 



 ● Own end\-to\-end delivery on active lab engagements — scoping, timelines, milestones, quality bar, and handoffs
 



 ● Translate lab safety team requirements into clear briefs for our researchers and engineers, and communicate our work back to technical counterparts at frontier labs
 



 ● Be the primary point of contact for clients through an engagement — someone who can hold a substantive conversation about what we're building and why
 



  





 Proactive eval and research work
 



 ● Drive our pipeline of self\-initiated eval datasets — work we build ahead of any client request, publish externally, and use to open conversations with labs
 



 ● Coordinate across research and engineering to keep this work moving alongside client commitments — scoping, tracking progress, managing publication and release
 



 ● Help shape which proactive bets we take: which failure modes are timely, which categories have the best opening for us, what the outreach story should be
 



  





 Operations
 



 ● Build delivery infrastructure as we scale — how we scope, how we QA, how we improve across engagements
 



 ● Track the full pipeline across client and proactive work, and surface risks early
 



  





**What we're looking for** 




  





 ● Working knowledge of how frontier models are trained — what kinds of datasets, evaluation environments, and RL setups labs actually use, and what makes each of them useful or not. You don't need to have built these yourself, but you should have been close enough to the work to have opinions about it
 



 ● Strong enough technical fluency to engage with our researchers and engineers on substance — understanding what makes an eval rigorous, when a scope is too broad, when a dataset is actually solving the problem it's meant to solve
 



 ● Comfortable in client\-facing conversations with technical stakeholders — safety researchers and engineers at frontier labs
 



 ● Ownership orientation that goes beyond coordination — you notice what needs to happen and make it happen

42b2bec7.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
42b2bec7.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for mission\-critical initiatives, starting with our automation and quality programme.
* Build visibility across systems, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, health metrics, and escalation workflows.
* Drive rapid root\-cause analysis and coordinate incident resolution across engineering, ML, data, clinical, and CS teams.
* Build process frameworks, runbooks, and scalable operational models that allow teams to execute predictably.
* Establish proactive risk management, quality gates, and cross\-team checkpoints before major releases.
* Lead complex multi\-team launches and rollouts (currently 6\-8 weeks) and streamline them for predictability and speed.
* Run program reviews, track dependencies, and maintain clear ownership across stakeholders.
* Champion operational excellence, continuous improvement, tighter SLAs, better tooling, and consistent execution.


**Requirements**
* Skills: Quality assurance, SQL, Looker, program management, project management, Tableau, machine learning, and NLP.
* 5\+ years of technical programme management experience, ideally in ML/AI, healthcare tech, or other quality\-critical domains.
* Proven track record managing multi\-team programmes involving engineering and non\-engineering stakeholders.
* Experience building operational systems such as monitoring, alerting, quality frameworks, and incident response.
* Strong ability to drive results without formal authority and work effectively in high\-ambiguity environments.
* Background working with regulated or quality\-sensitive workloads is strongly preferred.


**Technical And Analytical**
* Ability to understand system architecture and map which components are impacted by changes.
* Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency, comfort with dashboards, and trend analysis.
* Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Metabase, etc.
* Comfortable having technical conversations with engineers and understanding trade\-offs.
* Familiarity with modern data/ML stacks: we use GCP and BigQuery.


**Leadership And Communication**
* Exceptional communicator who brings clarity, structure, and urgency.
* Low\-ego, high\-empathy leader who can influence without authority.
* Comfortable running war rooms, driving decision\-making, and managing incidents end\-to\-end.
* Builds processes that scale without creating unnecessary overhead.


**Nice To Have**
* Experience in healthcare AI, medical coding, RCM workflows, or quality engineering.
* Experience scaling programmes at a fast\-growing startup.
* Exposure to pod\-based org structures.
* Prior background in operational excellence or reliability engineering.

90b45bfe.title: Program Manager
90b45bfe.description:
**About Ascendion**
 Ascendion is a leader in AI\-powered software engineering, helping businesses innovate faster, smarter, and with greater impact. We partner with Global 2000 clients across North America, UK, Europe, and APAC to solve complex challenges in data, experience design, software product engineering, and workforce transformation. Powered by expert engineers, thousands of AI agents, and our Engineering to the Power of AI™ (EngineeringAI) method, we deliver measurable outcomes that build trust, unlock value, and accelerate growth. Learn more at ascendion.com Ascendion \| Engineering to elevate life
   

  

 We have a culture built on opportunity, inclusion, and a spirit of partnership. Come, change the world with us:
   

  

* Build the coolest tech for world’s leading brands
* Solve complex problems – and learn new skills
* Experience the power of transforming digital engineering for Fortune 500 clients
* Master your craft with leading training programs and hands\-on experience


 Experience a community of change makers!
   

  

 Join a culture of high\-performing innovators with endless ideas and a passion for tech. Our culture is the fabric of our company, and it is what makes us unique and diverse. The way we share ideas, learning, experiences, successes, and joy allows everyone to be their best at Ascendion.
   

  

**Technical Program Manager (TPM)**
**Job Title:** 
 Technical Program Manager (TPM)
   

  

**Department:** 
 Engineering / Product
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced Technical Program Manager (TPM) to lead and coordinate cross\-functional technical programs from planning through execution. The TPM will work closely with engineering, product, design, QA, operations, and business stakeholders to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with business objectives.
   

  

**Program Manager Employment Type: Full\-Time Experience:**
* Seeking two exceptional Technical Program Managers (TPMs) to help accelerate its transformation into an AI\-native, engineering\-led technology company. This is not a traditional Project Manager role.
* We are looking for highly technical leaders who can partner with engineering organizations to drive large\-scale technology transformation, AI adoption, and platform modernization.
* The ideal candidate brings the mindset and execution style commonly found in leading technology companies such as Google, Meta, Amazon, Apple, Netflix, Microsoft, OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar engineering\-driven organizations.
* They are comfortable working in ambiguous environments, influencing senior technical leaders, and driving execution across complex cross\-functional initiatives.


**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead complex, cross\-functional technical programs involving AI, cloud, platform engineering, and software modernization. Partner closely with Engineering Directors, Distinguished Engineers, Product Management, Architecture, Security, and Data Science teams. Drive AI\-first strategy by identifying opportunities to leverage Generative AI and Agentic AI across engineering workflows and business processes.
* Build execution frameworks for large\-scale engineering initiatives from concept through production. Establish technical roadmaps, program milestones, dependency management, risk mitigation, and executive reporting. Drive adoption of engineering best practices including: AI\-assisted software development Developer productivity Platform engineering Cloud\-native architectures Automation DevSecOps Translate executive vision into actionable engineering programs with measurable business outcomes.
* Facilitate technical design discussions while understanding architecture trade\-offs and engineering constraints.
* Remove organizational blockers and align multiple engineering organizations toward common objectives.
* Develop metrics and dashboards to measure engineering efficiency, AI adoption, and program success. Influence without authority across geographically distributed engineering teams.
